```text
458	    /**
459	     * 计算冲突规则
460	     *
461	     * @param result 运行推理参数响应
462	     * @return 冲突松弛变量列表
463	     */
464	    private List<RelaxVar> calcConfictRules(RunInferParasRsp result) {
465	        AlgCPModel relaxModel = result.getAlgCPModel();
466	        // 获取冲突规则信息
467	        List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs = new ArrayList<>();
468	        Map<String, RelaxVar> relaxVarMap = relaxModel.getRelaxVarMap();
469	        for (Map.Entry<String, RelaxVar> entry : relaxVarMap.entrySet()) {
470	            RelaxVar relaxVar = entry.getValue();
471	            if (result.getSolver().booleanValue(relaxVar.getValue())) {
472	                confictedRelaxs.add(relaxVar);
473	            }
474	        }
475	        return confictedRelaxs;
476	    }
477	
478	    /**
479	     * 将冲突松弛变量列表转换为冲突消息字符串
480	     *
481	     * @param confictedRelaxs 冲突松弛变量列表
482	     * @return 冲突消息字符串
483	     */
484	    private String toConfictMessage(List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs) {
485	        StringBuilder conflictMessage = new StringBuilder("conflict rules: ");
486	        for (RelaxVar confictedRelax : confictedRelaxs) {
487	            conflictMessage.append(confictedRelax.getRuleCode()).append(",");
488	        }
489	        return conflictMessage.toString();
490	    }
491	
492	    private Pair<List<RelaxVar>, RunInferParasRsp> runCalcConfictRules(Module module,
493	            InferParasReq req,
494	            boolean isAttachRelax,
495	            List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs) throws AlgExecutorException {
496	
497	        RunInferParasRsp result = runInferParas(module, req, isAttachRelax, confictedRelaxs);
498	        CpSolverStatus status = result.getStatus();
499	        if (isFailed(status)) {
500	            throw new AlgExecutorException("Solver failed with status: " + status);
501	        }
502	        List<RelaxVar> newConfictedRelaxs = calcConfictRules(result);
503	        return new Pair<>(newConfictedRelaxs, result);
504	
505	    }
506	
507	    /**
508	     * 检查求解器状态是否失败
509	     *
510	     * @param status 求解器状态
511	     * @return 是否失败
512	     */
513	    private boolean isFailed(CpSolverStatus status) {
514	        return status != CpSolverStatus.OPTIMAL
515	                && status != CpSolverStatus.FEASIBLE
516	                && status != CpSolverStatus.INFEASIBLE;
517	    }
518	
519	    /**
520	     * 执行约束推理
521	     * 
522	     * @param module          模块对象
523	     * @param req             参数反推请求
524	     * @param isAttachRelax   是否附加松弛变量
525	     * @param confictedRelaxs 冲突松弛变量列表
526	     * @return 包含求解器状态和回调对象的RunInferParasRsp
527	     * @throws AlgLoaderException   当算法加载器未找到时抛出
528	     * @throws AlgExecutorException 当创建算法执行时抛出
529	     */
530	    private RunInferParasRsp runInferParas(Module module,
531	            InferParasReq req,
532	            boolean isAttachRelax,
533	            List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs)
534	            throws AlgLoaderException, AlgExecutorException {
535	        // 初始化约束模型
536	        ModuleAlgImpl alg = initConstraintModel(module, req, isAttachRelax, confictedRelaxs);
537	        AlgCPModel model = alg.getModel();
538	
539	        if (config.isLogModelProto()) {
540	            // 将module的CpModelProto信息输出到文件config.logFilePath/module.proto.txt
541	            model.getCpModel().exportToFile(config.getLogFilePath() + File.separator + module.getCode() + ".proto.txt");
542	        }
543	        CpSolver solver = new CpSolver();
544	        solver.getParameters().setEnumerateAllSolutions(req.isEnumerateAllSolution());
545	        solver.getParameters().setNumSearchWorkers(1); // 单线程搜索，防止有重复解
546	        if (model.hasDecisionStrategies()) {
547	            solver.getParameters().setSearchBranching(SatParameters.SearchBranching.FIXED_SEARCH);
548	            log.info("FIXED_SEARCH enabled for decision strategies");
549	        }
550	        log.info("solver parameters:\n" + solver.getParameters().toString());
551	        // 可按需设置更多参数
552	        ModuleInstSolutionCallBack cb = new ModuleInstSolutionCallBack(module, alg);
553	        CpSolverStatus status = solver.solve(model.getCpModel(), cb);
554	        log.info("solver  models:\n");
555	        model.printModelSummary();
556	        return new RunInferParasRsp(status, cb, alg.getModel(), solver);
557	    }
558	
559	    private ModuleAlgImpl initConstraintModel(Module module, InferParasReq req,
560	            boolean isAttachRelax, List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs)
561	            throws AlgLoaderException, AlgExecutorException {
562	        // 创建约束算法实例
563	        ModuleAlgImpl alg = createConstraintAlg(module.getId(), module.getCode());
564	        AlgCPModel model = new AlgCPModel();
565	        model.setIsAttachRelax(isAttachRelax);
566	        model.setConfictedRelaxVars(confictedRelaxs);
567	        // 根据loadType决定是否使用差量加载模型
568	        if (config.getLoadType() == ConstraintConfig.LOAD_TYPE_INCREMENTAL) {
569	            // 差量加载模型
570	            List<String> inputProgObjs = ReqUtils.buildInputProgObjs(req);
571	
572	            // 查询子图
573	            Pair<List<String>, List<RefProgObjSchema>> relativePair = module
574	                    .querySubGraph(inputProgObjs.toArray(new String[0]));
575	
576	            // 打印relativePair.first,relativePair.second, 本次推理涉及到exeRules和exeProgObjs
577	            log.info("Incremental loading - involved rules: {}", relativePair.getFirst());
578	            log.info("Incremental loading - involved progObjs: {}",
579	                    relativePair.getSecond().stream().map(RefProgObjSchema::getProgObjCode)
580	                            .collect(java.util.stream.Collectors.toList()));
581	
582	            // 调用新的initModel方法,issue:差量后续实现
583	            alg.init(model, module, toModuleInput(module, req));
584	        } else {
585	            // 全量加载模型
586	            alg.init(model, module, toModuleInput(module, req));
587	        }
588	
589	        // // 根据请求初始化约束模型
590	        // initModelByReq(req, alg);
591	
592	        // 添加松弛目标函数, 方便调试
593	        alg.addRelaxObjectFunction();
594	        return alg;
595	    }
596	
597	    private ModuleInput toModuleInput(Module startModule, InferParasReq req) {
598	        ModuleInput moduleInput = new ModuleInput();
599	        moduleInput.setModuleId(startModule.getId());
600	        moduleInput.setModuleCode(startModule.getCode());
601	        moduleInput.setMainPartInst(req.getMainPartInst());
602	        moduleInput.setPreParaInsts(req.getPreParaInsts());
603	        moduleInput.setPrePartInsts(req.getPrePartInsts());
604	        // moduleInput.setPartConstraintReqs(req.getPartConstraintReqs());
605	        moduleInput.setEnumerateAllSolution(req.isEnumerateAllSolution());
606	        // moduleInput.setPartCategoryCode(req.getPartCategoryCode());
607	        Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> partConstraintReqMap = normalizePartConstraint(req.getPartConstraintReqs(),
608	                startModule);
609	        FilterCloneResult filterResult = ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.filterClone(startModule,
610	                partConstraintReqMap);
611	        moduleInput.setPartCategoryInputs(filterResult.partCategoryInputs());
612	        moduleInput.setPartCategoryErrorInfoMap(filterResult.errorInfoMap());
613	        return moduleInput;
614	    }

632	    /**
633	     * 根据模块ID或模块代码获取模块对象
634	     * 
635	     * @param moduleId   模块ID，可为null
636	     * @param moduleCode 模块代码，可为null
637	     * @return 找到的模块对象，如果未找到则返回null
638	     */
639	    private Module getModule(Long moduleId, String moduleCode) {
640	        if (moduleId != null) {
641	            return moduleMap.get(moduleId);
642	        }
643	        if (moduleCode != null) {
644	            for (Module m : moduleMap.values()) {
645	                if (moduleCode.equals(m.getCode())) {
646	                    return m;
647	                }
648	            }
649	        }
650	        log.error("Module not found: moduleId={}, moduleCode={}", moduleId, moduleCode);
651	        throw new AlgLoaderException(
652	                String.format("Module not found: moduleId=%s, moduleCode=%s", moduleId, moduleCode));
653	    }
654	
655	    /**
656	     * 执行后处理
657	     * 
658	     * @param module    模块
659	     * @param solutions 原始解决方案
660	     * @return 处理后的解决方案
661	     */
662	    private List<ModuleInst> executePostProcess(Module module, List<ModuleInst> solutions) {
663	        List<ModuleInst> result = solutions;
664	
665	        for (ExtensibleProcess process : extensibleProcesses) {
666	            if (process instanceof InferParasPostProcess) {
667	                result = applyPostProcess(module, result, (InferParasPostProcess) process);
668	            }
669	        }
670	
671	        return result;
672	    }
673	
674	    /**
675	     * 应用单个后处理流程
676	     * 
677	     * @param module        模块
678	     * @param currentResult 当前结果
679	     * @param postProcess   后处理流程
680	     * @return 处理后的结果
681	     */
682	    private List<ModuleInst> applyPostProcess(Module module, List<ModuleInst> currentResult,
683	            InferParasPostProcess postProcess) {
684	        Result<List<ModuleInst>> processResult = postProcess.postProcess(module, currentResult);
685	        if (processResult.getCode() != Result.SUCCESS || processResult.getData() == null) {
686	            log.warn("Post process failed: {}, message: {}",
687	                    postProcess.getClass().getSimpleName(), processResult.getMessage());
688	            return currentResult;
689	        }
690	        log.info("Applied post process: {} successfully", postProcess.getClass().getSimpleName());
691	        return processResult.getData();
692	    }
693	
694	    /**
695	     * 将ModuleInst对象转换为JSON字符串
696	     * 
697	     * @param inst ModuleInst实例
698	     * @return JSON字符串
699	     */
700	    public static String toJson(ModuleInst inst) {
701	        try {
702	            ObjectMapper mapper = new ObjectMapper();
703	            mapper.setPropertyNamingStrategy(PropertyNamingStrategies.SNAKE_CASE);
704	            return mapper.writeValueAsString(inst);
705	        } catch (JsonProcessingException e) {
706	            return "{\"error\": \"Serialization failed: " + e.getMessage() + "\"}";
707	        }
708	    }
709	
710	}
```

```text
48	    /**
49	     * 执行约束处理的主方法，由子类实现
50	     *
51	     * @param partCategoryReq 部件分类请求
52	     * @return 处理结果

54	    public abstract Result<List<ModuleInst>> doProcess(InferPartCategoryReq partCategoryReq);

56	    /**
57	     * 求解约束模型并返回结果（无优先级约束）
58	     *
59	     * @param filteredModuleBase 过滤后的模块基础
60	     * @param partCategoryReq    部件分类请求
61	     * @return 求解结果
62	     */
63	    protected SolverResult solveWithOutPriorityConstraints(IModule filteredModuleBase, ModuleInput moduleInput) {
64	        log.info("no Priority-process starting........");
65	        return invokerSolver(filteredModuleBase, moduleInput, null);
66	    }
67	
68	    /**
69	     * 主求解方法-带优先级约束
70	     */
71	    protected SolverResult solveWithPriorityConstraints(
72	            IModule filteredModuleBase, ModuleInput moduleInput) {
73	        log.info("Priority-process pconstraint-step1 max/min starting........");
74	        // 步骤1：对每个优先级规则优化求解最优解 minimize(objecFun)
75	        SolverResult result = invokerSolver(filteredModuleBase, moduleInput, null);
76	
77	        if (!result.hasSolution()) {
78	            result.setMessage("Cannot find solution in first step");
79	            return result;
80	        }
81	
82	        // 步骤2：在保持高优先级目标接近最优的前提下，寻找多个解，objecFun <=
83	        // ajustObjectValue(不断调整ajustObjectValue)
84	        final int maxExecTimes = 5; // 最大执行次数,
85	        final int availableSolutionNum = 5; // 可行解的格式
86	        final int minSolutionThreshold = 3; // 最少解数量阈值
87	        int execTimes = 0;
88	        double baseAdjustCoeff = 0.5; // 基础调整系数
89	        double objectValue = result.getObjectiveValue();
90	        boolean needIncreased = true; // 是否需要增加objectvalue
91	        int needIncreasedTimes = 0;
92	        do {
93	            execTimes++;
94	            SolverResult lastResult = result;
95	            // 根据上一次求解结果动态调整策略
96	            if (execTimes > 1) {
97	                if (lastResult.isHasSearchMax()) {
98	                    // objectValue设置太大，最优解都没有处理，系数需要往下调
99	                    baseAdjustCoeff *= 0.7; // 降低调整幅度
100	                    needIncreased = false;
101	                    needIncreasedTimes = 0;
102	                    log.info(
103	                            "Priority-process pconstraint-step2 Iteration {}: objective value too high, reducing adjustment coefficient to {}",
104	                            execTimes, baseAdjustCoeff);
105	                } else if (lastResult.getSolutions().size() < minSolutionThreshold) {
106	                    // 解数量太少，objectValue设置太小，系数需要往上调
107	                    needIncreasedTimes++;
108	                    baseAdjustCoeff *= 3 * needIncreasedTimes;
109	                    needIncreased = true;
110	                    log.info(
111	                            "Priority-process pconstraint-step2 Iteration {}: too few solutions found, increasing adjustment coefficient to {}",
112	                            execTimes, baseAdjustCoeff);
113	                } else {
114	                    log.info("xxxx");
115	                    break;
116	                }
117	            }
118	            // 根据上一次调整方向决定本次调整
119	            if (!needIncreased) {
120	                objectValue = getAdjustObjectValue(objectValue, -baseAdjustCoeff);
121	            } else {
122	                objectValue = getAdjustObjectValue(objectValue, baseAdjustCoeff);
123	            }
124	            log.info("Priority-process pconstraint-step2 Iteration {}: adjusting objective value to {}", execTimes,
125	                    objectValue);
126	            result = invokerSolver(filteredModuleBase, moduleInput, objectValue);
127	
128	        } while (execTimes < maxExecTimes
129	                && result.getSolutions().size() <= availableSolutionNum);
130	        result.setIterationTimes(execTimes);
131	        return result;
132	    }
133	
134	    /**
135	     * 验证优先级总体值
136	     */
137	    protected Pair<Boolean, String> validPriorityOverallValue(double solverValue, List<ModuleInst> exprValueSolutions) {
138	        StringBuffer sb = new StringBuffer();
139	        boolean result = false;
140	
141	        if (exprValueSolutions == null || exprValueSolutions.isEmpty()) {
142	            sb.append("exprValueSolutions is empty");
143	            result = false;
144	        } else {
145	            double priorityOverallValue = exprValueSolutions.get(0).getPriorityOverallValue();
146	            if (Double.compare(priorityOverallValue, solverValue) != 0) {
147	                sb.append(String.format(
148	                        "Priority overall value mismatch: solverValue=%.2f, exprValueSolutions.get(0).getPriorityOverallValue()=%.2f",
149	                        solverValue, priorityOverallValue));
150	                result = false;
151	            } else {
152	                result = true;
153	            }
154	        }
155	
156	        return Pair.of(result, sb.toString());
157	    }
158	
159	    /**
160	     * 获取调整后的目标值
161	     */
162	    protected double getAdjustObjectValue(double objectValue, double adjustCoeff) {
163	        int cResult = Double.compare(objectValue, 0.0);
164	        if (cResult < 0) {
165	            if (adjustCoeff >= 0) {
166	                objectValue = objectValue * (1 - adjustCoeff);
167	            } else {
168	                objectValue = objectValue * (1 + Math.abs(adjustCoeff));
169	            }
170	        } else if (cResult == 0) {
171	            objectValue = adjustCoeff;
172	        } else {
173	            if (adjustCoeff >= 0) {
174	                objectValue = objectValue * (1 + adjustCoeff);
175	            } else {
176	                objectValue = objectValue * (1 - Math.abs(adjustCoeff));
177	            }
178	        }
179	        return objectValue;
180	    }
181	
182	    /**
183	     * 求解器调用入口
184	     */
185	    protected SolverResult invokerSolver(
186	            IModule filteredModuleBase, ModuleInput moduleInput, Double adjustOptimalValue) {
187	        log.info("invokerSolver starting........");
188	
189	        // 步骤1：对每个优先级规则优化求解最优解
190	        ModuleAlgImpl optAlg = createConstraintAlg(module.getId(), module.getCode());
191	        AlgCPModel optModel = new AlgCPModel();
192	        optModel.setIsAttachRelax(false);
193	        optModel.setConfictedRelaxVars(new ArrayList<>());
194	        optAlg.init(optModel, filteredModuleBase, moduleInput);
195	        // initModelByReq(moduleInput, optAlg);
196	        optAlg.addRelaxObjectFunction();
197	        boolean hasPriorityRule = optAlg.hasPriorityRule();
198	        if (hasPriorityRule) {
199	            PartAlgCPLinearExpr priorityMergedExpr = optAlg.queryMergerPriorityConstraintExpr();
200	            if (adjustOptimalValue == null) {
201	                optModel.minimize(priorityMergedExpr);
202	            } else {
203	                optModel.addLessOrEqual(priorityMergedExpr, adjustOptimalValue.longValue());
204	            }
205	        }
206	
207	        // 求解最优解
208	        CpSolver optSolver = new CpSolver();
209	        optSolver.getParameters().setNumSearchWorkers(1);
210	        optSolver.getParameters().setEnumerateAllSolutions(true);
211	        optSolver.getParameters().setMaxTimeInSeconds(10);
212	        if (optModel.hasDecisionStrategies()) {
213	            optSolver.getParameters().setSearchBranching(SatParameters.SearchBranching.FIXED_SEARCH);
214	            log.info("FIXED_SEARCH enabled for decision strategies in opt solver");
215	        }
216	        ModuleInstSolutionCallBack optCb = new ModuleInstSolutionCallBack(module, optAlg);
217	        optCb.setMaxSolutionNum(config.getMaxSolutionNum());
218	        log.info("solver  models:\n");
219	        optModel.printModelSummary();
220	        CpSolverStatus optStatus = optSolver.solve(optModel.getCpModel(), optCb);
221	        SolverResult sr = optCb.getSolverResult();
222	        sr.setSolverStatus(optStatus.toString());
223	        if (optStatus == CpSolverStatus.OPTIMAL || optStatus == CpSolverStatus.FEASIBLE) {
224	            sr.setObjectiveValue(optSolver.objectiveValue());
225	            log.info("Optimal value for : {}", optSolver.objectiveValue());
226	        } else {
227	            log.error("Failed to solver, status : " + optStatus);
228	            return sr;
229	        }
230	        if (hasPriorityRule && (adjustOptimalValue == null)) {
231	            Pair<Boolean, String> validResult = validPriorityOverallValue(sr.getObjectiveValue(), sr.getSolutions());
232	            if (!validResult.getFirst()) {
233	                String msg = "Failed to valid expr&solver " + validResult.getSecond();
234	                log.error(msg);
235	            }
236	        }
237	        sortSolutionsByPriority(sr.getSolutions());
238	        log.info("solutions: \n {}",
239	                SolutionUtils.toSolutionString(sr.getSolutions()));
240	        return sr;
241	    }
242	
243	    /**
244	     * 根据优先级对解决方案进行排序
245	     */
246	    protected void sortSolutionsByPriority(List<ModuleInst> solutions) {
247	        solutions.sort((a, b) -> -Double.compare(b.getPriorityOverallValue(), a.getPriorityOverallValue()));
248	        for (int i = 0; i < solutions.size(); i++) {
249	            solutions.get(i).setPrioritySortNo(i + 1);
250	        }
251	    }
252	
253	    /**
254	     * 解析并添加部件约束
255	     *
256	     * @param filteredCategory  过滤后的部件分类
257	     * @param partConstraintReq 部件约束请求
258	     */
259	    public static PartCategoryInput toPartCategoryInput(PartCategory filteredCategory,
260	            PartConstraintReq partConstraintReq) {
261	        // 根据partConstraintReq构造IPartCategoryInput
262	        PartCategoryInput fromReq = new PartCategoryInput();
263	        setPartCategoryInputBase(fromReq, partConstraintReq);
264	        fromReq.setFilteredCategory(filteredCategory);
265	        return fromReq;
266	    }

271	     * @param partCategoryInput
272	     * @param partConstraintReq

274	    public static void setPartCategoryInputBase(PartCategoryInputBase partCategoryInput,

276	        partCategoryInput.setSumAttrCode(partConstraintReq.getAttrCode());
277	        partCategoryInput.setAttrType(partConstraintReq.getAttrType());
278	        partCategoryInput.setComparator(partConstraintReq.getAttrComparator());
279	        if (partConstraintReq.getAttrComparator() != null) {
280	            partCategoryInput.setLeftValue(Integer.parseInt(partConstraintReq.getAttrValue()));
281	        }
282	        partCategoryInput.setOrgReq(partConstraintReq);
283	    }

289	        return moduleAlgClassLoader.newConstraintAlg(moduleCode);
290	    }
```

```text
148	    private void setCurrentRelaxVarName(String ruleCode, int weight) {
149	        if (!isAttachRelax) {
150	            log.info("relax:{} relax is not attached,setCurrentRelaxVarName", ruleCode);
151	            return;
152	        }
153	        log.info("relax:{} relax is attached,setCurrentRelaxVarName", ruleCode);
154	        this.currentRelaxVarName = "relax_" + ruleCode;
155	        this.currentRelaxVar = newBoolVar(this.currentRelaxVarName);
156	
157	        int tempWeight = weight;
158	        if (confictedRelaxVarMap.containsKey(this.currentRelaxVarName)) {
159	            tempWeight = tempWeight + RelaxVar.WEIGHT_ADDER;
160	        }
161	
162	        RelaxVar relaxVar = new RelaxVar(this.currentRelaxVarName, ruleCode, this.currentRelaxVar, tempWeight);
163	        if (relaxationVarMap.containsKey(this.currentRelaxVarName)) {
164	            throw new AlgLoaderException("Relaxation variable already exists: " + ruleCode);
165	        }
166	        relaxationVarMap.put(this.currentRelaxVarName, relaxVar);
167	    }

331	    /**
332	     * 注册其他变量
333	     * 
334	     * @param tv   变量对象
335	     * @param name 变量名称
336	     */
337	    private void registerVariables(final IntVar tv, final String name) {
338	        // 判断是否已经存在，如果已经存在，则抛异常
339	        if (otherVarMap.containsKey(name)) {
340	            log.error("Variable already exists: {}", name);
341	            throw new AlgLoaderException("Variable already exists: " + name);
342	        }
343	
344	        // name不是以ParaVar.VAR_PATTERN_PREFIX 且
345	        // PartVar.VAR_PATTERN_PREFIX开头，则添加到otherVarMap
346	        if (!name.startsWith(ParaVar.VAR_PATTERN_PREFIX) && !name.startsWith(PartVar.VAR_PATTERN_PREFIX)) {
347	            OtherVar otherVar = new OtherVar();
348	            otherVar.setCode(name);
349	            otherVar.setVar(tv);
350	            otherVar.setShortCode("o" + (++otherVarIndex));
351	            otherVarMap.put(name, otherVar);
352	        }
353	    }

357	     *

361	    private void registerVariablesBool(final BoolVar tv, final String name) {

365	    /**
366	     * 跟踪变量创建信息
367	     *
368	     * @param var  变量对象
369	     * @param lb   下界
370	     * @param ub   上界
371	     * @param name 变量名称
372	     */
373	    private void trackVariable(IntVar var, long lb, long ub, String name) {
374	        variables.put(name, var);
375	        variableLogs.add(String.format("%s in [%d, %d]", name, lb, ub));
376	    }

378	    /**
379	     * 创建并记录约束的私有辅助方法（LinearArgument约束）
380	     *
381	     * @param constraint     原始约束对象
382	     * @param leftExpr       左侧表达式
383	     * @param rightValue     右侧值
384	     * @param constraintName 约束名称
385	     * @param operator       操作符
386	     * @return 包装的约束对象
387	     */
388	    private AlgCPConstraint createAndTrackConstraint(Constraint constraint, LinearArgument leftExpr, long rightValue,
389	            String constraintName, String operator) {
390	        AlgCPConstraint algCt = attachRelax(constraint, constraintName);
391	        algCt.setLeft(toNameString(leftExpr));
392	        algCt.setOperator(operator);
393	        algCt.setRight(String.valueOf(rightValue));
394	        constraints.add(algCt);
395	        return algCt;
396	    }
397	
398	    /**
399	     * 创建并记录约束的私有辅助方法（AlgCPLinearExpr约束）
400	     *

402	     * @param leftExpr       左侧表达式
403	     * @param rightValue     右侧值

405	     * @param operator       操作符
406	     * @return 包装的约束对象
407	     */
408	    private AlgCPConstraint createAndTrackConstraint(Constraint constraint, AlgCPLinearExpr leftExpr, long rightValue,
409	            String constraintName, String operator) {
410	        AlgCPConstraint algCt = attachRelax(constraint, constraintName);
411	        algCt.setLeft(leftExpr.toString());
412	        algCt.setLeftName(leftExpr.getName());
413	        algCt.setOperator(operator);
414	        algCt.setRight(String.valueOf(rightValue));
415	        constraints.add(algCt);
416	        return algCt;
417	    }

497	    /**
498	     * 将LinearArgument转换为名称字符串
499	     *
500	     * @param expr LinearArgument表达式
501	     * @return 名称字符串
502	     */
503	    public static String toNameString(LinearArgument expr) {
504	        if (expr instanceof IntVar) {
505	            return ((IntVar) expr).getName();
506	        } else if (expr instanceof BoolVar) {
507	            return ((BoolVar) expr).getName();
508	        } else {
509	            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Unsupported linear argument type: " + expr.getClass().getName());
510	        }
511	    }
```

```text
1	package com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel;
2	
3	import com.google.ortools.sat.Constraint;
4	import com.google.ortools.sat.ConstraintProto;
5	import com.google.ortools.sat.Literal;
6	
7	import lombok.Data;
8	import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
9	
10	/**
11	 * 带松弛变量的约束包装类
12	 * 用于支持约束冲突调试功能
13	 *
14	 * @since 2025-01-27
15	 */
16	@Slf4j
17	@Data
18	public class AlgCPConstraint {
19	    /**
20	     * 原始CP-SAT约束对象
21	     */
22	    private Constraint cpConstraint;
23	
24	    /**
25	     * 松弛变量，用于约束冲突调试
26	     *
27	     * <p>
28	     * 当松弛变量为false时，约束将被"放松"（不强制执行），
29	     * 从而帮助识别导致无解的约束组合。这是约束冲突调试的核心机制。
30	     * </p>
31	     */
32	    private Literal relaxationVar;
33	
34	    /**
35	     * 松弛变量名称，用于调试和日志记录
36	     *
37	     * <p>
38	     * 松弛变量名称通常包含约束的标识信息，便于在冲突分析时
39	     * 快速定位问题约束。例如："relax_constraint_rule_001"。
40	     * </p>
41	     */
42	    private String relaxationVarName = "";
43	
44	    /**
45	     * 约束名称，如：addGreaterOrEqual
46	     */
47	    private String name = "";
48	
49	    /**
50	     * 左表达式的str
51	     */
52	    private String left = "";
53	
54	    /**
55	     * 操作符
56	     */
57	    private String operator = "";
58	
59	    /**
60	     * 右表达式的str
61	     */
62	    private String right = "";
63	
64	    /**
65	     * 条件信息
66	     */
67	    private String ifMemo = "";
68	
69	    /**
70	     * 左表达式名称
71	     */
72	    private String leftName = "";
73	
74	    /**
75	     * 右表达式名称
76	     */
77	    private String rightName = "";
78	
79	    public AlgCPConstraint(Constraint cpConstraint, Literal relaxationVar, String relaxationVarName) {
80	        this.cpConstraint = cpConstraint;
81	        this.relaxationVar = relaxationVar;
82	        this.relaxationVarName = relaxationVarName;
83	
84	        if (relaxationVar != null && cpConstraint != null) {
85	            cpConstraint.onlyEnforceIf(relaxationVar.not());
86	        }
87	        log.info("Constraint created: {} with relaxation: {}", name, relaxationVarName);
88	    }
89	
90	    /**
91	     * 设置约束执行条件
92	     *
93	     * @param condition 执行条件
94	     */
95	    public void onlyEnforceIf(Literal condition) {
96	        cpConstraint.onlyEnforceIf(condition);
97	        ifMemo += " if " + toNameString(condition);
98	        log.info("relax:{} -----AlgCPConstraint:onlyEnforceIf", relaxationVarName);
99	    }
100	
101	    /**
102	     * 不支持的方法 - 抛出异常
103	     * 
104	     * @param builder 构建器
105	     */
106	    public AlgCPConstraint(ConstraintProto.Builder builder) {
107	        throw new UnsupportedOperationException("AlgCPConstraint does not support ConstraintProto.Builder constructor");
108	    }
109	
110	    /**
111	     * 不支持的方法 - 抛出异常
112	     * 
113	     * @param lits 字面量数组
114	     */
115	    public void onlyEnforceIf(Literal[] lits) {
116	        throw new UnsupportedOperationException("AlgCPConstraint does not support onlyEnforceIf with Literal array");
117	    }
118	
119	    /**
120	     * 获取约束索引
121	     * 
122	     * @return 约束索引
123	     */
124	    public int getIndex() {
125	        return cpConstraint.getIndex();
126	    }
127	
128	    /**
129	     * 不支持的方法 - 抛出异常
130	     *
131	     * @return 构建器
132	     */
133	    public ConstraintProto.Builder getBuilder() {
134	        throw new UnsupportedOperationException("AlgCPConstraint does not support getBuilder method");
135	    }
136	
137	    /**
138	     * 将文字转换为名称字符串
139	     *
140	     * @param lit 文字对象
141	     * @return 名称字符串
142	     */
143	    public static String toNameString(Literal lit) {
144	        if (lit instanceof com.google.ortools.sat.BoolVar) {
145	            return ((com.google.ortools.sat.BoolVar) lit).getName();
146	        }
147	        if (lit instanceof com.google.ortools.sat.IntVar) {
148	            return ((com.google.ortools.sat.IntVar) lit).getName();
149	        }
150	        if (lit instanceof com.google.ortools.sat.NotBoolVar) {
151	            String str = lit.toString();
152	            // str = not(sd1.S(0..1)) --> extract "sd1.S"
153	            // Parse the string: "not(varName(range))" -> "varName"
154	            if (str.startsWith("not(") && str.endsWith(")")) {
155	                String inner = str.substring(4, str.length() - 1); // Remove "not(" and ")"
156	                int parenIndex = inner.indexOf('(');
157	                if (parenIndex > 0) {
158	                    return "!" + inner.substring(0, parenIndex); // Extract variable name before "("
159	                }
160	            }
161	        }
162	        // Handle other unsupported Literal types
163	        throw new UnsupportedOperationException(
164	                "Unsupported Literal type: " + lit.getClass().getSimpleName()
165	                        + ". Only BoolVar, IntVar, and NotBoolVar are supported. Literal: " + lit);
166	    }
167	
168	    /**
169	     * 返回约束的字符串表示
170	     *
171	     * @return 格式化的约束字符串
172	     */
173	    @Override
174	    public String toString() {
175	        StringBuffer sb = new StringBuffer();
176	        sb.append(left).append(" ").append(operator).append(" ").append(right).append(ifMemo).append(" (").append(name)
177	                .append(")");
178	        if (!leftName.isEmpty()) {
179	            sb.append(" L:").append(leftName);
180	        }
181	        if (!rightName.isEmpty()) {
182	            sb.append(" R:").append(rightName);
183	        }
184	        return sb.toString();
185	    }
186	}
187
```

```text
143	    protected void setPartCategoryInput(PartCategoryInputBase partCategoryInput) {
144	        if (null == partCategoryInput) {

147	        setPartCategoryInputVariales(partCategoryInput);
148	        if (Strings.isNotEmpty(partCategoryInput.getComparator())) {

154	    protected void setPartCategoryInputVariales(PartCategoryInputBase ipt) {
155	        if (!Strings.isNotEmpty(ipt.getSumAttrCode())) {
156	            return;
157	        }
158	        // 多实例后，不支持这种方式，ontoCode = pt.getFilteredCategory().getCode(); String paraCode =
159	        // ontoCode + "Sum" + pt.getSumAttrCode();
160	        String paraCode = ipt.getAttrType().name() + AttrPara.CODE_SEPARATOR + ipt.getSumAttrCode();
161	
162	        ParaVar pVar = this.getParaVar(paraCode);
163	        if (pVar == null) {
164	            pVar = newAttrParaVar(paraCode);
165	            log.info("Dynamic created para: {}", paraCode);
166	        } else {
167	            log.info("Para already exists for paraCode: {}, skipping", paraCode);
168	        }
169	
170	        pVar.setInputValue(ipt.getLeftValue());
171	        pVar.setIsHasInputed(Boolean.TRUE);
172	        log.info("Set input variable {} = {}", paraCode, ipt.getLeftValue());
173	
174	    }

176	    /**
177	     * 设置默认可见性约束
178	     * 对于没有显式控制可见性的变量，设置 isHiddenVar == 0（即默认可见）
179	     * 遍历所有变量，为没有显式可见性控制的变量设置默认可见状态
180	     * 
181	     * @throws AlgLoaderException 异常
182	     */
183	    protected void setDefaultVisibilityConstraints() {
184	        boolean isFirst = true;
185	        for (ParaVar paraVar : this.getParaVars()) {
186	            if (codesOfHiddenConstraint.contains(paraVar.getCode())) {
187	                continue;
188	            }
189	            if (isFirst) {
190	                this.model.setRelax4SysRule("hiddensrule");
191	                isFirst = false;
192	            }
193	            if (paraVar.getBase().getAssignType() == AssignType.CALC) {
194	                // 暂时没有添加到松弛变量里
195	                model.addEquality(paraVar.getIsHidden(), 0);
196	            }
197	        }
198	        for (PartVar partVar : this.getPartVars()) {
199	            if (codesOfHiddenConstraint.contains(partVar.getCode())) {
200	                continue;
201	            }
202	            if (isFirst) {
203	                this.model.setRelax4SysRule("hiddensrule");
204	                isFirst = false;
205	            }
206	            model.addEquality(partVar.getIsHidden(), 0);
207	        }
208	    }

210	    protected PartAlgCPLinearExpr buildSumExprInternal(PartAlgCPLinearExpr algExpr,
211	            PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl, String attrCode,
212	            String varName, Function<PartVar, LinearArgument> varGetter, String filtedConditionStr) {
213	        boolean isWithoutAttr = attrCode == null || attrCode.isEmpty();
214	        List<PartVar> partVars = partCategoryAlgImpl.getAllPartVars(filtedConditionStr);
215	        for (PartVar partVar : partVars) {
216	            int attrValue;
217	            if (isWithoutAttr) {
218	                attrValue = 1;
219	            } else if (PartConstantAttr.Quantity.getCode().equals(attrCode)) {
220	                attrValue = 1;
221	            } else {
222	                attrValue = partVar.getAttr4Int(attrCode);
223	            }
224	            algExpr.addTerm(partCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode(), partVar, (IntVar) varGetter.apply(partVar),
225	                    attrValue, varName);
226	        }
227	
228	        return algExpr;
229	    }
230	
231	    protected PartAlgCPLinearExpr buildSumExpr(List<PartCategoryAlgImpl> partCategoryAlgImpls, String attrCode,
232	            String varName, Function<PartVar, LinearArgument> varGetter, String filtedConditionStr) {
233	        PartAlgCPLinearExpr algExpr = new PartAlgCPLinearExpr(
234	                partCategoryAlgImpls.get(0).getCategoryCode() + "_" + partCategoryAlgImpls.get(0).getInstId()
235	                        + "_sumPars_"
236	                        + (attrCode == null ? "" : attrCode) + "_" + varName);
237	        for (PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl : partCategoryAlgImpls) {
238	            buildSumExprInternal(algExpr, partCategoryAlgImpl, attrCode, varName, varGetter, filtedConditionStr);
239	        }
240	        return algExpr;
241	    }
242	
243	    protected PartAlgCPLinearExpr buildSumExpr(PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl, String attrCode,
244	            String varName, Function<PartVar, LinearArgument> varGetter, String filtedConditionStr) {
245	        PartAlgCPLinearExpr algExpr = new PartAlgCPLinearExpr(
246	                partCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode() + "_" + partCategoryAlgImpl.getInstId() + "_sumPars_"
247	                        + (attrCode == null ? "" : attrCode) + "_" + varName);
248	        return buildSumExprInternal(algExpr, partCategoryAlgImpl, attrCode, varName, varGetter, filtedConditionStr);
249	    }

256	    /**
257	     * 添加松弛目标函数
258	     * 目标函数：最小化需要松弛的约束数量（带权重）
259	     */
260	    public void addRelaxObjectFunction() {
261	        if (!model.isIsAttachRelax()) {
262	            return;
263	        }
264	
265	        // 目标函数：最小化需要松弛的约束数量（带权重）
266	        List<RelaxVar> relaxVars = new ArrayList<>(model.getRelaxVarMap().values());
267	        if (!relaxVars.isEmpty()) {
268	            // 构建加权目标函数：min(relaxVar[0].value * relaxVar[0].weight + relaxVar[1].value *
269	            // relaxVar[1].weight + ...)
270	            AlgCPLinearExpr[] weightedTerms = new AlgCPLinearExpr[relaxVars.size()];
271	            for (int i = 0; i < relaxVars.size(); i++) {
272	                RelaxVar relaxVar = relaxVars.get(i);
273	                weightedTerms[i] = AlgCPLinearExpr.term(relaxVar.getValue(), relaxVar.getWeight());
274	            }
275	            AlgCPLinearExpr objectiveExpr = AlgCPLinearExpr.sum(weightedTerms);
276	            model.minimize(objectiveExpr);
277	            log.info("relax: -----relaxation objective function with {} relaxation variables", relaxVars.size());
278	        }
279	    }

281	    /**

287	     */
288	    protected void executeRuleMethod(Rule rule, Method method) {
289	        setCurrentModule4Rule(this, this);
290	        executeRuleMethod(rule, this, method);
291	        setCurrentModule4Rule(this, null);
292	    }

294	    protected void executeRuleMethod(Rule rule, IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, Method method) {
295	        if (method == null) {
296	            log.error("Rule method not found for execution: " + rule.getCode());
297	            throw new AlgLoaderException("Rule method not found for execution: " + rule.getCode());
298	        }
299	        try {
300	            // 设置当前松弛变量名称
301	            this.model.setRelax4CustomRule(rule.getCode());
302	
303	            // 执行规则方法
304	            method.setAccessible(true);
305	            method.invoke(moduleAlgFile);
306	            log.info("Executed rule method: {}", method.getName());
307	        } catch (IllegalAccessException | InvocationTargetException e) {
308	            log.error("Failed to execute rule method: " + method.getName(), e);
309	            throw new AlgLoaderException("Failed to execute rule method: " + method.getName(), e);
310	        }
311	    }

323	    /**
324	     * 初始化所有变量（paras和parts）
325	     * 遍历module的paras，创建ParaVar并放到paraMap
326	     * 遍历module的parts，创建PartVar并放到partMap
327	     */
328	    protected void initAll(IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile) {
329	        if (module == null) {
330	            log.warn("Module is null, skip initAll");
331	            return;
332	        }
333	
334	        // 初始化所有paras
335	        for (Para para : module.getParas()) {
336	            ParaVar paraVar = initParaVar(para);
337	            paraMap.put(para.getCode(), paraVar);
338	        }
339	        log.info("Initialized {} para variables", paraMap.size());
340	
341	        // 初始化所有parts（原子部件）
342	        for (Part part : module.getAtomicParts()) {
343	            PartVar partVar = initPartVar(part);
344	            partMap.put(part.getCode(), partVar);
345	        }
346	        log.info("Initialized {} part variables", partMap.size());
347	    }

363	    /**
364	     * 初始化单个AttrPara，创建对应的Para和ParaVar
365	     * 
366	     * @param attrPara 属性参数
367	     */
368	    protected void newAttrParaVar(AttrPara attrPara) {
369	        if (attrPara == null || attrPara.getAttrCode() == null) {
370	            return;

373	        newAttrParaVar(paraCode);

375	
376	    protected ParaVar newAttrParaVar(String paraCode) {
377	        if (paraMap.containsKey(paraCode)) {
378	            log.error("Para already exists for attrCode: {}, skipping", paraCode);
379	            throw new AlgLoaderException("Para already exists for attrCode: " + paraCode);
380	        }
381	        Para para = new Para();
382	        para.setCode(paraCode);
383	        para.setAssignType(AssignType.INPUT);
384	        // 从对应的属性里面获取数据issue（min，max等）
385	        para.setParaType(ParaType.INTEGER);
386	        // ModuleBase tempModule = (ModuleBase) module;
387	        // tempModule.addPara(para);
388	        ParaVar pVar = initParaVar(para);
389	        paraMap.put(paraCode, pVar);
390	        return pVar;
391	    }
392	
393	    /**
394	     * 初始化参数变量
395	     * 根据参数类型创建对应的变量（INTEGER/ENUM）
396	     * 
397	     * @param para 参数对象
398	     * @return 创建的参数变量
399	     */
400	    protected ParaVar initParaVar(Para para) {
401	        String code = para.getCode();
402	        ParaVar paraVar = new ParaVar();
403	        paraVar.setBase(para);
404	
405	        if (para.getAssignType() == AssignType.INPUT) {
406	            return paraVar;
407	        }
408	        String ipf = toInstPrefix();
409	        switch (para.getParaType()) {
410	            case INTEGER:
411	                paraVar.setValue(newIntVar(Integer.parseInt(para.getMinValue()), Integer.parseInt(para.getMaxValue()),
412	                        f(ParaVar.VALUE_PATTERN, ipf, code)));
413	                break;
414	            case ENUM:
415	                List<DynamicAttributerOption> options = para.getOptions();
416	                if (options == null || options.isEmpty()) {
417	                    log.error("Para options not found for code: {}", code);
418	                    throw new AlgLoaderException("Para options not found for code: " + code);
419	                }
420	                paraVar.setValue(newIntVarFromDomain(para.getOptionIds(), f(ParaVar.VALUE_PATTERN, ipf, code)));
421	
422	                for (DynamicAttributerOption option : options) {
423	                    ParaOptionVar optionVar = createParaOptionVar(para.getCode(), option.getCode());
424	                    paraVar.getOptionSelectVars().put(option.getCodeId(), optionVar);
425	                }
426	                paraVar.getOptionSelectVars().forEach((optionId, optionVar) -> {
427	                    model.addEquality(paraVar.getValue(), optionId).onlyEnforceIf(optionVar.getIsSelectedVar());
428	                    model.addDifferent(paraVar.getValue(), optionId)
429	                            .onlyEnforceIf(optionVar.getIsSelectedVar().not());
430	                });
431	                break;
432	            default:
433	                log.error("Para type not supported: {}", para.getParaType());
434	                throw new AlgLoaderException("Para type not supported: " + para.getParaType());
435	        }
436	        paraVar.setIsHidden(newBoolVar(f(ParaVar.HIDDEN_PATTERN, ipf, code)));
437	        paraVar.setInstId(getInstId());
438	        return paraVar;
439	    }
440	
441	    private String toInstPrefix() {
442	        final String prefix = (getInstId() == ModuleInst.DEFAULT_INSTANCE_ID ? "" : "I" + getInstId() + "_");
443	        return prefix;
444	    }
445	
446	    /**
447	     * 初始化部件变量
448	     * 创建部件的数量、选中状态和隐藏状态变量
449	     * 
450	     * @param part 部件对象
451	     * @return 创建的部件变量
452	     */
453	    protected PartVar initPartVar(Part part) {
454	        String ipf = toInstPrefix();
455	        PartVar partVar = new PartVar();
456	        partVar.setBase(part);
457	        partVar.setQty(newIntVar(0, part.getMaxQuantity(), f(PartVar.QTY_PATTERN, ipf, part.getCode())));
458	        partVar.setIsHidden(newBoolVar(f(PartVar.HIDDEN_PATTERN, ipf, part.getCode())));
459	        partVar.setIsSelected(newBoolVar(f(PartVar.ISSELECTED_PATTERN, ipf, part.getCode())));
460	        partVar.setInstId(getInstId());
461	        // 添加Qty和IsSelected的关系
462	        model.addGreaterOrEqual(partVar.getQty(), 1).onlyEnforceIf(partVar.getIsSelected());
463	        model.addEquality(partVar.getQty(), 0).onlyEnforceIf(partVar.getIsSelected().not());
464	
465	        return partVar;
466	    }

493	    /**
494	     * 过滤出指定fatherCode的规则
495	     *
496	     * @param rules      所有规则列表
497	     * @param fatherCode 父级代码，如果为null则获取模块级别的规则
498	     * @return 过滤后的规则列表
499	     */
500	    protected List<Rule> filterRulesByFatherCode(List<Rule> rules, String fatherCode) {
501	        if (rules == null) {
502	            return new java.util.ArrayList<>();
503	        }
504	        return rules.stream()
505	                .filter(rule -> {
506	                    if (fatherCode == null) {
507	                        return rule.getFatherCode() == null || rule.getFatherCode().isEmpty();
508	                    }
509	                    return fatherCode.equals(rule.getFatherCode());
510	                })
511	                .collect(Collectors.toList());
512	    }

514	    /**
515	     * 根据module.getAllRules()构建所有规则方法的映射
516	     *
517	     * @param module 模块对象
518	     * @return 规则代码到方法对象的映射
519	     */
520	    protected Map<String, Method> buildAllRuleMethods(IModule module) {
521	        return buildAllRuleMethods(module, this);
522	    }
523	
524	    protected Map<String, Method> buildAllRuleMethods(IModule module, IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile) {
525	        if (module == null || module.getAllRules() == null) {
526	            return new HashMap<>();
527	        }
528	
529	        // 获取当前类的所有方法
530	        Method[] methods = moduleAlgFile.getClass().getDeclaredMethods();
531	        Map<String, Method> allMethods = new HashMap<>();
532	
533	        // 构建方法名到Method对象的映射
534	        for (Method method : methods) {
535	            allMethods.put(method.getName(), method);
536	        }
537	
538	        // 根据module.getAllRules()来构建ruleMethods
539	        Map<String, Method> ruleMethods = new HashMap<>();
540	        for (Rule rule : module.getAllRules()) {
541	            String ruleCode = rule.getCode();
542	            Method method = allMethods.get(ruleCode);
543	            if (method != null) {
544	                ruleMethods.put(ruleCode, method);
545	                log.info("Built rule method mapping: {} -> {}", ruleCode, method.getName());
546	                // // 检查是否是PriorityRule，如果是则构建优先级约束
547	                // if (RuleTypeConstants.isPriorityRule(rule.getRuleSchemaTypeFullName())) {
548	                // buildPriorityConstraint(rule);
549	                // }
550	            } else {
551	                log.warn("Rule method not found for rule code: {} in class {}", ruleCode, this.getClass().getName());
552	            }
553	        }
554	
555	        log.info("Built {} rule methods from module rules", ruleMethods.size());
556	        return ruleMethods;
557	    }
558	
559	    protected void buildPriorityConstraint(IModule module) {
560	        module.getPriorityRules().forEach(rule -> buildPriorityConstraint(rule));
561	        for (Rule rule : module.getPriorityRules()) {
562	            buildPriorityConstraint(rule);
563	        }
564	    }
565	
566	    /**
567	     * 构建优先级约束
568	     * 
569	     * @param rule 规则对象
570	     */
571	    protected void buildPriorityConstraint(Rule rule) {
572	        if (rule.getRawCode() == null || !(rule.getRawCode() instanceof PriorityRuleSchema)) {
573	            log.warn("Rule rawCode is not PriorityRuleSchema for rule: {}", rule.getCode());
574	            return;
575	        }
576	        PriorityConstraint pConstraint = new PriorityConstraint();
577	        pConstraint.setRule(rule);
578	        setPriorityConstraint(pConstraint);
579	    }

581	    /**
582	     * 将变量写回字段，保证规则使用变量是同一个
583	     */
584	    protected void writeBackToFields(IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile) {
585	        Map<String, Field> fieldMap = getAllFieldVariables(moduleAlgFile);
586	        ModuleBaseAlgImpl algFileImpl = (ModuleBaseAlgImpl) moduleAlgFile;
587	        // 处理PartVar
588	        for (Map.Entry<String, PartVar> entry : partMap.entrySet()) {
589	            String code = entry.getKey();
590	            PartVar partVar = entry.getValue();
591	            Field field = fieldMap.get(code);
592	            if (field != null) {
593	                Var<?> tVar = algFileImpl.newPartVar(partVar);
594	                setVariableField(moduleAlgFile, tVar, field);
595	            }
596	        }
597	
598	        // 处理ParaVar
599	        for (Map.Entry<String, ParaVar> entry : paraMap.entrySet()) {
600	            String code = entry.getKey();
601	            ParaVar paraVar = entry.getValue();
602	            Field field = fieldMap.get(code);
603	            if (field != null) {
604	                Var<?> tVar = algFileImpl.newParaVar(paraVar);
605	                setVariableField(moduleAlgFile, tVar, field);
606	            }
607	        }
608	    }

610	    /**
611	     * 执行本层的规则
612	     *
613	     * @param allRuleMethods 所有规则方法映射
614	     */
615	    protected void executeModuleRules(IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, Map<String, Method> allRuleMethods,
616	            CalcStage calcStage) {
617	        if (module == null || module.getAllRules() == null || allRuleMethods == null) {
618	            return;
619	        }
620	
621	        List<Rule> moduleRules = module.getRules(calcStage);
622	        executeModuleRules(moduleRules, moduleAlgFile, allRuleMethods, calcStage);
623	    }
624	
625	    /**
626	     * 执行本层的规则
627	     *
628	     * @param allRuleMethods 所有规则方法映射
629	     */
630	    protected void executeModuleRules(List<Rule> rules, IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, Map<String, Method> allRuleMethods,
631	            CalcStage calcStage) {
632	        if (rules == null || allRuleMethods == null) {
633	            return;
634	        }
635	        for (Rule rule : rules) {
636	            String ruleCode = rule.getCode();
637	            Method method = allRuleMethods.get(ruleCode);
638	            if (method == null) {
639	                log.error("Rule method not found for rule code: {} in class {}", ruleCode, this.getClass().getName());
640	                throw new AlgLoaderException("Rule method not found for rule code: " + ruleCode + " in class "
641	                        + this.getClass().getName());
642	            }
643	            model.addRuleSeperator(ruleCode);
644	            setCurrentModule4Rule(moduleAlgFile, this);
645	            executeRuleMethod(rule, moduleAlgFile, method);
646	            setCurrentModule4Rule(moduleAlgFile, null);
647	        }
648	    }
649	
650	    private void setCurrentModule4Rule(IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, ModuleBaseAlgImpl tmpModuleAlg) {
651	        ModuleBaseAlgImpl algFileImpl = (ModuleBaseAlgImpl) moduleAlgFile;
652	        algFileImpl.currentModule = (tmpModuleAlg == null ? null : tmpModuleAlg.getModule());
653	        algFileImpl.currentModuleAlg = tmpModuleAlg;
654	
655	    }
656	
657	    protected void initData(AlgCPModel model, IModule module, IModuleInput moduleInput,
658	            IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile) {
659	        // Module级别
660	        this.model = model;
661	        this.module = module;
662	        this.moduleInput = moduleInput;
663	        // 初始化兼容性约束算法实例
664	        this.compatibleConstraintAlg = new CompatibleConstraintAlg(model);
665	        initModelAfter(model);
666	
667	        // 初始化本层变量（paras和parts）
668	        initAll(moduleAlgFile);
669	    }

717	    protected void setVariableField(IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, Var<?> v, Field field) throws AlgLoaderException {
718	        if (field == null) {
719	            log.error("Field not found for code: null {}", v.getCode());
720	            throw new AlgLoaderException("Field not found for code: null " + v.getCode());
721	        }
722	        try {
723	            field.setAccessible(true);
724	            field.set(moduleAlgFile, v);
725	        } catch (IllegalArgumentException | IllegalAccessException e) {
726	            log.error("Failed to write back variable to field: " + v.getCode(), e);
727	            throw new AlgLoaderException("Failed to write back variable to field: " + v.getCode(), e);
728	        }
729	    }

736	    protected Map<String, Field> getAllFieldVariables() { // TODO delete
737	        Field[] fields = this.getClass().getDeclaredFields();
738	        Map<String, Field> fieldMap = new HashMap<>();

761	    /**
762	     * 从字段名提取代码
763	     * 例如: colorVar -> Color, tShirt11Var -> TShirt11
764	     * 
765	     * @param fieldName 字段名
766	     * @return 提取的代码，如果字段名不以"Var"结尾则返回原字段名
767	     */
768	    private String extractCodeFromFieldName(String fieldName) {
769	        // 移除末尾的"Var"
770	        if (fieldName.endsWith("Var")) {
771	            return fieldName.substring(0, fieldName.length() - 3);
772	        }
773	        return fieldName;
774	    }

894	    /**
895	     * Return list of atomic parts used by sum4Selected, optionally filtered by
896	     * condition.
897	     *
898	     * @param filtedConditionStr filter expression, may be null
899	     * @return filtered list of atomic parts
900	     */
901	    public List<PartVar> getInternalPartVars(String filtedConditionStr) {
902	        List<Part> atomicParts = currentModule.getAtomicParts();
903	        if (filtedConditionStr != null && !filtedConditionStr.trim().isEmpty()) {
904	            atomicParts = FilterExpressionExecutor.doSelect(atomicParts, filtedConditionStr);
905	            log.info("Priority-Filtered parts: {} in getPartVars", PartUtils.toShortString(atomicParts));
906	        }
907	        List<PartVar> partVars = new ArrayList<>();
908	        for (Part part : atomicParts) {
909	            partVars.add(currentModuleAlg.getPartVar(part.getCode()));
910	        }
911	        return partVars;
912	    }

914	    /**
915	     * 创建参数选项变量
916	     * 
917	     * @param paraCode   参数代码
918	     * @param optionCode 选项代码
919	     * @return 创建的参数选项变量
920	     */
921	    protected ParaOptionVar createParaOptionVar(String paraCode, String optionCode) {
922	        String ipf = toInstPrefix();
923	        Optional<Para> paraOpt = module != null ? module.getPara(paraCode) : Optional.empty();
924	        if (!paraOpt.isPresent()) {
925	            log.error("Para not found for code: {}", paraCode);
926	            throw new AlgLoaderException("Para not found for code: " + paraCode);
927	        }
928	        Para para = paraOpt.get();
929	        Optional<DynamicAttributerOption> optionOpt = para.getOption(optionCode);
930	        if (!optionOpt.isPresent()) {
931	            log.error("ParaOption not found for code: {}", optionCode);
932	            throw new AlgLoaderException("ParaOption not found for code: " + optionCode);
933	        }
934	        DynamicAttributerOption option = optionOpt.get();
935	        ParaOptionVar optionVar = new ParaOptionVar(option);
936	        optionVar.setIsSelectedVar(newBoolVar(f(ParaVar.OPTIONS_PATTERN, ipf, paraCode, option.getCode())));
937	        return optionVar;
938	    }

940	    /**
941	     * 兼容性规则：Requires关系约束
942	     * 规则内容：如果左侧参数选择指定选项，则右侧参数必须选择指定选项
943	     * 例如：(a1,a3) Requires (b1,b2,b3) 表示如果A选择a1或a3，则B必须选择b1、b2或b3
944	     * 
945	     * @param ruleCode                   规则代码
946	     * @param leftParaVar                左侧参数变量
947	     * @param leftParaFilterOptionCodes  左侧参数过滤选项代码列表
948	     * @param rightParaVar               右侧参数变量
949	     * @param rightParaFilterOptionCodes 右侧参数过滤选项代码列表
950	     */
951	    public void addCompatibleConstraintRequires(String ruleCode, ParaVar leftParaVar,
952	            List<String> leftParaFilterOptionCodes,
953	            ParaVar rightParaVar, List<String> rightParaFilterOptionCodes) {
954	        // left:确保只有一个参数选项被选中
955	        addExactlyOneConstraint(leftParaVar);
956	        // right:确保只有一个参数选项被选中
957	        addExactlyOneConstraint(rightParaVar);
958	
959	        // 定义左侧条件：左侧集合中至少一个被选中
960	        BoolVar leftCond = createSelectedCondition(ruleCode, leftParaVar, leftParaFilterOptionCodes, "leftCond");
961	
962	        // 定义右侧条件：右侧集合中至少一个被选中
963	        BoolVar rightCond = createSelectedCondition(ruleCode, rightParaVar, rightParaFilterOptionCodes, "rightCond");
964	
965	        // 实现Requires关系：如果左侧条件为true，则右侧条件必须为true
966	        model.addImplication(leftCond, rightCond);
967	    }
968	
969	    /**
970	     * 添加部件数量相等约束
971	     * 根据partCode找到对应的partVar，并添加数量相等约束
972	     * 
973	     * @param partCode     部件代码
974	     * @param partQuantity 期望的部件数量
975	     * @throws AlgLoaderException 异常
976	     */
977	    public void addPartEquality(String partCode, int partQuantity) {
978	        // 设置当前松弛变量名称
979	        this.model.setRelax4SysRule("addPartEquality_" + partCode + "_" + partQuantity);
980	        // 1. 根据partCode找到对应的partVar
981	        PartVar partVar = partMap.get(partCode);
982	        if (partVar == null) {
983	            log.error("PartVar not found for code: {}", partCode);
984	            throw new AlgLoaderException("PartVar not found for code: " + partCode);
985	        }
986	        // 2. 使用model.addEquality添加数量约束
987	        model.addEquality(partVar.getQty(), partQuantity);
988	    }
989	
990	    /**
991	     * 添加参数相等约束
992	     * 
993	     * @param paraCode  参数代码
994	     * @param paraValue 参数值
995	     * @throws AlgLoaderException 异常
996	     */
997	    public void addParaEquality(String paraCode, String paraValue) {
998	        // 设置当前松弛变量名称
999	        this.model.setRelax4SysRule("addParaEquality_" + paraCode + "_" + paraValue);
1000	        ParaVar paraVar = paraMap.get(paraCode);
1001	        if (paraVar == null) {
1002	            log.error("ParaVar not found for code: {}", paraCode);
1003	            throw new AlgLoaderException("ParaVar not found for code: " + paraCode);
1004	        }
1005	        model.addEquality(paraVar.getValue(), Integer.parseInt(paraValue));
1006	    }
1007	
1008	    /**
1009	     * 兼容性规则：CoDependent关系约束
1010	     * 规则内容：双向依赖关系，左侧参数和右侧参数必须在对应的组内或组外
1011	     * 例如：(a1,a3) CoDependent (b1,b2,b3) 表示：
1012	     * - 如果A选择a1或a3，则B必须选择b1、b2或b3
1013	     * - 如果A选择a2、a4或a5，则B必须选择b4或b5
1014	     * - 如果B选择b1、b2或b3，则A必须选择a1或a3
1015	     * - 如果B选择b4或b5，则A必须选择a2、a4或a5
1016	     * 
1017	     * @param ruleCode                   规则代码
1018	     * @param leftParaVar                左侧参数变量
1019	     * @param leftParaFilterOptionCodes  左侧参数过滤选项代码列表
1020	     * @param rightParaVar               右侧参数变量
1021	     * @param rightParaFilterOptionCodes 右侧参数过滤选项代码列表
1022	     */
1023	    public void addCompatibleConstraintCoDependent(String ruleCode, ParaVar leftParaVar,
1024	            List<String> leftParaFilterOptionCodes,
1025	            ParaVar rightParaVar, List<String> rightParaFilterOptionCodes) {
1026	        // left:确保只有一个参数选项被选中
1027	        addExactlyOneConstraint(leftParaVar);
1028	        // right:确保只有一个参数选项被选中
1029	        addExactlyOneConstraint(rightParaVar);
1030	
1031	        // 定义左侧条件：左侧集合中至少一个被选中
1032	        BoolVar leftCond = createSelectedCondition(ruleCode, leftParaVar, leftParaFilterOptionCodes, "leftCond");
1033	
1034	        // 定义右侧条件：右侧集合中至少一个被选中
1035	        BoolVar rightCond = createSelectedCondition(ruleCode, rightParaVar, rightParaFilterOptionCodes, "rightCond");
1036	
1037	        // 定义左侧非条件：左侧集合外至少一个被选中
1038	        BoolVar leftNotCond = createNotSelectedCondition(ruleCode, leftParaVar, leftParaFilterOptionCodes,
1039	                "leftNotCond");
1040	
1041	        // 定义右侧非条件：右侧集合外至少一个被选中
1042	        BoolVar rightNotCond = createNotSelectedCondition(ruleCode, rightParaVar, rightParaFilterOptionCodes,
1043	                "rightNotCond");
1044	
1045	        // 实现CoDependent双向关系：
1046	        // 正向1.1：如果左侧条件为true，则右侧条件必须为true
1047	        model.addImplication(leftCond, rightCond);
1048	
1049	        // 正向1.2：如果左侧非条件为true，则右侧非条件必须为true
1050	        model.addImplication(leftNotCond, rightNotCond);
1051	
1052	        // 反向2.1：如果右侧条件为true，则左侧条件必须为true
1053	        model.addImplication(rightCond, leftCond);
1054	
1055	        // 反向2.2：如果右侧非条件为true，则左侧非条件必须为true
1056	        model.addImplication(rightNotCond, leftNotCond);
1057	    }
1058	
1059	    /**
1060	     * 兼容性规则：Incompatible关系约束
1061	     * 规则内容：双向不兼容关系，左侧参数和右侧参数不能在对应的组内同时存在
1062	     * 例如：(a1,a3) Incompatible (b1,b2,b3) 表示：
1063	     * - 如果A选择a1或a3，则B不能选择b1、b2或b3（必须选择b4或b5）
1064	     * - 如果A选择a2、a4或a5，则B可以选择任意值
1065	     * - 如果B选择b1、b2或b3，则A不能选择a1或a3（必须选择a2、a4或a5）
1066	     * - 如果B选择b4或b5，则A可以选择任意值
1067	     * 
1068	     * @param ruleCode                   规则代码
1069	     * @param leftParaVar                左侧参数变量
1070	     * @param leftParaFilterOptionCodes  左侧参数过滤选项代码列表
1071	     * @param rightParaVar               右侧参数变量
1072	     * @param rightParaFilterOptionCodes 右侧参数过滤选项代码列表
1073	     */
1074	    public void addCompatibleConstraintInCompatible(String ruleCode, ParaVar leftParaVar,
1075	            List<String> leftParaFilterOptionCodes,
1076	            ParaVar rightParaVar, List<String> rightParaFilterOptionCodes) {
1077	        // left:确保只有一个参数选项被选中
1078	        addExactlyOneConstraint(leftParaVar);
1079	        // right:确保只有一个参数选项被选中
1080	        addExactlyOneConstraint(rightParaVar);
1081	
1082	        // 定义左侧条件：左侧集合中至少一个被选中
1083	        BoolVar leftCond = createSelectedCondition(ruleCode, leftParaVar, leftParaFilterOptionCodes, "leftCond");
1084	
1085	        // 定义右侧条件：右侧集合中至少一个被选中
1086	        BoolVar rightCond = createSelectedCondition(ruleCode, rightParaVar, rightParaFilterOptionCodes, "rightCond");
1087	
1088	        // 定义左侧非条件：左侧集合外至少一个被选中
1089	        BoolVar leftNotCond = createNotSelectedCondition(ruleCode, leftParaVar, leftParaFilterOptionCodes,
1090	                "leftNotCond");
1091	
1092	        // 定义右侧非条件：右侧集合外至少一个被选中
1093	        BoolVar rightNotCond = createNotSelectedCondition(ruleCode, rightParaVar, rightParaFilterOptionCodes,
1094	                "rightNotCond");
1095	
1096	        // 实现Incompatible双向关系：
1097	        // 正向1.1：如果左侧条件为true，则右侧条件必须为false（右侧非条件必须为true）
1098	        model.addImplication(leftCond, rightNotCond);
1099	
1100	        // 正向1.2：如果左侧非条件为true，则右侧可以是任意值（无约束）
1101	        // 这个约束不需要显式添加，因为默认允许
1102	
1103	        // 反向2.1：如果右侧条件为true，则左侧条件必须为false（左侧非条件必须为true）
1104	        model.addImplication(rightCond, leftNotCond);
1105	
1106	        // 反向2.2：如果右侧非条件为true，则左侧可以是任意值（无约束）
1107	        // 这个约束不需要显式添加，因为默认允许
1108	    }
1109	
1110	    /**
1111	     * 字符串格式化工具方法
1112	     * 
1113	     * @param fstr   格式化字符串
1114	     * @param values 参数值
1115	     * @return 格式化后的字符串
1116	     */
1117	    private String f(String fstr, String... values) {
1118	        return String.format(Locale.ROOT, fstr, (Object[]) values);
1119	    }
1120	
1121	    /**
1122	     * 创建字符串列表的工具方法
1123	     * 封装Arrays.asList，提供更简洁的API
1124	     * 
1125	     * @param codes 字符串数组
1126	     * @return List<String>
1127	     */
1128	    protected List<String> listOf(String... codes) {
1129	        return Arrays.asList(codes);
1130	    }
1131	
1132	    /**
1133	     * 为参数变量添加"确保只有一个选项被选中"的约束
1134	     * 
1135	     * @param paraVar 参数变量
1136	     */
1137	    private void addExactlyOneConstraint(ParaVar paraVar) {
1138	        model.addExactlyOne(paraVar.getOptionSelectVars().values().stream()
1139	                .map(option -> option.getIsSelectedVar())
1140	                .toArray(BoolVar[]::new));
1141	    }
1142	
1143	    /**
1144	     * 创建"集合中至少一个被选中"的条件变量和约束
1145	     * 
1146	     * @param ruleCode          规则代码
1147	     * @param paraVar           参数变量
1148	     * @param filterOptionCodes 过滤的选项代码列表
1149	     * @param conditionSuffix   条件后缀（如"leftCond"、"rightCond"）
1150	     * @return 条件变量
1151	     */
1152	    private BoolVar createSelectedCondition(String ruleCode, ParaVar paraVar,
1153	            List<String> filterOptionCodes, String conditionSuffix) {
1154	        // 定义条件变量
1155	        BoolVar condition = newBoolVar(f("%s_%s", ruleCode, conditionSuffix));
1156	
1157	        // 获取选中的选项
1158	        Literal[] selected = paraVar.getOptionSelectVars().values().stream()
1159	                .filter(option -> filterOptionCodes.contains(option.getCode()))
1160	                .map(option -> option.getIsSelectedVar())
1161	                .toArray(Literal[]::new);
1162	
1163	        // 当条件为true时，集合中至少一个被选中；当为false时，集合全部不被选中
1164	        model.addBoolOr(selected).onlyEnforceIf(condition);
1165	        model.addBoolAnd(Arrays.stream(selected).map(Literal::not).toArray(Literal[]::new))
1166	                .onlyEnforceIf(condition.not());
1167	
1168	        return condition;
1169	    }
1170	
1171	    /**
1172	     * 创建"集合外至少一个被选中"的条件变量和约束
1173	     * 
1174	     * @param ruleCode          规则代码
1175	     * @param paraVar           参数变量
1176	     * @param filterOptionCodes 过滤的选项代码列表（这些选项不在集合内）
1177	     * @param conditionSuffix   条件后缀（如"leftNotCond"、"rightNotCond"）
1178	     * @return 条件变量
1179	     */
1180	    private BoolVar createNotSelectedCondition(String ruleCode, ParaVar paraVar,
1181	            List<String> filterOptionCodes, String conditionSuffix) {
1182	        // 定义条件变量
1183	        BoolVar condition = newBoolVar(f("%s_%s", ruleCode, conditionSuffix));
1184	
1185	        // 获取集合外选中的选项
1186	        Literal[] notSelected = paraVar.getOptionSelectVars().values().stream()
1187	                .filter(option -> !filterOptionCodes.contains(option.getCode()))
1188	                .map(option -> option.getIsSelectedVar())
1189	                .toArray(Literal[]::new);
1190	
1191	        // 当条件为true时，集合外至少一个被选中；当为false时，集合外全部不被选中
1192	        model.addBoolOr(notSelected).onlyEnforceIf(condition);
1193	        model.addBoolAnd(Arrays.stream(notSelected).map(Literal::not).toArray(Literal[]::new))
1194	                .onlyEnforceIf(condition.not());
1195	
1196	        return condition;
1197	    }
1198	
1199	    /**
1200	     * 设置部件为未选中状态（批量）
1201	     * 遍历调用 setPartUnSelected(Part part)
1202	     *
1203	     * @param parts 部件列表
1204	     */
1205	    public void setPartUnSelected(List<Part> parts) {
1206	        if (parts == null || parts.isEmpty()) {
1207	            return;
1208	        }
1209	        for (Part part : parts) {
1210	            setPartUnSelected(part);
1211	        }
1212	    }
1213	
1214	    /**
1215	     * 设置部件为未选中状态
1216	     * 根据 part.code 找到对应 partVar，使用 ortools 设置：
1217	     * - partVar.isSelected == 0
1218	     * - partVar.qty == 0
1219	     *
1220	     * @param part 部件
1221	     */
1222	    public void setPartUnSelected(Part part) {
1223	        if (part == null) {
1224	            log.warn("Part is null, cannot set unselected");
1225	            return;
1226	        }
1227	
1228	        // 根据 part.code 找到对应 partVar
1229	        PartVar partVar = getPartVar(part.getCode());
1230	
1231	        // 使用 ortools 设置约束
1232	        // partVar.isSelected == 0
1233	        model.addEquality(partVar.getIsSelected(), 0);
1234	
1235	        // partVar.qty == 0
1236	        model.addEquality(partVar.getQty(), 0);
1237	
1238	        log.info("Set part unselected: code={}, isSelected=0, qty=0", part.getCode());
1239	    }
1240	
1241	    public List<PartVar> getAllPartVars(String filterConditionStr) {
1242	        if (filterConditionStr == null || filterConditionStr.isEmpty()) {
1243	            return new ArrayList<>(partMap.values());
1244	        } else {
1245	            return FilterExpressionExecutor.doSelect(new ArrayList<>(partMap.values()), filterConditionStr);
1246	        }
1247	    }
1248	
1249	    /**
1250	     * 过滤所有部件变量
1251	     * 
1252	     * @param filterConditionStr
1253	     * @return 第一个是过滤后，第一个没有过滤的
1254	     */
1255	    public Pair<List<PartVar>, List<PartVar>> filterAllPartVars(String filterConditionStr) {
1256	        List<PartVar> filterPartVars = getAllPartVars(filterConditionStr);
1257	        Set<String> filterPartVarCodes = filterPartVars.stream().map(PartVar::getCode).collect(Collectors.toSet());
1258	        List<PartVar> noFilterPartVars = new ArrayList<>();
1259	        for (PartVar partVar : partMap.values()) {
1260	            if (!filterPartVarCodes.contains(partVar.getCode())) {
1261	                noFilterPartVars.add(partVar);
1262	            }
1263	        }
1264	        return Pair.of(filterPartVars, noFilterPartVars);
1265	    }
1266	
1267	    public String toString() {
1268	        return this.module.getCode();
1269	    }
1270	}
1271
```

```text
195	     */
```
```text
196	    protected List<ModuleInst> inferParas(String partCode, Integer qty, List<ParaInst> preParas,
197	            List<PartInst> preParts) {
198	        InferParasReq req = new InferParasReq();
199	        req.setModuleId(getModule().getId());
200	        req.setEnumerateAllSolution(isEnumerateAllSolution());
201	
202	        // 设置主部件实例
203	        PartInst mainPartInst = new PartInst();
204	        mainPartInst.setCode(partCode);
205	        mainPartInst.setQuantity(qty);
206	        req.setMainPartInst(mainPartInst);
207	
208	        // 处理预定义参数（复用公共方法）
209	        req.setPreParaInsts(preParas);
210	        req.setPrePartInsts(preParts);
211	
212	        Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.inferParas(req);
213	        log.info("Inference result: {}", result);
214	        setResult(result);
215	        setSolutions(result.getData());
216	        return getSolutions();
217	    }

220	     * 根据多个参数值进行推理（可变参数版本）
221	     * 
222	     * @param paraCodeValuePairs 参数代码和值的交替数组，格式：paraCode1, value1, paraCode2,
223	     *                           value2, ...
224	     * @return 推理结果
225	     */
226	    protected List<ModuleInst> inferParasByPara(String... paraCodeValuePairs) {
227	        InferParasReq req = new InferParasReq();
228	        req.setModuleId(getModule().getId());
229	        req.setEnumerateAllSolution(isEnumerateAllSolution());
230	
231	        // 复用公共方法处理参数
232	        req.setPreParaInsts(toPreParas(paraCodeValuePairs));
233	
234	        Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.inferParas(req);
235	        setResult(result);
236	        setSolutions(result.getData());
237	        return getSolutions();
238	    }

242	     */
243	    protected ProgammableInstAssert solutions(int index) {
244	        if (getSolutions() == null || index >= getSolutions().size()) {
245	            throw new IndexOutOfBoundsException("Solution index out of bounds: " + index);
246	        }
247	        ModuleInst solution = getSolutions().get(index);

269	    /**
270	     * 获取结果断言对象，用于验证执行结果
271	     */
272	    protected ResultAssert resultAssert() {
273	        if (getResult() == null) {
274	            throw new IllegalStateException("Inference not executed yet, cannot get result assertion");
275	        }
276	        return new ResultAssert(getResult());
```
