279	    /**
280	     * 检查解决方案列表中是否包含指定的字符串
281	     * 遍历所有解决方案的 toShortString 输出，检查是否包含指定的子字符串
282	     * 如果找不到匹配的解决方案，则抛出 AssertionError
283	     * 
284	     * @param expectedStr 期望包含的字符串
285	     * @throws AssertionError 如果找不到包含指定字符串的解决方案
286	     */
287	    protected void soluContain(String expectedStr) {
288	        if (getSolutions() == null || getSolutions().isEmpty()) {
289	            throw new AssertionError("No solutions found, cannot check if contains: " + expectedStr);
290	        }
291	        if (expectedStr == null || expectedStr.isEmpty()) {
292	            return;
293	        }
294	        for (ModuleInst solution : getSolutions()) {
295	            String solutionStr = solution.toShortString(true);
296	            if (solutionStr != null && solutionStr.contains(expectedStr)) {
297	                log.info("Found solution containing '{}': {}", expectedStr, solutionStr);
298	                return;
299	            }
300	        }
301	        // 构建错误消息，包含所有解决方案的字符串表示
302	        StringBuilder errorMsg = new StringBuilder();
303	        errorMsg.append("No solution found containing: ").append(expectedStr);
304	        errorMsg.append("\nAvailable solutions:");
305	        for (int i = 0; i < getSolutions().size(); i++) {
306	            String solutionStr = getSolutions().get(i).toShortString(true);
307	            errorMsg.append("\n  S_").append(i + 1).append(": ").append(solutionStr);
308	        }
309	        throw new AssertionError(errorMsg.toString());
310	    }
311	
312	    /**
313	     * 校验满足条件conditionExpr解的个数是否等于expectSolutionNum
314	     * 
315	     * @param conditionExpr     条件表达式，格式如："Color:Red,TShirt1:2"
316	     * @param expectSolutionNum 期望的解决方案数量
317	     */
318	    protected void assertSolutionNum(String conditionExpr, int expectSolutionNum) {
319	        // 如果expectSolutionNum为0，则不进行验证
320	        if (expectSolutionNum == 0 && (getSolutions() == null || getSolutions().isEmpty())) {
321	            return;
322	        }
323	        if (getSolutions() == null || getSolutions().isEmpty()) {
324	            throw new AssertionError("No solutions available for verification");
325	        }
326	        // 解析条件表达式
327	        Map<String, String> kvMap = parseConditionExpr(conditionExpr);
328	
329	        // 构建条件对象列表
330	        List<ConditionElement> conditionElements = buildConditionElements(kvMap);
331	
332	        // 计算实际匹配的解决方案数量
333	        int actualMatchSolutionNum = countMatchingSolutions(conditionElements);
334	
335	        // 比较实际数量和期望数量
336	        if (actualMatchSolutionNum != expectSolutionNum) {
337	            throw new AssertionError(String.format(
338	                    "解决方案数量不匹配，期望: %d，实际: %d，条件: %s",
339	                    expectSolutionNum, actualMatchSolutionNum, conditionExpr));
340	        }
341	
342	        log.info("Solution count verification passed, condition: {}, count: {}", conditionExpr, actualMatchSolutionNum);
343	    }
344	
345	    /**
346	     * 解析条件表达式
347	     * 格式："Color:Red,TShirt1:2" -> {"Color":"Red", "TShirt1":"2"}
348	     * 
349	     * @param conditionExpr 条件表达式字符串
350	     * @return 解析后的键值对映射
351	     */
352	    private Map<String, String> parseConditionExpr(String conditionExpr) {
353	        Map<String, String> kvMap = new HashMap<>();
354	        String[] pairs = conditionExpr.split(",");
355	
356	        for (String pair : pairs) {
357	            String[] kv = pair.split(":");
358	            if (kv.length == 2) {
359	                kvMap.put(kv[0].trim(), kv[1].trim());
360	            } else {
361	                throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid condition expression format: " + pair);
362	            }
363	        }
364	
365	        return kvMap;
366	    }
367	
368	    /**
369	     * 构建条件元素列表
370	     * 
371	     * @param kvMap 键值对映射
372	     * @return 条件元素列表
373	     */
374	    private List<ConditionElement> buildConditionElements(Map<String, String> kvMap) {
375	        List<ConditionElement> elements = new ArrayList<>();
376	
377	        for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry : kvMap.entrySet()) {
378	            String key = entry.getKey();
379	            String value = entry.getValue();
380	
381	            ConditionElement element = createConditionElement(key, value);
382	            elements.add(element);
383	        }
384	
385	        return elements;
386	    }
387	
388	    /**
389	     * 创建条件元素
390	     * 
391	     * @param key   键
392	     * @param value 值
393	     * @return 条件元素
394	     * @throws AlgLoaderException 当找不到参数或部件时
395	     */
396	    private ConditionElement createConditionElement(String key, String value) {
397	        // 在module.paras中查找
398	        java.util.Optional<Para> paraOpt = getModule().getPara(key);
399	        if (paraOpt.isPresent()) {
400	            return createParaConditionElement(key, value, paraOpt.get());
401	        }
402	
403	        // 在module.parts中查找
404	        IPart partOpt = getModule().getPart(key);
405	        if (partOpt != null) {
406	            return createPartConditionElement(key, value);
407	        }
408	
409	        // 都找不到，报错
410	        throw new AlgLoaderException(String.format(
411	                "Parameter or part not found in Module: %s", key));
412	    }
413	
414	    /**
415	     * 创建参数条件元素
416	     * 
417	     * @param key   键
418	     * @param value 值
419	     * @param para  参数对象
420	     * @return 条件元素
421	     */
422	    private ConditionElement createParaConditionElement(String key, String value, Para para) {
423	        String codeIdValue = ParaTypeHandler.getCodeIdValue(para, value);
424	        return new ConditionElement("para", key, codeIdValue);
425	    }
426	
427	    /**
428	     * 创建部件条件元素
429	     * 
430	     * @param key   键
431	     * @param value 值
432	     * @return 条件元素
433	     */
434	    private ConditionElement createPartConditionElement(String key, String value) {
435	        return new ConditionElement("part", key, value);
436	    }
437	
438	    /**
439	     * 计算匹配条件的解决方案数量
440	     * 
441	     * @param conditionElements 条件元素列表
442	     * @return 匹配的解决方案数量
443	     */
444	    private int countMatchingSolutions(List<ConditionElement> conditionElements) {
445	        int matchCount = 0;
446	
447	        for (ModuleInst solution : getSolutions()) {
448	            boolean isMatch = true;
449	
450	            for (ConditionElement element : conditionElements) {
451	                if ("para".equals(element.type)) {
452	                    // 对paraInst，比较value和paraInst.value
453	                    ParaInst paraInst = findParaInstByCode(solution, element.code);
454	                    if (paraInst == null || !element.value.equals(paraInst.getValue())) {
455	                        isMatch = false;
456	                        break;
457	                    }
458	                } else if ("part".equals(element.type)) {
459	                    // 对partInst，比较value和partInst.quantity
460	                    PartInst partInst = findPartInstByCode(solution, element.code);
461	                    if (partInst == null || !element.value.equals(String.valueOf(partInst.getQuantity()))) {
462	                        isMatch = false;
463	                        break;
464	                    }
465	                } else {
466	                    throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid condition element type: " + element.type);
467	                }
468	            }
469	
470	            if (isMatch) {
471	                matchCount++;
472	            }
473	        }
474	
475	        return matchCount;
476	    }
477	
478	    /**
479	     * 根据代码查找ParaInst
480	     * 
481	     * @param solution 模块实例
482	     * @param code     参数代码
483	     * @return 匹配的ParaInst，如果未找到则返回null
484	     */
485	    private ParaInst findParaInstByCode(ModuleInst solution, String code) {
486	        if (solution.getParas() == null) {
487	            return null;
488	        }
489	        return solution.getParas().stream()
490	                .filter(p -> code.equals(p.getCode()))
491	                .findFirst()
492	                .orElse(null);
493	    }
494	
495	    /**
496	     * 根据代码查找PartInst
497	     * 
498	     * @param solution 模块实例
499	     * @param code     部件代码
500	     * @return 匹配的PartInst，如果未找到则返回null
501	     */
502	    private PartInst findPartInstByCode(ModuleInst solution, String code) {
503	        if (solution.getParts() == null) {
504	            return null;
505	        }
506	        return solution.getParts().stream()
507	                .filter(p -> code.equals(p.getCode()))
508	                .findFirst()
509	                .orElse(null);
510	    }
511	
512	    /**
513	     * 根据参数代码值对构建ParaInst列表（公共方法）
514	     * 
515	     * @param paraCodeValuePairs 参数代码和值的交替数组
516	     * @return ParaInst列表
517	     */
518	    protected List<ParaInst> toPreParas(String... paraCodeValuePairs) {
519	        if (paraCodeValuePairs.length % 2 != 0) {
520	            throw new IllegalArgumentException(
521	                    "Parameters must be in even numbers, format: paraCode1, value1, paraCode2, value2, ...");
522	        }
523	
524	        List<ParaInst> paraInsts = new ArrayList<>();
525	
526	        for (int i = 0; i < paraCodeValuePairs.length; i += 2) {
527	            String paraCode = paraCodeValuePairs[i];
528	            String value = paraCodeValuePairs[i + 1];
529	
530	            ParaInst paraInst = new ParaInst();
531	            paraInst.setCode(paraCode);
532	
533	            // 根据module.paras中的para.options，找到value对应的option
534	            Optional<Para> paraOpt = getModule().getPara(paraCode);
535	            if (!paraOpt.isPresent()) {
536	                throw new AlgLoaderException(String.format("Parameter %s does not exist", paraCode));
537	            }
538	            Para para = paraOpt.get();
539	            paraInst.setValue(ParaTypeHandler.getCodeIdValue(para, value));
540	            paraInsts.add(paraInst);
541	        }
542	
543	        return paraInsts;
544	    }
545	
546	    /**
547	     * 根据Part代码值对构建PartInst列表（公共方法）
548	     * 
549	     * @param partCodeValuePairs Part代码和值的交替数组
550	     * @return ParaInst列表
551	     */
552	    protected List<PartInst> toPreParts(String... partCodeValuePairs) {
553	        if (partCodeValuePairs.length % 2 != 0) {
554	            throw new IllegalArgumentException(
555	                    "Parts must be in even numbers, format: partCode1, value1, partCode2, value2, ...");
556	        }
557	
558	        List<PartInst> partInsts = new ArrayList<>();
559	
560	        for (int i = 0; i < partCodeValuePairs.length; i += 2) {
561	            String partCode = partCodeValuePairs[i];
562	            String value = partCodeValuePairs[i + 1];
563	
564	            PartInst partInst = new PartInst();
565	            partInst.setCode(partCode);
566	
567	            // 根据module.parts中
568	            IPart partOpt = getModule().getPart(partCode);
569	            if (partOpt == null) {
570	                throw new AlgLoaderException(String.format("Part %s does not exist", partCode));
571	            }
572	            partInst.setQuantity(Integer.parseInt(value));
573	            partInsts.add(partInst);
574	        }
575	
576	        return partInsts;
577	    }

579	    /**
580	     * 条件元素内部类
581	     */
582	    private static class ConditionElement {
583	
584	        private final String type; // "para" 或 "part"
585	
586	        private final String code; // 代码
587	
588	        private final String value; // 值
589	
590	        ConditionElement(String type, String code, String value) {
591	            this.type = type;
592	            this.code = code;
593	            this.value = value;
594	        }
595	    }

618	
619	    /**
620	     * 将字符串约束请求转换为PartConstraintReq列表
621	     *
622	     * @param partCategory 部件类别
623	     * @param strReqs      字符串约束请求数组，格式如："sd:Sum_Quantity ==2 where Speed=5400"
624	     * @return PartConstraintReq列表
625	     */
626	    protected List<PartConstraintReq> toPartConstraintReqs(String partCategory, String... strReqs) {
627	        List<PartConstraintReq> reqs = new ArrayList<>();
628	
629	        for (String strReq : strReqs) {
630	            PartConstraintReq req = new PartConstraintReq();
631	
632	            // Parse strategy syntax: [strategy=ASCENDING:price]
633	            String remainingStr = parseStrategyConfig(strReq, req);
634	
635	            // 解析格式：reqPartCategory:attrCode comparator value where condition
636	            // 示例："sd:Sum_Quantity ==2 where Speed=5400"
637	            String[] categoryParts = remainingStr.split(":", 2);
638	            String reqPartCategory;
639	            String attrExprStr;
640	            if (categoryParts.length == 2) {
641	                reqPartCategory = categoryParts[0].trim();
642	                attrExprStr = categoryParts[1].trim();
643	            } else {
644	                // 如果没有:，则使用默认的partCategory
645	                reqPartCategory = partCategory;
646	                attrExprStr = remainingStr;
647	            }
648	            req.setPartCategoryCode(reqPartCategory);
649	
650	            // 解析属性表达式：支持三种场景
651	            // 场景1：仅有过滤条件，如 "where Speed=5400"
652	            // 场景2：仅有汇总条件，如 "Sum_Capacity >=5"
653	            // 场景3：同时有汇总条件和过滤条件，如 "Sum_Capacity >=5 where Speed=5400"
654	            parseAttrExpr(attrExprStr, req);
655	
656	            reqs.add(req);
657	        }
658	
659	        return reqs;
660	    }
661	
662	    /**
663	     * Parse strategy configuration from the constraint request string.
664	     * Syntax: [strategy=ASCENDING:price] or [strategy=DESCENDING:attrCode]
665	     *
666	     * @param strReq the full constraint request string
667	     * @param req    the PartConstraintReq to populate
668	     * @return the remaining string after removing strategy configuration
669	     */
670	    private String parseStrategyConfig(String strReq, PartConstraintReq req) {
671	        Pattern strategyPattern = Pattern.compile("\\[strategy=(ASCENDING|DESCENDING|UNSPECIFIED):(\\w+)\\]");
672	        Matcher matcher = strategyPattern.matcher(strReq);
673	        if (matcher.find()) {
674	            StrategyConfig config = new StrategyConfig();
675	            config.setStrategyType(StrategyType.valueOf(matcher.group(1)));
676	            config.setSortAttributeCode(matcher.group(2));
677	            List<StrategyConfig> strategies = new ArrayList<>();
678	            strategies.add(config);
679	            req.setDecisionStrategies(strategies);
680	            // Remove the strategy part from the string
681	            return matcher.replaceFirst("").trim();
682	        }
683	        return strReq;
684	    }
685	
686	    /**
687	     * 解析属性表达式为PartConstraintReq
688	     * 支持三种场景：
689	     * 场景1：仅有过滤条件，如 "where Speed=5400" -> attrWhereCondition="Speed=5400", attrComparator=null
690	     * 场景2：仅有汇总条件，如 "Sum_Capacity >=5" -> attrWhereCondition=null, attrType=Sum, attrCode=Capacity, attrComparator=">=", attrValue="5"
691	     * 场景3：同时有汇总条件和过滤条件，如 "Sum_Capacity >=5 where Speed=5400" -> 同时设置两个条件
692	     *
693	     * @param attrExpr 属性表达式（可能包含 where 子句）
694	     * @param req 部件约束请求对象，用于设置解析结果
695	     */
696	    protected void parseAttrExpr(String attrExpr, PartConstraintReq req) {
697	        String trimmedExpr = attrExpr.trim();
698	
699	        // 处理 where 子句（过滤条件）
700	        // 支持多种格式：",where XXX", "where XXX", ", where XXX"
701	        int whereIndex = -1;
702	        String whereCondition = null;
703	
704	        // 先尝试 " where " (前后都有空格)
705	        whereIndex = trimmedExpr.indexOf(" where ");
706	        if (whereIndex >= 0) {
707	            whereCondition = trimmedExpr.substring(whereIndex + 7).trim();
708	            trimmedExpr = trimmedExpr.substring(0, whereIndex).trim();
709	        } else {
710	            // 再尝试 "where " (前面没有空格)
711	            whereIndex = trimmedExpr.indexOf("where ");
712	            if (whereIndex >= 0) {
713	                whereCondition = trimmedExpr.substring(whereIndex + 6).trim();
714	                trimmedExpr = trimmedExpr.substring(0, whereIndex).trim();
715	            }
716	        }
717	
718	        if (whereCondition != null && !whereCondition.isEmpty()) {
719	            req.setAttrWhereCondition(whereCondition);
720	        }
721	
722	        // 解析汇总条件部分
723	        if (trimmedExpr.isEmpty()) {
724	            // 场景1：仅有过滤条件，没有汇总条件
725	            return;
726	        }
727	
728	        // 使用正则表达式解析：attrCode comparator value
729	        Pattern pattern = Pattern.compile("([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*(==|!=|<=|>=|<|>)\\s*(\\d+)");
730	        Matcher matcher = pattern.matcher(trimmedExpr);
731	
732	        if (matcher.matches()) {
733	            String mergedAttrCode = matcher.group(1).trim();
734	            String[] mergedParts = mergedAttrCode.split(AttrPara.CODE_SEPARATOR);
735	            if (mergedParts.length == 2) {
736	                req.setAttrType(AttrParaType.valueOf(mergedParts[0]));
737	                req.setAttrCode(mergedParts[1]);
738	            } else {
739	                throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid attribute expression format: " + trimmedExpr);
740	            }
741	            req.setAttrComparator(matcher.group(2).trim());
742	            req.setAttrValue(matcher.group(3).trim());
743	        } else {
744	            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid attribute expression format: " + trimmedExpr);
745	        }
746	    }
747	
748	    /**
749	     * 基于部件约束进行推理推荐
750	     * 
751	     * @param constraintReqs 约束请求字符串数组
752	     * @return 推荐的模块实例列表
753	     */
754	    protected List<ModuleInst> inferRecommendModule(String... constraintReqs) {
755	        return inferRecommend("", constraintReqs);
756	    }
757	
758	    /**
759	     * 基于部件约束进行推理推荐
760	     * 
761	     * @param partCategoryCode 部件类别
762	     * @param constraintReqs   约束请求字符串数组
763	     * @return 推荐的模块实例列表
764	     */
765	    protected List<ModuleInst> inferRecommend(String partCategoryCode, String... constraintReqs) {
766	        List<PartConstraintReq> partConstraintReqs = toPartConstraintReqs(partCategoryCode, constraintReqs);
767	
768	        InferParasReq req = new InferParasReq();
769	        req.setModuleId(getModule().getId());
770	        req.setEnumerateAllSolution(isEnumerateAllSolution());
771	        req.setPartCategoryCode(partCategoryCode);
772	        req.setPartConstraintReqs(partConstraintReqs);
773	
774	        long startTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
775	        Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.inferParas(req);
776	        long endTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
777	        long executionTime = endTime - startTime;
778	        log.info("Inference recommend execution time: {} ms", executionTime);
779	        setResult(result);
780	        setSolutions(result.getData());
781	        return getSolutions();
782	    }
783	
784	    private void assertSoluSizeEqual(int size) {
785	        assertEquals(size, solutions.size(), "Solutions size should be " + size);
786	    }
787	
788	    /**
789	     * 比较Solution的值
790	     *
791	     * @param index
792	     * @param expect
793	     */
794	    public void assertSoluContain(int index, String expect) {
795	        assertSoluContain(index, expect, true);
796	    }
797	
798	    private void assertSoluContain(int index, String expect, boolean isSimple) {
799	        String msg = "Solution at index " + index + " should match expected string";
800	        assertTrue(solutions.size() >= index, msg);
801	        assertStringContains(solutions.get(index - 1).toShortString(isSimple),
802	                expect,
803	                msg);
804	    }
805	
806	    private void assertStringContains(String real, String expect, String msg) {
807	        // boolean result = real.contains(expect);
808	        boolean result = contains(real, expect);
809	        if (!result) {
810	            assertEquals(expect, real, "contains is false," + msg);
811	        }
812	    }
813	
814	    protected void assertSoluContain(String expect) {
815	        assertSoluContain(expect, true);
816	    }
817	
818	    private void assertSoluContain(String expect, boolean isSimple) {
819	        boolean isContain = false;
820	        for (ModuleInst solu : result.getData()) {
821	            if (contains(solu.toShortString(isSimple), expect)) {
822	                isContain = true;
823	                break;
824	            }
825	        }
826	        assertTrue(isContain,
827	                "Solution contain " + expect);
828	    }
829	
830	    private boolean contains(String realWholeStr, String expectStr) {
831	        List<String> expectParts = parseExpect(expectStr);
832	        for (String expectPart : expectParts) {
833	            if (!realWholeStr.contains(expectPart)) {
834	                return false;
835	            }
836	        }
837	        return true;
838	    }
839	
840	    private List<String> parseExpect(String expectStr) {
841	        // expectStr = "cpu2(Q:20,H:0,S:1),md1(Q:5,H:0,S:1),sd1(0*)"
842	        // 预期结果：["cpu2(Q:20,H:0,S:1)","md1(Q:5,H:0,S:1)","sd1(0*)"
843	        // 处理逻辑： 根据“),”来拆分
844	        List<String> result = new ArrayList<>();
845	        String[] items = expectStr.split("\\),");
846	        for (String item : items) {
847	            result.add(item.trim());
848	        }
849	        return result;
850	    }
851	
852	}
```
</details></tool-use>

19	    // ---------------模型的定义start----------------------------------------
20	    @ModuleAnno(id = 123L)
21	    static public class ConfictDebugConstraint extends ConstraintAlgImplTestBase {
22	        @PartAnno(maxQuantity = 50)
23	        private PartVar x;
24	
25	        @PartAnno(maxQuantity = 50)
26	        private PartVar y;

28	        // rule1: x.qty + y.qty < 20
29	        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "x.qty + y.qty < 20")
30	        private void rule1() {
31	            // Create linear expression for x.qty + y.qty
32	            AlgCPLinearExpr sumXY = new AlgCPLinearExpr("sum_x_y");
33	            sumXY.addTerm(x.qty, 1);
34	            sumXY.addTerm(y.qty, 1);
35	            // Add constraint: x.qty + y.qty < 20
36	            model.addLessThan(sumXY, 20);
37	        }
38	
39	        // rule2: x.qty - y.qty > 10
40	        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "x.qty - y.qty > 10")
41	        private void rule2() {
42	            // Create linear expression for x.qty - y.qty
43	            AlgCPLinearExpr diffXY = AlgCPLinearExpr.weightedSum(new IntVar[] { x.qty, y.qty },
44	                    new long[] { 1, -1 });
45	            // Add constraint: x.qty - y.qty > 10
46	            model.addGreaterThan(diffXY, 10);
47	        }
48	
49	        // rule3: y.qty > 45
50	        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "y.qty > 45")

52	            // Add constraint: y.qty > 45
53	            model.addGreaterThan(y.qty, 45);

59	            // Create linear expression for x.qty + 2 * y.qty
60	            AlgCPLinearExpr sumX2Y = AlgCPLinearExpr.weightedSum(new com.google.ortools.sat.IntVar[] { x.qty, y.qty },
61	                    new long[] { 1, 2 });
62	            // Add constraint: x.qty + 2 * y.qty > 10
63	            model.addGreaterThan(sumX2Y, 10);
64	        }
65	    }

20	    // ---------------模型的定义start----------------------------------------

23	        @PartAnno(maxQuantity = 50)
24	        private PartVar x;
25	
26	        @PartAnno(maxQuantity = 50)
27	        private PartVar y;

29	        @PartAnno(maxQuantity = 50)

32	        // rule1: if(x.qty > 10) then y.qty > 7
33	        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "if(x.qty > 10) then y.qty > 7")
34	        private void rule1() {
35	            // Create condition variable: x quantity greater than 10
36	            BoolVar xGreaterThan10 = model.newBoolVar("rule1_xGreaterThan10");
37	
38	            // Set condition: x.qty > 10
39	            model.addGreaterThan(x.qty, 10).onlyEnforceIf(xGreaterThan10);
40	            model.addLessOrEqual(x.qty, 10).onlyEnforceIf(xGreaterThan10.not());
41	
42	            // Then condition: y.qty > 7
43	            model.addGreaterThan(y.qty, 7).onlyEnforceIf(xGreaterThan10);
44	        }
45	
46	        // rule2: x.qty + y.qty > 10
47	        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "x.qty + y.qty > 10")
48	        private void rule2() {
49	            // Create linear expression for sum of x and y quantities
50	            AlgCPLinearExpr sumXY = model.newLinearExpr("sum_x_y");
51	            sumXY.addTerm(x.qty, 1);
52	            sumXY.addTerm(y.qty, 1);
53	
54	            // Add constraint: x.qty + y.qty > 10
55	            model.addGreaterThan(sumXY, 10);

70	        }

72	        // rule4: if(x.qty > 5 and y.qty > 5) then z.qty < 10

90	            model.addBoolOr(new Literal[] { xGreaterThan5.not(), yGreaterThan5.not() })
91	                    .onlyEnforceIf(xAndYGreaterThan5.not());

97	    // 重写父类的方法
98	    protected void executeRuleMethod(Rule rule, IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, Method method) {
99	        if (isOneManyRule(rule)) {
100	            executeRuleMethod4OneManyRule(rule, moduleAlgFile, method);
101	        } else {
102	            super.executeRuleMethod(rule, moduleAlgFile, method);
103	        }
104	    }
105	
106	    private boolean isOneManyRule(Rule rule) {
107	        return rule.getLeftCardinality() == Cardinality.ONE && rule.getRightCardinality() == Cardinality.MANY;
108	    }
109	
110	    // 执行类似logicAB1(1-*)的用例
111	    private void executeRuleMethod4OneManyRule(Rule rule, IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, Method method) {
112	        String leftPartCategoryCode = rule.getLeftCategoryCode();
113	        String rightPartCategoryCode = rule.getRightCategoryCode();
114	        if (Strings.isEmpty(leftPartCategoryCode) || Strings.isEmpty(rightPartCategoryCode)) {
115	            log.error("leftPartCategoryCode or rightPartCategoryCode is null, cannot execute one many rule");
116	            throw new AlgLoaderException(
117	                    "leftPartCategoryCode or rightPartCategoryCode is null, cannot execute one many rule");
118	        }
119	        SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl leftPartCategoryAlgImpl = (SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl) getPartCategoryAlg(
120	                leftPartCategoryCode);
121	        PartCategoryAlgImpl rightPartCategoryAlgImpl = getPartCategoryAlg(
122	                rightPartCategoryCode);
123	        if (leftPartCategoryAlgImpl == null || rightPartCategoryAlgImpl == null) {
124	            log.error("leftPartCategoryAlgImpl or rightPartCategoryAlgImpl is null, cannot execute one many rule");
125	            throw new AlgLoaderException(
126	                    "leftPartCategoryAlgImpl or rightPartCategoryAlgImpl is null, cannot execute one many rule");
127	        }
128	        if (rightPartCategoryAlgImpl instanceof MultiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl) {
129	            MultiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl multiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl = (MultiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl) rightPartCategoryAlgImpl;
130	            for (SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl rightPartCategoryAlgImplItem : multiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl
131	                    .getPartCategoryInsts()) {
132	
133	                currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl = leftPartCategoryAlgImpl;
134	                currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl = rightPartCategoryAlgImplItem;
135	                currrentRulePostName = currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode() + "_"
136	                        + currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode() + ".I"
137	                        + currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl.getInstId();
138	                super.executeRuleMethod(rule, moduleAlgFile, method);
139	                currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl = null;
140	                currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl = null;
141	            }
142	        } else {
143	            currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl = leftPartCategoryAlgImpl;
144	            currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl = (SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl) rightPartCategoryAlgImpl;
145	            currrentRulePostName = currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode() + "_"
146	                    + currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode() + ".I"
147	                    + currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl.getInstId();
148	            super.executeRuleMethod(rule, moduleAlgFile, method);
149	            currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl = null;
150	            currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl = null;
151	        }
152	
153	    }

168	            for (ParaInst paraInst : req.getPreParaInsts()) {
169	                this.addParaEquality(paraInst.getCode(), paraInst.getValue());
170	            }
171	        }

173	            for (PartInst partInst : req.getPrePartInsts()) {
174	                this.addPartEquality(partInst.getCode(), partInst.getQuantity());
175	            }
176	        }
177	
178	        // 分类的input初始化

180	        for (PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl : this.getPartCategoryAlgs()) {
181	            partCategoryAlgImpl.initInput(this);
182	        }

184	    }

196	    private void preCalculate() {
197	        log.info("preCalculate: module={}", getModule().getCode());
198	        // 暂时支持模块级前置计算，主要是对控制变量进行初始化

205	    protected void initData(AlgCPModel model, IModule module,
206	            ModuleInput moduleInput,
207	            IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile) {
208	        // 调用基类初始化
209	        super.initData(model, module, moduleInput, this);
210	
211	        // 按partCategoryCode对partCategoryInputs进行分组
212	        Map<String, PartCategoryInputBase> partConstraintFromReqMap = new LinkedHashMap<>();
213	        for (PartCategoryInputBase partCategoryInput : moduleInput.getPartCategoryInputs()) {
214	            partConstraintFromReqMap.put(partCategoryInput.getPartCategoryCode(), partCategoryInput);
215	        }
216	
217	        // 如果module有PartCategorys，则对每个PartCategory创建并初始化PartCategoryAlgImpl
218	        if (module instanceof Module) {
219	            Module bModule = (Module) module;
220	            for (PartCategory partCategory : bModule.getPartCategorys()) {
221	                String categoryCode = partCategory.getCode();
222	                PartCategoryInputBase pc4partCategoryInput = partConstraintFromReqMap
223	                        .get(categoryCode);
224	                ModuleBaseAlgImpl pcAlg = null;
225	                if (pc4partCategoryInput == null) {
226	                    // No constraint for this PartCategory, create a default input
227	                    PartCategoryInput defaultInput = new PartCategoryInput();
228	                    defaultInput.setFilteredCategory(partCategory);
229	                    pc4partCategoryInput = defaultInput;
230	                }
231	                if (partCategory.isSupportMultiInst() && pc4partCategoryInput instanceof MultiInstPartCategoryInput) {
232	                    pcAlg = new MultiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl();
233	                    MultiInstPartCategoryInput multiInstPartCategoryInput = (MultiInstPartCategoryInput) pc4partCategoryInput;
234	                    pcAlg.initData(model, (IModule) multiInstPartCategoryInput, pc4partCategoryInput, this);
235	                } else {
236	                    pcAlg = new SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl();
237	                    pcAlg.initData(model, (IModule) partCategory, pc4partCategoryInput, this);
238	                }
239	                partCategoryAlgs.put(categoryCode, (PartCategoryAlgImpl) pcAlg);
240	            }
241	        }
242	        log.info("ModuleAlgImpl initialized with {} partCategory algorithms", partCategoryAlgs.size());
243	    }
244	
245	    protected void initRules(IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, CalcStage calcStage) {
246	        Map<String, Method> allRuleMethods = buildAllRuleMethods(module, this);
247	        // 先本身这个模块的前置算法
248	
249	        // 先构建本模块的优先类规则
250	        buildPriorityConstraint(module);
251	
252	        // 如果module有PartCategorys，则对每个PartCategory创建并初始化PartCategoryAlgImpl
253	        for (PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl : this.getPartCategoryAlgs()) {
254	            partCategoryAlgImpl.initRules(allRuleMethods, moduleAlgFile, calcStage);
255	        }
256	
257	        // 执行本身这个模块的后置算法
258	        this.initRules(allRuleMethods, moduleAlgFile, calcStage);
259	    }

270	    private Map<String, PriorityConstraint> getAllPriorityConstraintMap() {
271	        // ruleCode -> PriorityConstraint

273	        if (getPriorityConstraint() != null) {
274	            priorityConstraints.put(getPriorityConstraint().getRule().getCode(), getPriorityConstraint());
275	        }
276	        for (PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl : getPartCategoryAlgs()) {
277	            PriorityConstraint priorityConstraint = ((ModuleBaseAlgImpl) partCategoryAlgImpl).getPriorityConstraint();
278	            if (priorityConstraint != null) {
279	                priorityConstraints.put(

281	            }
282	        }
283	        return priorityConstraints;
284	    }

286	    /**

288	     *
289	     * @return exr
290	     */
291	    public PartAlgCPLinearExpr queryMergerPriorityConstraintExpr() {
292	        PartAlgCPLinearExpr mergedExpr = model.newPartLinearExpr("merged_priority_expr");
293	        for (PriorityConstraint pc : getAllPriorityConstraintMap().values()) {
294	            Rule rule = pc.getRule();
295	            PriorityRuleSchema schema = (PriorityRuleSchema) rule.getRawCode();
296	            PriorityStrategy strategy = schema.getPriorityStrategy();
297	            // int weight = schema.getWeight();
298	            int coff = strategy == PriorityStrategy.MAX ? -1 : 1;
299	            mergedExpr.addExpr(pc.getExpr(), coff);
300	        }
301	        return mergedExpr;
302	    }

310	    public void updatePriorityObjectFuntion(String ruleCode, PartAlgCPLinearExpr expr) {
311	        if (ruleCode == null || ruleCode.isEmpty()) {
312	            log.warn("ruleCode is null or empty, skip updating priority objective");
313	            return;
314	        }

318	            throw new AlgLoaderException("PriorityConstraint not found for ruleCode: " + ruleCode);
319	        }
320	        pConstraint.setExpr(expr);

322	                expr != null ? expr.toString() : "null");
323	    }

398	    /**
399	     * 添加不兼容性约束（部件级别）
400	     * 
401	     * @param ruleCode          规则代码
402	     * @param leftPartsExprStr  左侧部件表达式字符串，格式如 "fatherCode=cpu:CoreNum=4"
403	     * @param rightPartsExprStr 右侧部件表达式字符串
404	     */
405	    public void inCompatible(String ruleCode, String leftPartsExprStr, String rightPartsExprStr) {
406	        PartsExpr left = filterPartExpr(leftPartsExprStr, true);
407	        PartsExpr right = filterPartExpr(rightPartsExprStr, false);
408	
409	        if (left.isEmpty4FilterPars() || right.isEmpty4FilterPars()) {
410	            log.info("Skip inCompatible constraint: {} - left or right filter is empty", ruleCode);
411	            return;
412	        }
413	
414	        compatibleConstraintAlg.addCompatibleConstraintInCompatible(ruleCode + currrentRulePostName, left, right);
415	    }
416	
417	    private PartsExpr filterPartExpr(String partExprStr, boolean isLeft) {
418	        if (partExprStr == null || partExprStr.isEmpty()) {
419	            // 打日志，抛异常
420	            log.error("partExprStr is null or empty, cannot filter part expr");
421	            throw new AlgLoaderException("partExprStr is null or empty, cannot filter part expr");
422	        }
423	        PartsExpr partsExpr = new PartsExpr();
424	        // 解析partCategoryCode和filterConditionStr
425	        String partCategoryCode = "";
426	        String filterConditionStr = "";
427	
428	        int colonIndex = partExprStr.indexOf(':');
429	        if (colonIndex > 0) {
430	            partCategoryCode = partExprStr.substring(0, colonIndex);
431	            filterConditionStr = partExprStr.substring(colonIndex + 1);
432	        } else {
433	            // 打日志，抛异常
434	            log.error("partExprStr is invalid, cannot filter part expr");
435	            throw new AlgLoaderException("partExprStr is invalid, cannot filter part expr");
436	        }
437	
438	        partsExpr.setFilterConditionStr(filterConditionStr);
439	
440	        PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl = isLeft ? currentLeftPartCategoryAlgImpl
441	                : currentRightPartCategoryAlgImpl;
442	        if (partCategoryAlgImpl == null) {
443	            // 兼容以前的
444	            partCategoryAlgImpl = this.getPartCategoryAlg(partCategoryCode);
445	        } else {
446	            if (!partCategoryAlgImpl.getCategoryCode().equals(partCategoryCode)) {
447	                // 打日志，抛异常
448	                log.warn("partCategoryAlgImpl is invalid, cannot filter part expr");
449	                throw new AlgLoaderException("partCategoryAlgImpl is invalid, cannot filter part expr");
450	            }
451	        }
452	
453	        if (partCategoryAlgImpl == null) {
454	            // 打日志，抛异常
455	            log.warn("partCategoryAlgImpl is invalid, cannot filter part expr");
456	            return partsExpr;
457	        }
458	        // 转换为PartVar
459	        partsExpr.setPartVars(partCategoryAlgImpl.getAllPartVars(""));
460	        Pair<List<PartVar>, List<PartVar>> partVars = partCategoryAlgImpl.filterAllPartVars(filterConditionStr);
461	        partsExpr.setFilterPartVars(partVars.getFirst());
462	        partsExpr.setNoFilterPartVars(partVars.getSecond());
463	        return partsExpr;
464	    }

592	    /**

594	     *

596	     * @param cofAttrCode          属性代码
597	     * @param filtedConditionStr   过滤条件字符串
598	     * @return 求和后的AlgCPLinearExpr表达式
599	     */
600	    public PartAlgCPLinearExpr sum4Selected(String partCategoryCodesStr, String cofAttrCode,
601	            String filtedConditionStr) {

603	            return sum4Selected(cofAttrCode, filtedConditionStr);
604	        }

609	                filtedConditionStr);

614	     *

616	     * @param cofAttrCode          属性代码

618	     * @return 求和后的AlgCPLinearExpr表达式
619	     */
620	    public PartAlgCPLinearExpr sum4Quantity(String partCategoryCodesStr, String cofAttrCode,
621	            String filtedConditionStr) {
622	        if (Strings.isEmpty(partCategoryCodesStr)) {
623	            return sum4Quantity(cofAttrCode, filtedConditionStr);
624	        }
625	        List<PartCategoryAlgImpl> partCategoryAlgImpls = toPartCategoryAlgImpls(partCategoryCodesStr);
626	        return buildSumExpr(partCategoryAlgImpls, cofAttrCode, PartVar.QTY_SHORT_NAME, PartVar::getQty,
627	                filtedConditionStr);

630	    private List<PartCategoryAlgImpl> toPartCategoryAlgImpls(String partCategoryCodesStr) {
631	        List<PartCategoryAlgImpl> partCategoryAlgImpls = new ArrayList<>();
632	        if (partCategoryCodesStr.isEmpty()) {
633	            return partCategoryAlgImpls;
634	        }
635	        if (partCategoryCodesStr.contains("*")) {
636	            String partCategoryCodePrefix = partCategoryCodesStr.replace("*", "");
637	            partCategoryAlgImpls.addAll(getPartCategoryAlgByInstPrefix(partCategoryCodePrefix));
638	            return partCategoryAlgImpls;
639	        }
640	        String[] categoryCodes = partCategoryCodesStr.split(",");
641	        for (String categoryCode : categoryCodes) {
642	            partCategoryAlgImpls.add(getPartCategoryAlg(categoryCode));
643	        }
644	        return partCategoryAlgImpls;
645	    }

693	    public void addControlParaEqual(String sumParaCode, String instSumParaCode) {
694	        // 动态表达式 addParaEqual("driveSumQuantity", "drive:SumQuantity");
695	        ParaVar sumParaVar = this.getParaVar(sumParaCode);
696	        if (sumParaVar == null) {
697	            // 打日志，抛异常
698	            log.error("ParaVar not found for code: {}", sumParaCode);
699	            throw new AlgLoaderException("ParaVar not found for code: " + sumParaCode);
700	        }
701	        // instSumParaCode,如："drive:SumQuantity", 解析出drive，SumQuantity
702	        String[] parts = instSumParaCode.split(":");
703	        if (parts.length != 2) {
704	            // 打日志，抛异常
705	            log.error("instSumParaCode is invalid: {}", instSumParaCode);
706	            throw new AlgLoaderException("instSumParaCode is invalid: " + instSumParaCode);
707	        }
708	
709	        String partCategoryCodePrefix = parts[0].trim();
710	        String sumQuantityCode = parts[1].trim();
711	        // expr=sumParaVar.value + sumParaVar.value + ...
712	        List<PartCategoryAlgImpl> partCategoryAlgImpls = this.getPartCategoryAlgByInstPrefix(partCategoryCodePrefix);
713	        if (partCategoryAlgImpls.isEmpty()) {
714	            // 打日志，抛异常
715	            log.warn("PartCategoryAlgImpl not found for code: {}", partCategoryCodePrefix);
716	            sumParaVar.setHasInputed(false);
717	        } else {
718	            Integer sumInputValue = 0;
719	            boolean hasInput = false;
720	            for (PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlgImpl : partCategoryAlgImpls) {
721	                ParaVar instParaVar = partCategoryAlgImpl.getParaVar(sumQuantityCode);
722	                if (instParaVar == null || instParaVar.getInputValue() == null) {
723	                    // 打日志，抛异常
724	                    log.error("ParaVar not found for code: {}", sumQuantityCode);
725	                    // 暂时不抛异常 throw new AlgLoaderException("ParaVar not found for code: " +
726	                    // sumQuantityCode);
727	                    // issue:是不是总有一个控制参数是有输入的，方便执行（对结果进行校验）
728	                    continue;
729	                }
730	                // paraSumExpr.addTerm(instParaVar.getInputValue(), 1);
731	                sumInputValue += instParaVar.getInputValue();
732	                hasInput = true;
733	            }
734	            if (hasInput) {
735	                // 构建等式
736	                sumParaVar.setHasInputed(true);
737	                sumParaVar.setInputValue(sumInputValue);
738	
739	            } else {
740	                sumParaVar.setHasInputed(false);
741	            }
742	
743	        }
744	
745	    }
746	
747	    /**
748	     * Apply decision strategies to part category variables.
749	     * Called after all variables are created and before rule initialization.
750	     */
751	    private void applyDecisionStrategies() {
752	        ModuleInput mi = getModuleInput();
753	        if (mi == null || mi.getPartCategoryInputs() == null) {
754	            return;
755	        }
756	        for (PartCategoryInputBase input : mi.getPartCategoryInputs()) {
757	            PartConstraintReq orgReq = input.getOrgReq();
758	            if (orgReq == null) {
759	                continue;
760	            }
761	            List<StrategyConfig> strategies = orgReq.getDecisionStrategies();
762	            if (strategies == null || strategies.isEmpty()) {
763	                continue;
764	            }
765	
766	            String partCategoryCode = input.getPartCategoryCode();
767	
768	            if (input instanceof MultiInstPartCategoryInput) {
769	                MultiInstPartCategoryInput multiInput = (MultiInstPartCategoryInput) input;
770	                for (PartCategoryInput pcInput : multiInput.getPartCategoryInputs()) {
771	                    PartCategoryAlgImpl pcAlg = getPartCategoryAlg(pcInput.getPartCategoryCode());
772	                    if (pcAlg != null) {
773	                        applyStrategies(pcAlg, strategies);
774	                    }
775	                }
776	            } else {
777	                PartCategoryAlgImpl pcAlg = getPartCategoryAlg(partCategoryCode);
778	                if (pcAlg != null) {
779	                    applyStrategies(pcAlg, strategies);
780	                }
781	            }
782	        }
783	    }
784	
785	    private void applyStrategies(PartCategoryAlgImpl pcAlg, List<StrategyConfig> strategies) {
786	        for (StrategyConfig config : strategies) {
787	            if (config.getStrategyType() == null || config.getStrategyType() == StrategyType.UNSPECIFIED) {
788	                continue;
789	            }
790	            if (config.getSortAttributeCode() == null || config.getSortAttributeCode().isEmpty()) {
791	                log.warn("Strategy has no sortAttributeCode, skipping");
792	                continue;
793	            }
794	            applySingleStrategy(pcAlg, config);
795	        }
796	    }
797	
798	    private void applySingleStrategy(PartCategoryAlgImpl pcAlg, StrategyConfig config) {
799	        List<PartVar> partVars = pcAlg.getAllPartVars("");
800	        if (partVars.isEmpty()) {
801	            log.warn("No part vars found for category {}, skipping strategy", pcAlg.getCategoryCode());
802	            return;
803	        }
804	
805	        String sortAttr = config.getSortAttributeCode();
806	        boolean ascending = config.getStrategyType() == StrategyType.ASCENDING;
807	
808	        // Sort part vars by the sort attribute
809	        partVars.sort(Comparator.comparingInt(pv -> getSortValue(pv, sortAttr)));
810	
811	        // Reverse for descending
812	        if (!ascending) {
813	            java.util.Collections.reverse(partVars);
814	        }
815	
816	        // Get isSelected BoolVars (which are IntVars) in sorted order
817	        IntVar[] vars = partVars.stream()
818	                .map(PartVar::getIsSelected)
819	                .toArray(IntVar[]::new);
820	
821	        // SELECT_MAX_VALUE: try selecting parts first, which means preferred parts
822	        // (sorted first) get selected in early solutions
823	        model.addDecisionStrategy(vars,
824	                DecisionStrategyProto.VariableSelectionStrategy.CHOOSE_FIRST,
825	                DecisionStrategyProto.DomainReductionStrategy.SELECT_MAX_VALUE);
826	
827	        log.info("Applied decision strategy: {} on {} vars for category {}, sortAttr={}",
828	                config.getStrategyType(), vars.length, pcAlg.getCategoryCode(), sortAttr);
829	    }
830	
831	    /**
832	     * Get the integer sort value for a part variable by attribute code.
833	     * Supports basic attributes like "price" and dynamic attributes.
834	     */
835	    private int getSortValue(PartVar partVar, String attrCode) {
836	        if ("price".equals(attrCode) && partVar.getBase() instanceof Part) {
837	            Long price = ((Part) partVar.getBase()).getPrice();
838	            return price != null ? price.intValue() : 0;
839	        }
840	        return partVar.getAttr4Int(attrCode);
841	    }
842	}

```text
1	# RFC-0002: 冲突诊断与松弛可行解
2	
3	> 状态: 草案（Draft）
4	> 日期: 2026-04-30
5	> 相关文档: `doc/CORE-DESIGN.md`, `doc/ACCEPTANCE.md`
6	
7	---
8	
9	## 设计决议摘要
10	
11	本 RFC 采用以下设计决议:
12	
13	| 主题 | 决议 |
14	| --- | --- |
15	| 输入开关 | 在 `InferParasReq` 增加请求级 `relaxSolve`, 默认 `false` |
16	| 配置兼容 | `ConstraintConfig.debugByRelaxVar` 仅作为过渡兼容或默认值来源 |
17	| 输出载体 | 对外统一返回 `SolverResult`, 在其上扩展冲突诊断字段 |
18	| 解释内容 | 必须说明原始无解原因、为得到部分解而放宽的约束、部分解 |
19	| 测试 API | 扩展 `ResultAssert` / `ModuleScenarioTestBase`, 提供冲突诊断专用断言 |
20	| 命名规范 | 新文档和新增 API 使用 `conflict`, 既有 `confict` 拼写作为技术债保留 |
21	
22	## 摘要
23	
24	本 RFC 提议完善 JMix Config Engine 的无解诊断能力: 当用户输入条件与业务规则共同导致模型无解时, 调用方可以在本次请求中显式开启“松弛求解”。引擎在开启后自动使用松弛变量重建模型, 最小化被放松的约束, 找出导致无解的规则集合, 并返回一个在放松这些规则后可行的配置解。
25	
26	该能力的用户价值有两层:
27	
28	- 告诉用户哪些输入或规则组合造成了无解, 例如 `ruleA` 与 `ruleB` 冲突。
29	- 在错误/无解返回中给出一个部分解, 让用户知道如果调整或放宽冲突约束, 当前配置可以怎样满足其余条件。
30	
31	现有代码已经包含松弛变量相关实现, 主要分布在 `ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl`, `ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl`, `AlgCPModel`, `AlgCPConstraint`, `RelaxVar`, `ModuleBaseAlgImpl.addRelaxObjectFunction()` 中。但由于后续功能演进, 该链路需要基于当前代码重新调通, 并补充回归测试。
32	
33	## 动机
34	
35	产品配置场景中, 用户经常先给出一组输入条件, 再由求解器补全剩余配置。若所有硬约束共同导致无解, 只返回“无可行解”对用户帮助有限。用户更需要知道:
36	
37	- 哪些规则或输入条件导致无解。
38	- 是否存在一组“最小放松”的约束, 使模型重新变成可行。
39	- 放松后的可行解是什么, 以便业务界面给出解释或推荐调整方案。
40	
41	当前项目核心设计已经把“冲突诊断”作为核心能力之一, 设计流程为: 为规则附加松弛变量, 最小化违反规则, 识别冲突规则, 报告冲突。本 RFC 将这条设计落成明确的行为契约、实现边界和测试要求。
42	
43	## 术语
44	
45	| 术语 | 含义 |
46	| --- | --- |
47	| 原始模型 | 按用户输入和全部业务规则构建的 CP-SAT 模型 |
48	| 松弛模型 | 为可诊断约束附加松弛变量后的 CP-SAT 模型 |
49	| 松弛变量 | 布尔变量, 用于控制某条规则是否暂时放松 |
50	| 冲突规则 | 在最小松弛目标下取值为“被放松”的规则 |
51	| 部分解 | 严格求解无解后, 系统内部放宽部分约束得到的候选配置。它不是正常解 |
52	| 请求级松弛开关 | 本次推理请求是否允许进入松弛诊断流程, 默认 false |
53	| 冲突诊断结果 | `SolverResult` 中的结构化说明, 包含诊断约束列表、解释文本和求解状态 |
54	| 系统规则 | 引擎自动生成的约束, 如输入条件、默认可见性、部件数量关系 |
55	| 自定义规则 | 业务规则方法或规则 Schema 生成的约束 |
56	
57	## Guide-level 说明
58	
59	### 用户视角
60	
61	松弛诊断应从“全局配置能力”升级为“请求级能力”。当前实现依赖 `ConstraintConfig.debugByRelaxVar`, 这会让所有请求共享同一个诊断开关, 不利于业务按场景控制成本和输出语义。RFC 要求最终是否执行松弛诊断, 应优先由 `InferParasReq` 中的请求字段决定。
62	
63	建议新增:
64	
65	```java
66	public class InferParasReq {
67	    /**
68	     * 是否允许本次请求在原始模型无解时执行松弛诊断。
69	     * 默认 false, 避免普通推理请求产生额外求解成本。
70	     */
71	    private boolean relaxSolve = false;
72	}
73	```
74	
75	行为:
76	
77	| 请求字段 | 全局配置 | 原始模型结果 | 返回行为 |
78	| --- | --- | --- | --- |
79	| `relaxSolve=false` | 任意 | 有解 | `SUCCESS`, 返回正常解 |
80	| `relaxSolve=false` | 任意 | 无解 | `NO_SOLUTION`, 不执行松弛诊断 |
81	| `relaxSolve=true` | 任意 | 有解 | `SUCCESS`, 返回正常解 |
82	| `relaxSolve=true` | 任意 | 无解 | 执行内部松弛诊断, 返回错误/无解结果, 其中包含冲突诊断和部分解 |
83	
84	兼容策略:
85	
86	- 第一阶段允许 `ConstraintConfig.debugByRelaxVar=true` 继续触发旧行为。
87	- 新代码和新测试优先使用 `InferParasReq.relaxSolve=true`。
88	- 后续可将全局配置降级为默认值或废弃项。
89	- 如果请求显式设置 `relaxSolve=false`, 则不进入松弛诊断, 即使全局配置为 true。若 Java boolean 无法区分“未设置”和“显式 false”, 可在后续改为 `Boolean relaxSolve` 或增加内部解析状态。
90	
91	当请求开启 `relaxSolve=true` 时:
92	
93	1. 引擎先运行原始模型。
94	2. 如果原始模型有可行解, 直接返回成功结果。
95	3. 如果原始模型被证明无解, 引擎进入冲突诊断流程。
96	4. 引擎构建松弛模型, 给可诊断规则附加松弛变量。
97	5. 引擎最小化被放松约束的总权重。
98	6. 引擎返回 `NO_SOLUTION`, data 中仍为 `SolverResult`: `solutions` 放部分解, `message` 和诊断字段说明这些解不是严格合法解。
99	
100	示例:
101	
102	```text
103	输入:
104	  x.qty + y.qty < 20
105	  x.qty - y.qty > 10
106	  y.qty > 45
107	
108	原始模型:
109	  无解
110	
111	返回:
112	  code = NO_SOLUTION
113	  message = "原始模型无解: rule1/rule2 与 rule3 冲突; 系统放宽 rule3 后给出部分解"
114	  data = {
115	    strictFeasible: false,
116	    originalSolverStatus: "INFEASIBLE",
117	    solverStatus: "FEASIBLE",
118	    diagnosticConstraints: ["rule3"],
119	    solutions: [...]
120	  }
121	```
122	
123	### 结果语义
124	
125	成功返回和冲突诊断返回必须分开理解:
126	
127	- `SUCCESS`: data 是 `SolverResult`, 其中 `solutions` 是严格满足原始模型的正常解。
128	- `NO_SOLUTION + SolverResult`: 原始模型无解。data 仍是 `SolverResult`, 其中 `solutions` 是系统内部放宽部分约束后得到的部分解, 只能用于解释和推荐调整, 不能当成合法配置。
129	
130	### 解释语义
131	
132	返回解释应至少包含:
133	
134	- 原始模型为什么无解: 哪些规则、输入或系统约束发生冲突。
135	- 为了给出部分解, 系统内部放宽了哪些约束。
136	- 部分解是什么。
137	- 可选: 每条冲突规则的自然语言描述、权重、约束表达式摘要。
138	
139	第一阶段必须保证 `Result.message` 可读, 并通过强类型响应对象返回结构化诊断信息。这样业务侧既可以直接展示摘要, 也可以读取明确字段渲染更友好的解释, 不需要依赖字符串解析或 `Map<String, Object>`。
140	
141	## Reference-level 设计
142	
143	### 整体流程
144	
145	```text
146	inferParas(req)
147	  |
148	  |-- build original model
149	  |-- solve original model
150	  |
151	  |-- if FEASIBLE/OPTIMAL:
152	  |     return SUCCESS(solutions)
153	  |
154	  |-- if INFEASIBLE and relaxSolve=false:
155	  |     return NO_SOLUTION(no relaxed solution)
156	  |
157	  |-- if INFEASIBLE and relaxSolve=true:
158	        |
159	        |-- build relaxed model
160	        |-- attach relax variables to diagnosable constraints
161	        |-- minimize weighted relax variables
162	        |-- solve relaxed model
163	        |-- collect relax variables with value = true
164	        |-- build ConflictDiagnosis
165	        |-- return NO_SOLUTION(message, SolverResult with partial solutions and diagnostic constraints)
166	```
167	
168	### 输入接口设计
169	
170	新增请求字段:
171	
172	```java
173	public class InferParasReq {
174	    private boolean relaxSolve = false;
175	}
176	```
177	
178	字段语义:
179	
180	- `false`: 默认值。原始模型无解时直接返回无解, 不做松弛诊断。
181	- `true`: 原始模型无解时自动进入松弛诊断流程。
182	
183	命名备选:
184	
185	| 字段名 | 说明 | 建议 |
186	| --- | --- | --- |
187	| `relaxSolve` | 简短, 表达“允许松弛求解” | 推荐 |
188	| `enableRelaxSolve` | 更像配置开关 | 可选 |
189	| `debugByRelaxVar` | 与现有配置一致, 但偏调试语义 | 不建议作为请求字段 |
190	| `diagnoseConflict` | 强调诊断, 但不体现松弛可行解 | 可选 |
191	
192	请求级开关优先级:
193	
194	```text
195	effectiveRelaxSolve = req.relaxSolve
196	```
197	
198	如果需要保留旧配置兼容, 可在过渡期使用以下解析规则:
199	
200	```text
201	if req.relaxSolve is explicitly set:
202	    effectiveRelaxSolve = req.relaxSolve
203	else:
204	    effectiveRelaxSolve = config.debugByRelaxVar
205	```
206	
207	由于当前 `InferParasReq.relaxSolve` 设计为 primitive boolean 时无法区分“未设置”和“显式 false”, 第一阶段可接受:
208	
209	```text
210	effectiveRelaxSolve = req.relaxSolve || config.debugByRelaxVar
211	```
212	
213	但更推荐将字段定义为 `Boolean relaxSolve`, 并在读取时默认成 `false`。新测试应显式设置 `req.setRelaxSolve(true)`。
214	
215	### 输出接口设计
216	
217	输出需要同时服务两类调用方:
218	
219	- 简单调用方: 直接读取 `message` 展示给用户。
220	- 复杂调用方: 读取 `SolverResult` 上的诊断字段构造结构化 UI, 展示被放宽约束和部分解。
221	
222	废弃方案:
223	
224	```java
225	// 不采用
226	result.getExtAttrs().put("conflictDiagnosis", diagnosis);
227	```
228	
229	不建议使用 `extAttrs["conflictDiagnosis"]`, 原因是:
230	
231	- `extAttrs` 是弱类型 Map, 外部调用方需要自行转换, 易产生运行时错误。
232	- 字段契约不明显, IDE 和编译器无法帮助发现破坏性变更。
233	- 诊断结果是本功能的一等输出, 应该进入 `SolverResult`。
234	
235	建议基于现有 `SolverResult` 扩展, 不新增 `InferParasRsp` 或独立的 `ConflictDiagnosisResult`:
236	
237	```java
238	public class SolverResult {
239	    private List<ModuleInst> solutions;
240	    private String solverStatus;
241	    private String message;
242	    private Double objectiveValue;
243	    private boolean hasSearchMax;
244	    private int searchMax;
245	    private int iterationTimes;
246	
247	    /** true 表示 solutions 严格满足原始模型; false 表示部分解或无严格解 */
248	    private boolean strictFeasible = true;
249	
250	    /** 原始模型求解状态, 诊断场景通常为 INFEASIBLE */
251	    private String originalSolverStatus;
252	
253	    /** 为给出部分解而被系统内部放宽的约束 */
254	    private List<DiagnosticConstraint> diagnosticConstraints;
255	}
256	
257	public class DiagnosticConstraint {
258	    /** 约束编码, 如 rule3、input_para_size_small */
259	    private String code;
260	
261	    /** 约束类型: RULE / INPUT / SYSTEM */
262	    private String constraintType;
263	
264	    /** 人类可读描述, 优先来自 Rule.normalNaturalCode */
265	    private String naturalCode;
266	
267	    /** 来源对象, 如 Module / PartCategory / Para / Part */
268	    private String source;
269	
270	    /** 诊断权重。用于解释优先级, 不暴露松弛变量名 */
271	    private int weight;
272	
273	    /** 用户可读说明 */
274	    private String description;
275	}
276	```
277	
278	统一接口:
279	
280	```java
281	Result<SolverResult> inferParas(InferParasReq req);
282	```
283	
284	返回规则:
285	
286	```text
287	SUCCESS:
288	  Result.code = SUCCESS
289	  Result.data.strictFeasible = true
290	  Result.data.solutions = 正常解 List<ModuleInst>
291	  Result.data.diagnosticConstraints = []
292	
293	NO_SOLUTION 且 relaxSolve=false:
294	  Result.code = NO_SOLUTION
295	  Result.data.strictFeasible = false
296	  Result.data.solutions = []
297	  Result.data.diagnosticConstraints = []
298	
299	NO_SOLUTION 且 relaxSolve=true 且内部放宽后得到部分解:
300	  Result.code = NO_SOLUTION
301	  Result.data.strictFeasible = false
302	  Result.data.originalSolverStatus = INFEASIBLE
303	  Result.data.solverStatus = FEASIBLE 或 OPTIMAL
304	  Result.data.solutions = 部分解 List<ModuleInst>
305	  Result.data.diagnosticConstraints = 被放宽的约束列表
306	
307	FAILED:
308	  Result.code = FAILED
309	  Result.data 可包含 SolverResult, 但 solutions 为空
310	```
311	
312	若需要兼容现有 `Result<List<ModuleInst>>` 签名, 可先新增 `inferParasV2(InferParasReq req): Result<SolverResult>`, 但最终对外推荐统一为 `Result<SolverResult>`。
313	
314	当 `relaxSolve=false` 且原始模型无解时:
315	
316	```text
317	code = NO_SOLUTION
318	message = "no solution"
319	data.solutions = []
320	data.diagnosticConstraints = []
321	```
322	
323	当 `relaxSolve=true` 且内部放宽后得到部分解时:
324	
325	```text
326	code = NO_SOLUTION
327	message = solverResult.message
328	data.strictFeasible = false
329	data.solutions = 部分解列表
330	data.diagnosticConstraints = diagnosticConstraints
331	```
332	
333	当 `relaxSolve=true` 但松弛模型仍无解时:
334	
335	```text
336	code = FAILED 或 NO_SOLUTION
337	message = "relaxed model is still infeasible"
338	data.solutions = []
339	data.diagnosticConstraints 可包含已尝试放宽的约束, 但不代表已有部分解
340	```
341	
342	### 松弛变量建模
343	
344	现有 `AlgCPConstraint` 中的关键语义为:
345	
346	```java
347	if (relaxationVar != null && cpConstraint != null) {
348	    cpConstraint.onlyEnforceIf(relaxationVar.not());
349	}
350	```
351	
352	因此约束含义为:
353	
354	- `relaxVar = false`: 约束生效。
355	- `relaxVar = true`: 约束被放松。
356	
357	目标函数由 `ModuleBaseAlgImpl.addRelaxObjectFunction()` 添加:
358	
359	```java
360	minimize(sum(relaxVar[i] * weight[i]))
361	```
362	
363	这会让求解器优先放松数量少、权重低的规则。当前权重建议:
364	
365	| 规则类型 | 权重 | 意图 |
366	| --- | --- | --- |
367	| 系统规则 | `WEIGHT_SMALL` | 输入/系统约束可作为诊断对象, 但需明确是否允许放松 |
368	| 自定义规则 | `WEIGHT_MEDIUM` | 默认业务规则权重 |
369	| 已识别冲突规则二次运行 | `+ WEIGHT_ADDER` | 鼓励二次运行找出更多候选冲突 |
370	
371	### 诊断范围
372	
373	本 RFC 建议第一阶段覆盖以下约束:
374	
375	- 通过 `executeRuleMethod()` 执行的自定义规则。
376	- `addPartEquality()` 与 `addParaEquality()` 生成的用户输入约束。
377	- `sumFunConstraint()` 生成的部件分类输入约束。
378	- 默认可见性约束, 前提是它已被统一打上系统规则标识。
379	
380	不在第一阶段覆盖:
381	
382	- 变量域本身, 如 `newIntVar(0, maxQty)` 的上下界。
383	- OR-Tools 内部推导约束。
384	- 未通过 `AlgCPModel` 包装层添加的原生 `CpModel` 约束。
385	
386	### 与现有架构的关系
387	
388	本功能沿用核心设计中的对称分层:
389	
390	| 层级 | 职责 |
391	| --- | --- |
392	| Executor | 读取请求级松弛开关, 判断原始求解结果, 触发松弛诊断, 组装返回结果 |
393	| Algorithm | 在规则执行前设置当前松弛变量, 在模型完成后添加松弛目标函数 |
394	| Model Wrapper | 对 OR-Tools 约束附加 `onlyEnforceIf(relaxVar.not())`, 记录规则与变量映射 |
395	| Result Model | 承载严格无解状态、冲突消息和松弛可行解 |
396	
397	Executor 层当前存在两条路径:
398	
399	| 路径 | 触发条件 | 核心类 | 当前诊断状态 |
400	| --- | --- | --- | --- |
401	| 旧参数推理路径 | `InferParasReq.partConstraintReqs` 为空 | `ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.inferParasOld()` | 已有松弛诊断雏形 |
402	| 新部件约束路径 | `InferParasReq.partConstraintReqs` 非空 | `ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.processProduct()` -> `ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl` | 需要补齐诊断入口 |
403	
404	`ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl` 负责新路径和优先级求解的公共求解过程。它不是创建松弛变量的地方, 但它当前会创建 `AlgCPModel` 并调用 `ModuleAlgImpl.init()`。因此若请求级 `relaxSolve=true` 要覆盖 `PartConstraintReq` 场景, 该基类也必须支持:
405	
406	- 根据请求传入 `isAttachRelax=true`。
407	- 在原始模型无解时触发松弛诊断。
408	- 将诊断后的部分解、求解状态和 `diagnosticConstraints` 组装到统一的 `Result<SolverResult>`。
409	
410	### 返回模型
411	
412	推荐直接扩展现有 `SolverResult`, 作为本 RFC 的目标输出模型:
413	
414	```java
415	public class SolverResult {
416	    private List<ModuleInst> solutions;
417	    private String solverStatus;
418	    private String message;
419	    private Double objectiveValue;
420	    private boolean hasSearchMax;
421	    private int searchMax;
422	    private int iterationTimes;
423	
424	    /** true 表示 solutions 严格满足原始模型; false 表示部分解或无严格解 */
425	    private boolean strictFeasible = true;
426	
427	    /** 原始模型求解状态 */
428	    private String originalSolverStatus;
429	
430	    /** 无解诊断中被系统内部放宽的约束 */
431	    private List<DiagnosticConstraint> diagnosticConstraints;
432	}
433	
434	public class DiagnosticConstraint {
435	    /** 约束编码, 如 rule3、input_para_size_small */
436	    private String code;
437	
438	    /** 约束类型: RULE / INPUT / SYSTEM */
439	    private String constraintType;
440	
441	    /** 人类可读描述, 优先来自 Rule.normalNaturalCode */
442	    private String naturalCode;
443	
444	    /** 来源对象, 如 Module / PartCategory / Para / Part */
445	    private String source;
446	
447	    /** 诊断权重。用于解释优先级, 不暴露松弛变量名 */
448	    private int weight;
449	
450	    /** 用户可读说明 */
451	    private String description;
452	}
453	```
454	
455	不对外返回:
456	
457	- 松弛变量名称, 如 `relax_rule3`。这属于内部实现细节, 如需排查可写入系统日志。
458	- 单独的 `partialSolutions` 字段。部分解直接放在 `SolverResult.solutions`, 并由 `strictFeasible=false` 标识它不是严格正常解。
459	- `ConflictConstraint` 与 `RelaxedConstraint` 两套列表。对外只需要知道系统为了给出部分解放宽了哪些约束; 原始冲突分析细节可在日志中保留。
460	
461	示例说明:
462	
463	```text
464	explanation:
465	  原始模型无解: rule1、rule2 与 rule3 共同冲突。
466	  系统放宽 rule3 后给出 1 个部分解: x.qty=12, y.qty=1。
467	```
468	
469	输出约束:
470	
471	- `strictFeasible=true` 时, `solutions` 是严格满足原始模型的正常解。
472	- `strictFeasible=false && Result.code=NO_SOLUTION` 时, `solutions` 是部分解, 只能用于解释和推荐。
473	- `diagnosticConstraints` 描述为了得到部分解而被系统内部放宽的业务约束、输入约束或系统约束。
474	- `message` 必须包含“原始无解”和“放宽后给出部分解”的信息, 不能只输出 `conflict rules: ...`。
475	
476	### 需要调通的现有链路
477	
478	基于当前代码, 至少需要验证和修复以下路径:
479	
480	- `ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.inferParasOld()` 在 `INFEASIBLE && debugByRelaxVar` 下能进入诊断流程。
481	- `InferParasReq.relaxSolve` 能控制本次请求是否进入诊断流程, 默认不松弛。
482	- `ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl` 路径需要明确是否纳入本阶段; 如果纳入, 不能只依赖 `inferParasOld()`。
483	- `runCalcConfictRules()` 返回的松弛模型状态必须是 `OPTIMAL` 或 `FEASIBLE`; 若仍为 `INFEASIBLE`, 说明有不可松弛硬约束或模型构建遗漏。
484	- `calcConfictRules()` 中 `solver.booleanValue(relaxVar.getValue())` 能正确识别被放松规则。
485	- `SolverResult.solutions` 在成功时表示严格正常解, 在 `NO_SOLUTION && strictFeasible=false` 时表示松弛后得到的部分解。
486	- `SolverResult.diagnosticConstraints` 在无解诊断时能被测试框架和调用方读取。
487	- 带 `onlyEnforceIf()` 的条件约束在叠加松弛变量后语义正确。
488	- 新增的部件约束、优先级求解、决策策略、多实例分类不破坏诊断流程。
489	
490	### 技术债务
491	
492	代码库中已有一批历史命名使用 `confict` 而非 `conflict`, 包括:
493	
494	- 类名: `ConfictDebugTest`, `ConfictDebugIfThenTest`
495	- 方法名: `calcConfictRules`, `runCalcConfictRules`
496	- 变量名: `confictedRelaxs`
497	- 包名: `com.jmix.tool.confictdebug`
498	
499	RFC 概念和新增代码统一使用正确拼写 `conflict`。既有代码引用保留原名, 方便定位当前实现。统一重命名列为后续独立重构, 不阻塞本 RFC 的核心功能。
500	
501	## Drawbacks
502	
503	- 松弛变量会扩大模型规模, 诊断流程至少需要额外一次求解。
504	- “最小松弛”受权重影响, 结果不是唯一的逻辑最小冲突集。
505	- 如果某些约束未经过 `AlgCPModel` 包装, 它们不会被松弛, 可能导致诊断模型仍无解。
506	- `NO_SOLUTION` 携带部分解的语义容易被调用方误用, 需要强类型响应、文档和测试明确。
507	- 请求级 `relaxSolve=true` 会触发额外求解成本, 调用方需要按需开启。
508	
509	## Alternatives
510	
511	### 使用 CP-SAT assumptions/unsat core
512	
513	OR-Tools CP-SAT 支持基于 assumptions 的 unsat core 思路, 可直接分析不可满足核心。但当前 Java 封装和业务规则映射已经围绕 `RelaxVar` 建模, 且需求同时要求“松弛后可行解”。因此第一阶段继续使用松弛变量更贴合现有实现。
514	
515	### 逐条禁用规则重试
516	
517	可以通过逐条移除规则来定位冲突, 实现简单但复杂度高, 且难以同时处理多规则组合冲突。该方案不建议作为主路径。
518	
519	### 只返回冲突规则, 不返回可行解
520	
521	这能降低实现复杂度, 但无法满足“松弛之后当前部分满足的解释如下”的原始需求。因此不可作为最终方案。
522	
523	## 验收与测试要求
524	
525	测试用例遵循 `doc/ACCEPTANCE.md` 的原则: 数据极简, 每个用例只验证一个功能点, 覆盖正常路径、边界条件和异常路径, 验证通过后纳入回归测试。
526	
527	### CONFLICT-001: 基础线性规则冲突
528	
529	目的: 验证最简单的线性约束冲突可以定位到单条冲突规则, 并在错误/无解诊断中返回部分解。
530	
531	测试数据:
532	
533	```java
534	@PartAnno(maxQuantity = 50)
535	private PartVar x;
536	
537	@PartAnno(maxQuantity = 50)
538	private PartVar y;
539	
540	rule1: x.qty + y.qty < 20
541	rule2: x.qty - y.qty > 10
542	rule3: y.qty > 45
543	```
544	
545	用例:
546	
547	| ID | 配置 | 期望 |
548	| --- | --- | --- |
549	| CONFLICT-001-1 | `relaxSolve=false` | 原始模型无严格可行解, 不返回冲突诊断 |
550	| CONFLICT-001-2 | `relaxSolve=true` | 返回 `NO_SOLUTION`, `strictFeasible=false`, message 包含 `rule3`, `solutions` 至少包含 1 个部分解 |
551	| CONFLICT-001-3 | `relaxSolve=true` | `diagnosticConstraints` 包含 `rule3` |
552	
553	验收断言:
554	
555	- `resultAssert().assertNoSolution()`
556	- `assertMessageContains("rule3")`
557	- `assertStrictFeasible(false)`
558	- `assertPartialSolutionSizeGreaterThanOrEqual(1)`
559	- `assertDiagnosticConstraintsContains("rule3")`
560	- `solutions` 中的部分解满足 `rule1` 和 `rule2`, 不要求满足 `rule3`
561	
562	### CONFLICT-002: 多规则组合冲突
563	
564	目的: 验证当多个规则共同造成无解时, 可以返回一组冲突规则。
565	
566	测试数据:
567	
568	```text
569	rule31: y.qty > 48
570	rule32: y.qty > 45
571	rule51: y.qty < 10
572	rule52: y.qty < 15
573	```
574	
575	用例:
576	
577	| ID | 配置 | 期望 |
578	| --- | --- | --- |
579	| CONFLICT-002-1 | `relaxSolve=true` | 返回 `NO_SOLUTION`, message 至少包含高下界冲突中的一侧规则 |
580	
581	验收断言:
582	
583	- message 包含 `rule31` 或 `rule32`
584	- message 包含 `rule51` 或 `rule52`
585	- `strictFeasible=false`
586	- `solutions` 非空, 且这些解在该返回语义下只作为部分解使用
587	- 部分解中未被放宽的规则均满足
588	
589	### CONFLICT-003: 条件规则 If-Then 冲突
590	
591	目的: 验证带 `onlyEnforceIf()` 的条件约束在松弛变量叠加后仍可诊断。
592	
593	测试数据:
594	
595	```text
596	rule1: if x.qty > 10 then y.qty > 7
597	rule2: x.qty > 20
598	rule3: y.qty < 5
599	```
600	
601	期望:
602	
603	- 原始模型无解。
604	- 开启诊断后返回 `NO_SOLUTION`。
605	- 冲突规则包含 `rule1` 或与其直接冲突的 `rule2/rule3`。
606	- `strictFeasible=false`, `solutions` 非空。
607	
608	重点验证:
609	
610	- `AlgCPConstraint.onlyEnforceIf(condition)` 与松弛变量组合后不是覆盖关系。
611	- 条件规则被放松时, 整条业务规则都应被视为放松, 而不是只放松其中一条内部约束。
612	
613	### CONFLICT-004: 用户输入条件与业务规则冲突
614	
615	目的: 验证用户输入本身也能作为诊断对象。
616	
617	测试数据:
618	
619	```text
620	业务规则: p=color:red -> size=large
621	用户输入: p=color:red, size=small
622	```
623	
624	期望:
625	
626	- 原始模型无解。
627	- 开启诊断后返回 `NO_SOLUTION`。
628	- message 能指出是用户输入约束或相关业务规则冲突。
629	- `SolverResult.diagnosticConstraints` 能指出被放宽的输入约束或业务规则。
630	- `SolverResult.solutions` 中返回一组部分解, 且 `strictFeasible=false`。
631	
632	待确认点:
633	
634	- 输入约束是否允许被放松。
635	- 若允许放松, 输入约束在 message 中使用什么 code, 如 `input_para_size_small`。
636	
637	### CONFLICT-005: 部件分类输入约束冲突
638	
639	目的: 验证 `PartConstraintReq` 和 `sumFunConstraint()` 生成的约束能进入诊断。
640	
641	测试数据:
642

      confictedRelaxs.addAll(rcResult.getFirst());
      // Second run with previous conflict results
      rcResult = runCalcConfictRules(module, req, true, confictedRelaxs);
      confictedRelaxs.addAll(rcResult.getFirst());

  }

## 5. AlgCPModel

**File:** `d:\03.code4ccds\jmixconfigengine\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\impl\algmodel\AlgCPModel.java`

**Relax-related fields and methods:**

- `boolean isAttachRelax = false` (line 56)
- `Map<String, RelaxVar> relaxationVarMap` (line 61)
- `Map<String, RelaxVar> confictedRelaxVarMap` (line 66)
- `BoolVar currentRelaxVar` (line 71)
- `String currentRelaxVarName` (line 76)

**Methods:**
- `setCurrentRelaxVarName(String ruleCode, int weight)` (line 148): Private. Creates a `BoolVar` named `"relax_" + ruleCode` and a `RelaxVar` object. If `confictedRelaxVarMap` already contains this name, adds `WEIGHT_ADDER` to weight.
- `setRelax4SysRule(String ruleCode)` (line 174): Sets relax var with `WEIGHT_SMALL` (1).
- `setRelax4CustomRule(String ruleCode)` (line 183): Sets relax var with `WEIGHT_MEDIUM` (25).
- `getRelaxVarMap()` (line 192): Returns `relaxationVarMap`.
- `setConfictedRelaxVars(List<RelaxVar>)` (line 201): Clears and refills `confictedRelaxVarMap`.
- `setIsAttachRelax(boolean)` (line 213)
- `isIsAttachRelax()` (line 222)
- `attachRelax(Constraint ct, String funName)` (line 233): Private. Creates `AlgCPConstraint` with `currentRelaxVar` and `currentRelaxVarName`.

The relax mechanism works as follows: when `isAttachRelax=true`, `setRelax4SysRule`/`setRelax4CustomRule` are called before constraint creation, setting `currentRelaxVar`. Then `attachRelax` passes this to `AlgCPConstraint`, which calls `cpConstraint.onlyEnforceIf(relaxationVar.not())` -- so when relaxVar=true, the constraint is relaxed (not enforced).

---

## 6. AlgCPConstraint

**File:** `d:\03.code4ccds\jmixconfigengine\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\impl\algmodel\AlgCPConstraint.java`

**Fields (lines 22-78):**
- `Constraint cpConstraint` (line 22) -- the underlying OR-Tools constraint
- `Literal relaxationVar` (line 32) -- the BoolVar that controls whether constraint is enforced
- `String relaxationVarName` (line 42) -- e.g., `"relax_rule3"`
- `String name` (line 47) -- constraint type name, e.g., `"addGreaterOrEqual"`
- `String left` (line 52) -- left expression string
- `String operator` (line 57) -- e.g., `"<="`, `">"`
- `String right` (line 62) -- right expression string
- `String ifMemo` (line 67) -- condition info from `onlyEnforceIf`
- `String leftName` (line 72) -- left expression name
- `String rightName` (line 77) -- right expression name

**Constructor (line 79-88):**
```java
public AlgCPConstraint(Constraint cpConstraint, Literal relaxationVar, String relaxationVarName) {
    this.cpConstraint = cpConstraint;
    this.relaxationVar = relaxationVar;
    this.relaxationVarName = relaxationVarName;
    if (relaxationVar != null && cpConstraint != null) {
        cpConstraint.onlyEnforceIf(relaxationVar.not());
    }
}
```
Key semantics: `onlyEnforceIf(relaxationVar.not())` means the constraint is enforced only when `relaxationVar=false`. When `relaxationVar=true`, the constraint is relaxed.

**`onlyEnforceIf(Literal condition)` (line 95-99):**
```java
public void onlyEnforceIf(Literal condition) {
    cpConstraint.onlyEnforceIf(condition);
    ifMemo += " if " + toNameString(condition);
}
```
This allows stacking additional enforcement conditions on top of the relax condition.

## 8. ModuleBaseAlgImpl

**File:** `d:\03.code4ccds\jmixconfigengine\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\impl\algmodel\ModuleBaseAlgImpl.java`

**`addRelaxObjectFunction()` (line 260-279):**
```java
public void addRelaxObjectFunction() {
    if (!model.isIsAttachRelax()) {
        return;
    }
    List<RelaxVar> relaxVars = new ArrayList<>(model.getRelaxVarMap().values());
    if (!relaxVars.isEmpty()) {
        AlgCPLinearExpr[] weightedTerms = new AlgCPLinearExpr[relaxVars.size()];
        for (int i = 0; i < relaxVars.size(); i++) {
            RelaxVar relaxVar = relaxVars.get(i);
            weightedTerms[i] = AlgCPLinearExpr.term(relaxVar.getValue(), relaxVar.getWeight());
        }
        AlgCPLinearExpr objectiveExpr = AlgCPLinearExpr.sum(weightedTerms);
        model.minimize(objectiveExpr);
    }
}
```
This creates `minimize(sum(relaxVar[i] * weight[i]))` -- the solver minimizes the weighted sum of relaxed constraints.

**`executeRuleMethod(Rule rule, IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, Method method)` (line 294-311):**
Before executing each rule method, it calls `model.setRelax4CustomRule(rule.getCode())` (line 301), which sets up the current relax variable for constraints created inside that rule.

**Other relax-related calls in this class:**
- `setDefaultVisibilityConstraints()` (line 183-208): Calls `model.setRelax4SysRule("hiddensrule")` before hidden-visibility constraints.
- `addPartEquality()` (line 977-988): Calls `model.setRelax4SysRule("addPartEquality_" + ...)` before setting part equality.
- `addParaEquality()` (line 997-1006): Calls `model.setRelax4SysRule("addParaEquality_" + ...)` before setting para equality.

## 10. ModuleScenarioTestBase

**File:** `d:\03.code4ccds\jmixconfigengine\src\test\java\com\jmix\coretest\ModuleScenarioTestBase.java`

**Key methods:**
- `setUp()` (line 100): Called `@BeforeEach`, calls `init()`
- `tearDown()` (line 109): Called `@AfterEach`, calls `ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.fini()`
- `init()` (line 129): Creates `ConstraintConfig`, initializes executor, builds module
- `beforeInitConfig(ConstraintConfig cfg)` (line 169): Hook for subclasses to modify config
- `inferParas(String partCode, Integer qty, String... paraCodeValuePairs)` (line 182): Simple inference
- `inferParas(String partCode, Integer qty, List<ParaInst> preParas, List<PartInst> preParts)` (line 196): Full inference with pre-paras/parts
- `inferParasByPara(String... paraCodeValuePairs)` (line 226): Inference with only para constraints
- `solutions(int index)` (line 243): Returns `ProgammableInstAssert` for a specific solution
- `printSolutions()` (line 601)
- `printSimpleSolutions()` (line 605)
- `resultAssert()` (line 272): Returns `ResultAssert` for chained assertions
- `soluContain(String expectedStr)` (line 287): Checks solution contains expected string
- `assertSolutionNum(String conditionExpr, int expectSolutionNum)` (line 318): Validates solution count by condition
- `toPreParas(String... paraCodeValuePairs)` (line 518): Builds `List<ParaInst>` from code-value pairs
- `toPreParts(String... partCodeValuePairs)` (line 552): Builds `List<PartInst>` from code-value pairs
- `toPartConstraintReqs(String partCategory, String... strReqs)` (line 626): Parses string constraint requests
- `inferRecommendModule(String... constraintReqs)` (line 754): Inference with part constraint requests
- `inferRecommend(String partCategoryCode, String... constraintReqs)` (line 765): Inference with part category and constraints

**IMPORTANT: No relax-specific test methods exist yet.** RFC-0003 requires adding methods like `inferParasByParaRelax()`, `inferRecommendRelax()`, and `assertPartialSoluContain()`.

## 11. ConfictDebugTest and ConfictDebugIfThenTest

### ConfictDebugTest
**File:** `d:\03.code4ccds\jmixconfigengine\src\test\java\com\jmix\tool\confictdebug\ConfictDebugTest.java`

**Structure:**
- Extends `ModuleScenarioTestBase`
- Inner static class `ConfictDebugConstraint` extends `ConstraintAlgImplTestBase` with:
  - `PartVar x` (maxQuantity=50)
  - `PartVar y` (maxQuantity=50)
  - `rule1()`: `x.qty + y.qty < 20`
  - `rule2()`: `x.qty - y.qty > 10`
  - `rule3()`: `y.qty > 45`
  - `rule4()`: `x.qty + 2*y.qty > 10`
- **testCase1** (line 73): `debugByRelaxVar=false`, asserts SUCCESS with 0 solutions
- **testCase2** (line 84): `debugByRelaxVar=true`, asserts NO_SOLUTION with message containing "rule3"

This corresponds to RFC CONFLICT-001 test scenario. Currently uses `cfg.setDebugByRelaxVar(true/false)` -- needs migration to `req.setRelaxSolve(true)`.

### ConfictDebugIfThenTest
**File:** `d:\03.code4ccds\jmixconfigengine\src\test\java\com\jmix\tool\confictdebugifthen\ConfictDebugIfThenTest.java`

**Structure:**
- Extends `ModuleScenarioTestBase`
- Inner static class `ConfictDebugIfThenConstraint` extends `ConstraintAlgImplTestBase` with:
  - `PartVar x, y, z` (all maxQuantity=50)
  - `rule1()`: `if(x.qty > 10) then y.qty > 7`
  - `rule2()`: `x.qty + y.qty > 10`
  - `rule31()`: `y.qty > 48`
  - `rule32()`: `y.qty > 45`
  - `rule4()`: `if(x > 5 and y > 5) then z < 10`
  - `rule51()`: `y.qty < 10`
  - `rule52()`: `y.qty < 15`
- **testCase1** (line 118): `debugByRelaxVar=false`, asserts SUCCESS with 0 solutions
- **testCase2** (line 130): `debugByRelaxVar=true`, asserts NO_SOLUTION with message containing "rule3", "rule5"

This corresponds to RFC CONFLICT-002 and CONFLICT-003 test scenarios. Uses `onlyEnforceIf()` for conditional constraints.

## 13. ModuleConstraintExecutor interface

**File:** `d:\03.code4ccds\jmixconfigengine\src\main\java\com\jmix\executor\ModuleConstraintExecutor.java`

**`inferParas` method signature (line 69):**
```java
Result<List<ModuleInst>> inferParas(InferParasReq req);
```

**IMPORTANT:** Returns `Result<List<ModuleInst>>`, not `Result<SolverResult>`. RFC-0003 needs SolverResult as the return data carrier for diagnosis fields. The RFC suggests either changing this signature to `Result<SolverResult>` or adding a new `inferParasV2()` method.

## Summary of Key Gaps for RFC-0003 Implementation

| Item | Current State | RFC-0003 Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| `InferParasReq.relaxSolve` | Does not exist | Add `boolean relaxSolve = false` |
| `SolverResult` diagnosis fields | None | Add `strictFeasible`, `originalSolverStatus`, `diagnosticConstraints` |
| `DiagnosticConstraint` class | Does not exist | Create new class |
| `inferParas()` return type | `Result<List<ModuleInst>>` | Change to `Result<SolverResult>` or add V2 |
| Request-level relax control | Only via `ConstraintConfig.debugByRelaxVar` | Priority to `req.relaxSolve` |
| `ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl` relax support | Hardcoded `isAttachRelax=false` | Parameterize based on request |
| `ResultAssert` diagnosis methods | None | Add 6+ new assertion methods |
| `ModuleScenarioTestBase` relax methods | None | Add `inferParasByParaRelax()`, `assertPartialSoluContain()` |
| `confict` spelling | Used throughout (classes, methods, variables) | New code uses `conflict`; old code kept as-is |

59	@Slf4j
60	public class ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl extends ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl implements ModuleConstraintExecutor {
61	
62	    private final Map<Long, Module> moduleMap = new HashMap<>();
63	
64	    private final Map<Long, ModuleAlgClassLoader> moduleAlgClassLoaderMap = new HashMap<>();
65	
66	    private final List<ExtensibleProcess> extensibleProcesses = new CopyOnWriteArrayList<>();
67	
68	    private ConstraintConfig config;
69	
70	    @Override
71	    public Result<Void> init(final ConstraintConfig config) {
72	        this.config = config;
73	        log.info("Module constraint executor initialized");
74	        return Result.success(null);
75	    }
76	
77	    @Override
78	    public final Result<Void> fini() {
79	        // 销毁所有扩展处理器
80	        for (ExtensibleProcess process : extensibleProcesses) {
81	            process.destroy();
82	        }
83	        extensibleProcesses.clear();
84	        moduleAlgClassLoaderMap.clear();
85	        moduleMap.clear();
86	        log.info("Module constraint executor finalized");
87	        return Result.success(null);
88	    }
89	
90	    @Override
91	    public final Result<Void> addModule(Long rootModuleId, Module... modules) {
92	        if (modules == null) {
93	            return Result.failed("modules is null");
94	        }
95	        for (Module m : modules) {
96	            if (m == null) {
97	                continue;
98	            }
99	            moduleMap.put(m.getId(), m);
100	            m.init();
101	            ModuleAlgClassLoader loader = ModuleAlgClassLoader.newInstance(config, m.getAlg());
102	            loader.init();
103	            moduleAlgClassLoaderMap.put(m.getId(), loader);
104	        }
105	        log.info("Added modules: {}", modules.length);
106	        return Result.success(null);
107	    }

110	    public Result<Void> removeModule(Long moduleId) {
111	        moduleAlgClassLoaderMap.remove(moduleId);
112	        moduleMap.remove(moduleId);
113	        log.info("Removed module: {}", moduleId);
114	        return Result.success(null);
115	    }

117	    @Override
118	    public Result<List<ModuleInst>> doProcess(InferPartCategoryReq partCategoryReq) {
119	        return processProduct(module, partCategoryReq);
