```text
121	
122	    private Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> normalizePartConstraint(List<PartConstraintReq> orgReqs,
123	            IModule module) {
124	        Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> normalizedReqs = new HashMap<>();
125	        if (orgReqs == null) {
126	            return normalizedReqs;
127	        }
128	        for (PartConstraintReq orgReq : orgReqs) {
129	            List<PartConstraintReq> reqs = normalizedReqs.get(orgReq.getPartCategoryCode());
130	            if (reqs == null) {
131	                reqs = new ArrayList<>();
132	                normalizedReqs.put(orgReq.getPartCategoryCode(), reqs);
133	            }
134	            normalizedReqs.get(orgReq.getPartCategoryCode()).add(orgReq);
135	        }
136	
137	        // 标准化， 1、每个rootCategory只有1个， 2、属于同一个rootCategory的PartConstraintReq，合并在一起
138	        // 3、原始需求中针对子的要转换为rootCategory
139	        return normalizedReqs;
140	    }
141	
142	    /**
143	     * 处理部件分类约束
144	     *
145	     * @param partCategoryReq 部件分类请求
146	     * @return 推理结果
147	     */
148	    public Result<List<ModuleInst>> processProduct(Module startModule, InferPartCategoryReq partCategoryReq) {
149	        try {
150	            ModuleInput moduleInput = new ModuleInput();
151	
152	            Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> partConstraintReqMap = normalizePartConstraint(
153	                    partCategoryReq.getPartConstraintReqs(), startModule);
154	            // 查找原始部件分类
155	            FilterCloneResult filterResult = filterClone(startModule, partConstraintReqMap);
156	            moduleInput.setPartCategoryInputs(filterResult.partCategoryInputs());
157	            moduleInput.setPartCategoryErrorInfoMap(filterResult.errorInfoMap());
158	
159	            Module filterModule = filterResult.filteredModule();
160	            log.info("Priority-orignal module: {}", ModuleUtils.toShortString(startModule));
161	            log.info("Priority-filter module: {}", ModuleUtils.toShortString(filterModule));
162	            SolverResult sr = null;
163	            // 检查是否有优先级规则，如果有则使用分级求解
164	            if (filterModule.hasAllPriorityRule()) {
165	                sr = solveWithPriorityConstraints(filterModule, moduleInput);
166	            } else {
167	                sr = solveWithOutPriorityConstraints(filterModule, moduleInput);
168	            }
169	            // 后处理：注入过滤为空的 PartCategoryInst 错误信息
170	            injectPartCategoryErrors(sr.getSolutions(), filterResult.errorInfoMap());
171	
172	            if (filterResult.hasError()) {
173	                // 判断是否所有有约束的分类都过滤为空
174	                boolean allConstrainedEmpty = filterResult.errorInfoMap().size() == partConstraintReqMap.size();
175	                if (sr.hasSolution() && !allConstrainedEmpty) {
176	                    return Result.partialSuccess(sr.getSolutions(),
177	                            "Partial success: some categories have empty filter results");
178	                } else {
179	                    return Result.noSolution("All categories have empty filter results");
180	                }
181	            }
182	            return Result.success(sr.getSolutions());
183	
184	        } catch (Exception e) {
185	            log.error("Failed to process Module constraint", e);
186	            return Result.failed("Failed to process Module constraint: " + e.getMessage());
187	        }
188	    }
189	
190	    public static FilterCloneResult filterClone(Module startModule,
191	            Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> partConstraintReqMap) {
192	        Module result = startModule.clone();
193	        List<PartCategoryInputBase> partCategoryInputs = new ArrayList<>();
194	        Map<String, ErrorInfo> errorInfoMap = new LinkedHashMap<>();
195	        List<PartConstraintReq> reqs = null;
196	        PartCategory filterPartCategory = null;
197	        for (PartCategory partCategory : startModule.getPartCategorys()) {
198	            reqs = partConstraintReqMap.get(partCategory.getCode());
199	            if (reqs == null) {
200	                // 如果是穷举多实例的情况，默认是放进去的，TODO：是不是一个也没有的时候也补充一个
201	                if (partCategory.isEnumMutiInst()) {
202	                    continue;
203	                }
204	                result.addPart(partCategory); // 完全挪过来
205	            } else {
206	                if (reqs.size() == 1) {
207	                    PartConstraintReq req = reqs.get(0);
208	                    filterPartCategory = partCategory.filterClone(req);
209	                    String msg = String.format("Priority-filtered aparts: {%s} by {%s}",
210	                            filterPartCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString(),
211	                            req.getAttrWhereCondition());
212	                    log.info(msg);
213	                    if (filterPartCategory.getAllAtomicParts().isEmpty()) {
214	                        log.warn("Filter empty for category {}: {}", partCategory.getCode(), msg);
215	                        errorInfoMap.put(partCategory.getCode(),
216	                                new ErrorInfo(InstErrorCode.FILTER_EMPTY,
217	                                        "No parts found for condition: " + req.getAttrWhereCondition()
218	                                                + " in category " + partCategory.getCode()));
219	                    }
220	                    result.addPartCategory(filterPartCategory);
221	                    PartCategoryInput partCategoryInput = PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl
222	                            .toPartCategoryInput(
223	                                    filterPartCategory, req);
224	                    partCategoryInput.setSumAttrParas(partCategory.getAttrParas(AttrParaType.Sum));
225	                    partCategoryInputs.add(partCategoryInput);
226	                } else {
227	                    Pair<List<Rule>, List<Rule>> rulePair = RuleUtils.splitRules(partCategory.getRules());
228	                    List<AttrPara> sumsumAttrParas = partCategory.getAttrParas(AttrParaType.SumSum);
229	                    List<AttrPara> sumAttrParas = partCategory.getAttrParas(AttrParaType.Sum);
230	
231	                    MultiInstPartCategoryInput multiInstPartCategoryInput = new MultiInstPartCategoryInput();
232	                    int instId = ModuleInst.DEFAULT_INSTANCE_ID;
233	                    for (PartConstraintReq req : reqs) {
234	                        if (req.getAttrType() == AttrParaType.SumSum) { // 总总的要求
235	                            PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl.setPartCategoryInputBase(multiInstPartCategoryInput,
236	                                    req);
237	                            continue;
238	                        }
239	                        filterPartCategory = partCategory.filterClone(req);
240	                        String msg = String.format("Priority-filtered aparts: {%s} by {%s}",
241	                                filterPartCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString(),
242	                                req.getAttrWhereCondition());
243	                        log.info(msg);
244	                        if (filterPartCategory.getAllAtomicParts().isEmpty()) {
245	                            log.warn("Filter empty for category {} inst {}: {}",
246	                                    partCategory.getCode(), instId, msg);
247	                            errorInfoMap.put(partCategory.getCode() + "_I" + instId,
248	                                    new ErrorInfo(InstErrorCode.FILTER_EMPTY,
249	                                            "No parts found for condition: " + req.getAttrWhereCondition()
250	                                                    + " in category " + partCategory.getCode()
251	                                                    + " instance " + instId));
252	                        }
253	                        filterPartCategory.setRules(rulePair.getFirst());
254	                        PartCategoryInput partCategoryInput = PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl
255	                                .toPartCategoryInput(
256	                                        filterPartCategory, req);
257	                        partCategoryInput.setInstId(instId++);
258	                        partCategoryInput.setSumAttrParas(sumAttrParas);
259	                        multiInstPartCategoryInput.addPartCategoryInput(partCategoryInput);
260	                    }
261	                    multiInstPartCategoryInput.setAllInstRules(rulePair.getSecond());
262	                    multiInstPartCategoryInput.setSumSumAttrParas(sumsumAttrParas);
263	                    result.addPartCategory(partCategory); // 放的是全的
264	                    partCategoryInputs.add(multiInstPartCategoryInput);
265	                }
266	            }
267	        }
268	        return new FilterCloneResult(result, partCategoryInputs, errorInfoMap);
269	    }
270	
271	    /**
272	     * 将过滤为空的 PartCategory 错误信息注入到求解结果的 PartCategoryInst 中
273	     */
274	    private static void injectPartCategoryErrors(List<ModuleInst> solutions,
275	            Map<String, ErrorInfo> errorInfoMap) {
276	        if (errorInfoMap == null || errorInfoMap.isEmpty() || solutions == null) {
277	            return;
278	        }
279	        for (ModuleInst solution : solutions) {
280	            for (Map.Entry<String, ErrorInfo> entry : errorInfoMap.entrySet()) {
281	                String key = entry.getKey();
282	                ErrorInfo errorInfo = entry.getValue();
283	                // 检查是否已存在对应的 PartCategoryInst
284	                boolean found = false;
285	                for (PartCategoryInst pcInst : solution.getPartCategorys()) {
286	                    if (pcInst.getCode().equals(key)) {
287	                        pcInst.setErrorCode(errorInfo.errorCode());
288	                        pcInst.setErrorMessage(errorInfo.errorMessage());
289	                        found = true;
290	                        break;
291	                    }
292	                }
293	                if (!found) {
294	                    // 创建新的 PartCategoryInst 承载错误信息
295	                    PartCategoryInst errorInst = new PartCategoryInst();
296	                    errorInst.setCode(key);
297	                    errorInst.setErrorCode(errorInfo.errorCode());
298	                    errorInst.setErrorMessage(errorInfo.errorMessage());
299	                    solution.addPartCategoryInst(errorInst);
300	                }
301	            }
302	        }
303	    }
304	
305	    @Override
306	    public Result<List<ModuleInst>> inferParas(InferParasReq req) {
307	        if (req == null) {
308	            return Result.failed("req is null");
309	        }
310	        if (req.getPartConstraintReqs() == null || req.getPartConstraintReqs().isEmpty()) {
311	            return inferParasOld(req);
312	        }
313	        try {
314	            // 获取基础数据
315	            Module module = getModule(req.getModuleId(), req.getModuleCode());
316	            module.init();
317	
318	            // 创建部件分类约束执行器
319	            ModuleAlgClassLoader loader = getModuleClassLoader(module.getId());
320	            if (loader == null) {
321	                log.error("ModuleAlgClassLoader not found for module: {}", module.getId());
322	                return Result.failed("ModuleAlgClassLoader not found for module: " + module.getId());
323	            }
324	            ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl baseExecutor = null;
325	            Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = null;
326	            InferPartCategoryReq cReq = toInferPartCategoryReq(req);
327	            if (!Strings.isNullOrEmpty(cReq.getPartCategoryCode())) {
328	                baseExecutor = new PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl();
329	            } else {
330	                baseExecutor = this;
331	            }
332	            baseExecutor.init(module, config, loader);
333	            result = baseExecutor.doProcess(cReq);
334	
335	            return result;
336	        } catch (AlgLoaderException | AlgExecutorException ex) {
337	            log.error("Failed to infer paras", ex);
338	            return Result.failed("exception: " + ex.getMessage());
339	        }
340	    }
341	
342	    private Result<List<ModuleInst>> inferParasOld(InferParasReq req) {
343	        if (req == null) {
344	            return Result.failed("req is null");
345	        }
346	        try {
347	            // 获取基础数据
348	            Module module = getModule(req.getModuleId(), req.getModuleCode());
349	            module.init();
350	
351	            // 获取模块算法类加载器并初始化执行器
352	            ModuleAlgClassLoader loader = getModuleClassLoader(module.getId());
353	            if (loader == null) {
354	                log.error("ModuleAlgClassLoader not found for module: {}", module.getId());
355	                return Result.failed("ModuleAlgClassLoader not found for module: " +
356	                        module.getId());
357	            }
358	            this.init(module, config, loader);
359	
360	            // 执行约束推理
361	            RunInferParasRsp result = runInferParas(module, req, false, new ArrayList<>());
362	            CpSolverStatus status = result.getStatus();
363	            ModuleInstSolutionCallBack cb = result.getSolutionCallBack();
364	
365	            // 如果模型无效，调用ValidateCpModel获取详细错误信息
366	            if (status == CpSolverStatus.MODEL_INVALID) {
367	                // 重新获取模型进行验证
368	                ModuleAlgImpl alg = initConstraintModel(module, req, false, new ArrayList<>());
369	                AlgCPModel model = alg.getModel();
370	                String validationError = model.getCpModel().validate();
371	                log.error("Model validation failed: {}", validationError);
372	                return Result.failed("Model validation failed: " + validationError);
373	            }
374	
375	            if (status != CpSolverStatus.OPTIMAL && status != CpSolverStatus.FEASIBLE
376	                    && status != CpSolverStatus.INFEASIBLE) {
377	                return Result.failed("solver status: " + status);
378	            }
379	            if (status == CpSolverStatus.INFEASIBLE && config.isDebugByRelaxVar()) {
380	                // 没有可行解，如果 debugByRelaxVar= true，则使用松弛变量检测冲突规则
381	                Pair<List<RelaxVar>, RunInferParasRsp> rcResult = null;
382	                List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs = new ArrayList<>();
383	
384	                // 第一次运行
385	                rcResult = runCalcConfictRules(module, req, true, confictedRelaxs);
386	                confictedRelaxs.addAll(rcResult.getFirst());
387	
388	                // 第二次运行，使用第一次的冲突结果
389	                rcResult = runCalcConfictRules(module, req, true, confictedRelaxs);
390	                confictedRelaxs.addAll(rcResult.getFirst());
391	
392	                Result<List<ModuleInst>> r = Result.noSolution(toConfictMessage(confictedRelaxs));
393	
394	                // 最后一次solution的解
395	                List<ModuleInst> solutions = rcResult.getSecond().getSolutionCallBack().getSolverResult()
396	                        .getSolutions();
397	                r.setData(solutions);
398	                return r;
399	            }
400	
401	            // 执行后处理
402	            List<ModuleInst> solutions = cb.getSolverResult().getSolutions();
403	            solutions = executePostProcess(module, solutions);
404	
405	            return Result.success(solutions);
406	        } catch (AlgLoaderException | AlgExecutorException ex) {
407	            log.error("Failed to infer paras", ex);
408	            return Result.failed("exception: " + ex.getMessage());
409	        }
410	    }
411	
412	    @Override
413	    public Result<Void> registerExtensible(ExtensibleProcess eProcess) {
414	        if (eProcess == null) {
415	            return Result.failed("ExtensibleProcess is null");
416	        }
417	        if (extensibleProcesses.contains(eProcess)) {
418	            log.warn("ExtensibleProcess already registered: {}", eProcess.getProcessName());
419	            return Result.success(null);
420	        }
421	        Result<Void> initResult = eProcess.init();
422	        if (initResult.getCode() != Result.SUCCESS) {
423	            return Result.failed("Failed to initialize extensible process: " + initResult.getMessage());
424	        }
425	        extensibleProcesses.add(eProcess);
426	        // 按优先级排序
427	        extensibleProcesses.sort(Comparator.comparingInt(ExtensibleProcess::getPriority));
428	        log.info("Registered extensible process: {} with priority: {}",
429	                eProcess.getProcessName(), eProcess.getPriority());
430	        return Result.success(null);
431	    }
432	
433	    @Override
434	    public Result<Void> unregisterExtensible(ExtensibleProcess eProcess) {
435	        if (eProcess == null) {
436	            return Result.failed("ExtensibleProcess is null");
437	        }
438	        if (!extensibleProcesses.contains(eProcess)) {
439	            log.warn("ExtensibleProcess not registered: {}", eProcess.getProcessName());
440	            return Result.success(null);
441	        }
442	        eProcess.destroy();
443	        extensibleProcesses.remove(eProcess);
444	        log.info("Unregistered extensible process: {}", eProcess.getProcessName());
445	        return Result.success(null);
446	    }

448	    /**
449	     * 根据模块ID获取模块算法类加载器
450	     * 
451	     * @param moduleId 模块ID
452	     * @return 找到的ModuleAlgClassLoader对象，如果未找到则返回null
453	     */
454	    private ModuleAlgClassLoader getModuleClassLoader(Long moduleId) {
455	        return moduleAlgClassLoaderMap.get(moduleId);
456	    }
457	
458	    /**
459	     * 计算冲突规则
460	     *
461	     * @param result 运行推理参数响应
462	     * @return 冲突松弛变量列表
463	     */
464	    private List<RelaxVar> calcConfictRules(RunInferParasRsp result) {
465	        AlgCPModel relaxModel = result.getAlgCPModel();
466	        // 获取冲突规则信息
467	        List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs = new ArrayList<>();
468	        Map<String, RelaxVar> relaxVarMap = relaxModel.getRelaxVarMap();
469	        for (Map.Entry<String, RelaxVar> entry : relaxVarMap.entrySet()) {
470	            RelaxVar relaxVar = entry.getValue();
471	            if (result.getSolver().booleanValue(relaxVar.getValue())) {
472	                confictedRelaxs.add(relaxVar);
473	            }
474	        }
475	        return confictedRelaxs;
476	    }
477	
478	    /**
479	     * 将冲突松弛变量列表转换为冲突消息字符串
480	     *
481	     * @param confictedRelaxs 冲突松弛变量列表
482	     * @return 冲突消息字符串
483	     */
484	    private String toConfictMessage(List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs) {
485	        StringBuilder conflictMessage = new StringBuilder("conflict rules: ");
486	        for (RelaxVar confictedRelax : confictedRelaxs) {
487	            conflictMessage.append(confictedRelax.getRuleCode()).append(",");
488	        }
489	        return conflictMessage.toString();
490	    }
491	
492	    private Pair<List<RelaxVar>, RunInferParasRsp> runCalcConfictRules(Module module,
493	            InferParasReq req,
494	            boolean isAttachRelax,
495	            List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs) throws AlgExecutorException {
496	
497	        RunInferParasRsp result = runInferParas(module, req, isAttachRelax, confictedRelaxs);
498	        CpSolverStatus status = result.getStatus();
499	        if (isFailed(status)) {
500	            throw new AlgExecutorException("Solver failed with status: " + status);
501	        }
502	        List<RelaxVar> newConfictedRelaxs = calcConfictRules(result);
503	        return new Pair<>(newConfictedRelaxs, result);
504	
505	    }
506	
507	    /**
508	     * 检查求解器状态是否失败
509	     *
510	     * @param status 求解器状态
511	     * @return 是否失败
512	     */
513	    private boolean isFailed(CpSolverStatus status) {
514	        return status != CpSolverStatus.OPTIMAL
515	                && status != CpSolverStatus.FEASIBLE
516	                && status != CpSolverStatus.INFEASIBLE;
517	    }
518	
519	    /**
520	     * 执行约束推理
521	     * 
522	     * @param module          模块对象
523	     * @param req             参数反推请求
524	     * @param isAttachRelax   是否附加松弛变量
525	     * @param confictedRelaxs 冲突松弛变量列表
526	     * @return 包含求解器状态和回调对象的RunInferParasRsp
527	     * @throws AlgLoaderException   当算法加载器未找到时抛出
528	     * @throws AlgExecutorException 当创建算法执行时抛出
529	     */
530	    private RunInferParasRsp runInferParas(Module module,
531	            InferParasReq req,
532	            boolean isAttachRelax,
533	            List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs)
534	            throws AlgLoaderException, AlgExecutorException {
535	        // 初始化约束模型
536	        ModuleAlgImpl alg = initConstraintModel(module, req, isAttachRelax, confictedRelaxs);
537	        AlgCPModel model = alg.getModel();
538	
539	        if (config.isLogModelProto()) {
540	            // 将module的CpModelProto信息输出到文件config.logFilePath/module.proto.txt
541	            model.getCpModel().exportToFile(config.getLogFilePath() + File.separator + module.getCode() + ".proto.txt");
542	        }
543	        CpSolver solver = new CpSolver();
544	        solver.getParameters().setEnumerateAllSolutions(req.isEnumerateAllSolution());
545	        solver.getParameters().setNumSearchWorkers(1); // 单线程搜索，防止有重复解
546	        if (model.hasDecisionStrategies()) {
547	            solver.getParameters().setSearchBranching(SatParameters.SearchBranching.FIXED_SEARCH);
548	            log.info("FIXED_SEARCH enabled for decision strategies");
549	        }
550	        log.info("solver parameters:\n" + solver.getParameters().toString());
551	        // 可按需设置更多参数
552	        ModuleInstSolutionCallBack cb = new ModuleInstSolutionCallBack(module, alg);
553	        CpSolverStatus status = solver.solve(model.getCpModel(), cb);
554	        log.info("solver  models:\n");
555	        model.printModelSummary();
556	        return new RunInferParasRsp(status, cb, alg.getModel(), solver);
557	    }
558	
559	    private ModuleAlgImpl initConstraintModel(Module module, InferParasReq req,
560	            boolean isAttachRelax, List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs)
561	            throws AlgLoaderException, AlgExecutorException {
562	        // 创建约束算法实例
563	        ModuleAlgImpl alg = createConstraintAlg(module.getId(), module.getCode());
564	        AlgCPModel model = new AlgCPModel();
565	        model.setIsAttachRelax(isAttachRelax);
566	        model.setConfictedRelaxVars(confictedRelaxs);
567	        // 根据loadType决定是否使用差量加载模型
568	        if (config.getLoadType() == ConstraintConfig.LOAD_TYPE_INCREMENTAL) {
569	            // 差量加载模型
570	            List<String> inputProgObjs = ReqUtils.buildInputProgObjs(req);
571	
572	            // 查询子图
573	            Pair<List<String>, List<RefProgObjSchema>> relativePair = module
574	                    .querySubGraph(inputProgObjs.toArray(new String[0]));
575	
576	            // 打印relativePair.first,relativePair.second, 本次推理涉及到exeRules和exeProgObjs
577	            log.info("Incremental loading - involved rules: {}", relativePair.getFirst());
578	            log.info("Incremental loading - involved progObjs: {}",
579	                    relativePair.getSecond().stream().map(RefProgObjSchema::getProgObjCode)
580	                            .collect(java.util.stream.Collectors.toList()));
581	
582	            // 调用新的initModel方法,issue:差量后续实现
583	            alg.init(model, module, toModuleInput(module, req));
584	        } else {
585	            // 全量加载模型
586	            alg.init(model, module, toModuleInput(module, req));
587	        }
588	
589	        // // 根据请求初始化约束模型
590	        // initModelByReq(req, alg);
591	
592	        // 添加松弛目标函数, 方便调试
593	        alg.addRelaxObjectFunction();
594	        return alg;
595	    }
596	
597	    private ModuleInput toModuleInput(Module startModule, InferParasReq req) {
598	        ModuleInput moduleInput = new ModuleInput();
599	        moduleInput.setModuleId(startModule.getId());
600	        moduleInput.setModuleCode(startModule.getCode());
601	        moduleInput.setMainPartInst(req.getMainPartInst());
602	        moduleInput.setPreParaInsts(req.getPreParaInsts());
603	        moduleInput.setPrePartInsts(req.getPrePartInsts());
604	        // moduleInput.setPartConstraintReqs(req.getPartConstraintReqs());
605	        moduleInput.setEnumerateAllSolution(req.isEnumerateAllSolution());
606	        // moduleInput.setPartCategoryCode(req.getPartCategoryCode());
607	        Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> partConstraintReqMap = normalizePartConstraint(req.getPartConstraintReqs(),
608	                startModule);
609	        FilterCloneResult filterResult = ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.filterClone(startModule,
610	                partConstraintReqMap);
611	        moduleInput.setPartCategoryInputs(filterResult.partCategoryInputs());
612	        moduleInput.setPartCategoryErrorInfoMap(filterResult.errorInfoMap());
613	        return moduleInput;
614	    }

616	    /**
617	     * 将InferParasReq转换为InferPartCategoryReq
618	     * 
619	     * @param req 参数反推请求
620	     * @return 部件分类请求
621	     */
622	    private InferPartCategoryReq toInferPartCategoryReq(InferParasReq req) {
623	        InferPartCategoryReq cReq = new InferPartCategoryReq();
624	        cReq.setPreParaInsts(req.getPreParaInsts());
625	        cReq.setPrePartInsts(req.getPrePartInsts());
626	        cReq.setPartConstraintReqs(req.getPartConstraintReqs());
627	        cReq.setEnumerateAllSolution(req.isEnumerateAllSolution());
628	        cReq.setPartCategoryCode(req.getPartCategoryCode());
629	        return cReq;
630	    }
631	
632	    /**
633	     * 根据模块ID或模块代码获取模块对象
634	     * 
635	     * @param moduleId   模块ID，可为null
636	     * @param moduleCode 模块代码，可为null
637	     * @return 找到的模块对象，如果未找到则返回null
638	     */
639	    private Module getModule(Long moduleId, String moduleCode) {
640	        if (moduleId != null) {
641	            return moduleMap.get(moduleId);
642	        }
643	        if (moduleCode != null) {
644	            for (Module m : moduleMap.values()) {
645	                if (moduleCode.equals(m.getCode())) {
646	                    return m;
647	                }
648	            }
649	        }
650	        log.error("Module not found: moduleId={}, moduleCode={}", moduleId, moduleCode);
651	        throw new AlgLoaderException(
652	                String.format("Module not found: moduleId=%s, moduleCode=%s", moduleId, moduleCode));
653	    }
654	
655	    /**
656	     * 执行后处理
657	     * 
658	     * @param module    模块
659	     * @param solutions 原始解决方案
660	     * @return 处理后的解决方案
661	     */
662	    private List<ModuleInst> executePostProcess(Module module, List<ModuleInst> solutions) {
663	        List<ModuleInst> result = solutions;
664	
665	        for (ExtensibleProcess process : extensibleProcesses) {
666	            if (process instanceof InferParasPostProcess) {
667	                result = applyPostProcess(module, result, (InferParasPostProcess) process);
668	            }
669	        }
670	
671	        return result;
672	    }
673	
674	    /**
675	     * 应用单个后处理流程
676	     * 
677	     * @param module        模块
678	     * @param currentResult 当前结果
679	     * @param postProcess   后处理流程
680	     * @return 处理后的结果
681	     */
682	    private List<ModuleInst> applyPostProcess(Module module, List<ModuleInst> currentResult,
683	            InferParasPostProcess postProcess) {
684	        Result<List<ModuleInst>> processResult = postProcess.postProcess(module, currentResult);
685	        if (processResult.getCode() != Result.SUCCESS || processResult.getData() == null) {
686	            log.warn("Post process failed: {}, message: {}",
687	                    postProcess.getClass().getSimpleName(), processResult.getMessage());
688	            return currentResult;
689	        }
690	        log.info("Applied post process: {} successfully", postProcess.getClass().getSimpleName());
691	        return processResult.getData();
692	    }
693	
694	    /**
695	     * 将ModuleInst对象转换为JSON字符串
696	     * 
697	     * @param inst ModuleInst实例
698	     * @return JSON字符串
699	     */
700	    public static String toJson(ModuleInst inst) {
701	        try {
702	            ObjectMapper mapper = new ObjectMapper();
703	            mapper.setPropertyNamingStrategy(PropertyNamingStrategies.SNAKE_CASE);
704	            return mapper.writeValueAsString(inst);
705	        } catch (JsonProcessingException e) {
706	            return "{\"error\": \"Serialization failed: " + e.getMessage() + "\"}";
707	        }
708	    }
709	
710	}
```

```text
27	 * 模块基础约束执行器抽象类
28	 * 提供模块约束执行的公共功能
29	 *
30	 * @since 2025-01-XX
31	 */
32	@Slf4j
33	public abstract class ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl {
34	
35	    protected Module module;
36	
37	    protected ConstraintConfig config;

41	    public void init(Module module, ConstraintConfig config,
42	            ModuleAlgClassLoader moduleAlgClassLoader) {
43	        this.module = module;
44	        this.config = config;
45	        this.moduleAlgClassLoader = moduleAlgClassLoader;
46	    }
47	
48	    /**
49	     * 执行约束处理的主方法，由子类实现
50	     *
51	     * @param partCategoryReq 部件分类请求
52	     * @return 处理结果
53	     */
54	    public abstract Result<List<ModuleInst>> doProcess(InferPartCategoryReq partCategoryReq);
55	
56	    /**
57	     * 求解约束模型并返回结果（无优先级约束）
58	     *
59	     * @param filteredModuleBase 过滤后的模块基础
60	     * @param partCategoryReq    部件分类请求
61	     * @return 求解结果
62	     */
63	    protected SolverResult solveWithOutPriorityConstraints(IModule filteredModuleBase, ModuleInput moduleInput) {
64	        log.info("no Priority-process starting........");
65	        return invokerSolver(filteredModuleBase, moduleInput, null);
66	    }
67	
68	    /**
69	     * 主求解方法-带优先级约束
70	     */
71	    protected SolverResult solveWithPriorityConstraints(
72	            IModule filteredModuleBase, ModuleInput moduleInput) {
73	        log.info("Priority-process pconstraint-step1 max/min starting........");
74	        // 步骤1：对每个优先级规则优化求解最优解 minimize(objecFun)
75	        SolverResult result = invokerSolver(filteredModuleBase, moduleInput, null);
76	
77	        if (!result.hasSolution()) {
78	            result.setMessage("Cannot find solution in first step");
79	            return result;
80	        }
81	
82	        // 步骤2：在保持高优先级目标接近最优的前提下，寻找多个解，objecFun <=
83	        // ajustObjectValue(不断调整ajustObjectValue)
84	        final int maxExecTimes = 5; // 最大执行次数,
85	        final int availableSolutionNum = 5; // 可行解的格式
86	        final int minSolutionThreshold = 3; // 最少解数量阈值
87	        int execTimes = 0;
88	        double baseAdjustCoeff = 0.5; // 基础调整系数
89	        double objectValue = result.getObjectiveValue();
90	        boolean needIncreased = true; // 是否需要增加objectvalue
91	        int needIncreasedTimes = 0;
92	        do {
93	            execTimes++;
94	            SolverResult lastResult = result;
95	            // 根据上一次求解结果动态调整策略
96	            if (execTimes > 1) {
97	                if (lastResult.isHasSearchMax()) {
98	                    // objectValue设置太大，最优解都没有处理，系数需要往下调
99	                    baseAdjustCoeff *= 0.7; // 降低调整幅度
100	                    needIncreased = false;
101	                    needIncreasedTimes = 0;
102	                    log.info(
103	                            "Priority-process pconstraint-step2 Iteration {}: objective value too high, reducing adjustment coefficient to {}",
104	                            execTimes, baseAdjustCoeff);
105	                } else if (lastResult.getSolutions().size() < minSolutionThreshold) {
106	                    // 解数量太少，objectValue设置太小，系数需要往上调
107	                    needIncreasedTimes++;
108	                    baseAdjustCoeff *= 3 * needIncreasedTimes;
109	                    needIncreased = true;
110	                    log.info(
111	                            "Priority-process pconstraint-step2 Iteration {}: too few solutions found, increasing adjustment coefficient to {}",
112	                            execTimes, baseAdjustCoeff);
113	                } else {
114	                    log.info("xxxx");
115	                    break;
116	                }
117	            }
118	            // 根据上一次调整方向决定本次调整
119	            if (!needIncreased) {
120	                objectValue = getAdjustObjectValue(objectValue, -baseAdjustCoeff);
121	            } else {
122	                objectValue = getAdjustObjectValue(objectValue, baseAdjustCoeff);
123	            }
124	            log.info("Priority-process pconstraint-step2 Iteration {}: adjusting objective value to {}", execTimes,
125	                    objectValue);
126	            result = invokerSolver(filteredModuleBase, moduleInput, objectValue);
127	
128	        } while (execTimes < maxExecTimes
129	                && result.getSolutions().size() <= availableSolutionNum);
130	        result.setIterationTimes(execTimes);
131	        return result;
132	    }
133	
134	    /**
135	     * 验证优先级总体值
136	     */
137	    protected Pair<Boolean, String> validPriorityOverallValue(double solverValue, List<ModuleInst> exprValueSolutions) {
138	        StringBuffer sb = new StringBuffer();
139	        boolean result = false;
140	
141	        if (exprValueSolutions == null || exprValueSolutions.isEmpty()) {
142	            sb.append("exprValueSolutions is empty");
143	            result = false;
144	        } else {
145	            double priorityOverallValue = exprValueSolutions.get(0).getPriorityOverallValue();
146	            if (Double.compare(priorityOverallValue, solverValue) != 0) {
147	                sb.append(String.format(
148	                        "Priority overall value mismatch: solverValue=%.2f, exprValueSolutions.get(0).getPriorityOverallValue()=%.2f",
149	                        solverValue, priorityOverallValue));
150	                result = false;
151	            } else {
152	                result = true;
153	            }
154	        }
155	
156	        return Pair.of(result, sb.toString());
157	    }
158	
159	    /**
160	     * 获取调整后的目标值
161	     */
162	    protected double getAdjustObjectValue(double objectValue, double adjustCoeff) {
163	        int cResult = Double.compare(objectValue, 0.0);
164	        if (cResult < 0) {
165	            if (adjustCoeff >= 0) {
166	                objectValue = objectValue * (1 - adjustCoeff);
167	            } else {
168	                objectValue = objectValue * (1 + Math.abs(adjustCoeff));
169	            }
170	        } else if (cResult == 0) {
171	            objectValue = adjustCoeff;
172	        } else {
173	            if (adjustCoeff >= 0) {
174	                objectValue = objectValue * (1 + adjustCoeff);
175	            } else {
176	                objectValue = objectValue * (1 - Math.abs(adjustCoeff));
177	            }
178	        }
179	        return objectValue;
180	    }
181	
182	    /**
183	     * 求解器调用入口
184	     */
185	    protected SolverResult invokerSolver(
186	            IModule filteredModuleBase, ModuleInput moduleInput, Double adjustOptimalValue) {
187	        log.info("invokerSolver starting........");
188	
189	        // 步骤1：对每个优先级规则优化求解最优解
190	        ModuleAlgImpl optAlg = createConstraintAlg(module.getId(), module.getCode());
191	        AlgCPModel optModel = new AlgCPModel();
192	        optModel.setIsAttachRelax(false);
193	        optModel.setConfictedRelaxVars(new ArrayList<>());
194	        optAlg.init(optModel, filteredModuleBase, moduleInput);
195	        // initModelByReq(moduleInput, optAlg);
196	        optAlg.addRelaxObjectFunction();
197	        boolean hasPriorityRule = optAlg.hasPriorityRule();
198	        if (hasPriorityRule) {
199	            PartAlgCPLinearExpr priorityMergedExpr = optAlg.queryMergerPriorityConstraintExpr();
200	            if (adjustOptimalValue == null) {
201	                optModel.minimize(priorityMergedExpr);
202	            } else {
203	                optModel.addLessOrEqual(priorityMergedExpr, adjustOptimalValue.longValue());
204	            }
205	        }
206	
207	        // 求解最优解
208	        CpSolver optSolver = new CpSolver();
209	        optSolver.getParameters().setNumSearchWorkers(1);
210	        optSolver.getParameters().setEnumerateAllSolutions(true);
211	        optSolver.getParameters().setMaxTimeInSeconds(10);
212	        if (optModel.hasDecisionStrategies()) {
213	            optSolver.getParameters().setSearchBranching(SatParameters.SearchBranching.FIXED_SEARCH);
214	            log.info("FIXED_SEARCH enabled for decision strategies in opt solver");
215	        }
216	        ModuleInstSolutionCallBack optCb = new ModuleInstSolutionCallBack(module, optAlg);
217	        optCb.setMaxSolutionNum(config.getMaxSolutionNum());
218	        log.info("solver  models:\n");
219	        optModel.printModelSummary();
220	        CpSolverStatus optStatus = optSolver.solve(optModel.getCpModel(), optCb);
221	        SolverResult sr = optCb.getSolverResult();
222	        sr.setSolverStatus(optStatus.toString());
223	        if (optStatus == CpSolverStatus.OPTIMAL || optStatus == CpSolverStatus.FEASIBLE) {
224	            sr.setObjectiveValue(optSolver.objectiveValue());
225	            log.info("Optimal value for : {}", optSolver.objectiveValue());
226	        } else {
227	            log.error("Failed to solver, status : " + optStatus);
228	            return sr;
229	        }
230	        if (hasPriorityRule && (adjustOptimalValue == null)) {
231	            Pair<Boolean, String> validResult = validPriorityOverallValue(sr.getObjectiveValue(), sr.getSolutions());
232	            if (!validResult.getFirst()) {
233	                String msg = "Failed to valid expr&solver " + validResult.getSecond();
234	                log.error(msg);
235	            }
236	        }
237	        sortSolutionsByPriority(sr.getSolutions());
238	        log.info("solutions: \n {}",
239	                SolutionUtils.toSolutionString(sr.getSolutions()));
240	        return sr;
241	    }
242	
243	    /**
244	     * 根据优先级对解决方案进行排序
245	     */
246	    protected void sortSolutionsByPriority(List<ModuleInst> solutions) {
247	        solutions.sort((a, b) -> -Double.compare(b.getPriorityOverallValue(), a.getPriorityOverallValue()));
248	        for (int i = 0; i < solutions.size(); i++) {
249	            solutions.get(i).setPrioritySortNo(i + 1);
250	        }
251	    }
```

```text
33	     */
34	    public ResultAssert assertSolutionSizeEqual(int expectedSize) {
35	        if (actualResult.getData() == null) {
36	            throw new AssertionError(String.format(
37	                    "Solution count mismatch, expected: %d, actual: null", expectedSize));

39

44	                        "Solution count mismatch, expected: %d, actual: %d", expectedSize, actualSize));
```

```text
279	    /**
280	     * 检查解决方案列表中是否包含指定的字符串
281	     * 遍历所有解决方案的 toShortString 输出，检查是否包含指定的子字符串
282	     * 如果找不到匹配的解决方案，则抛出 AssertionError
283	     * 
284	     * @param expectedStr 期望包含的字符串
285	     * @throws AssertionError 如果找不到包含指定字符串的解决方案
286	     */
287	    protected void soluContain(String expectedStr) {
288	        if (getSolutions() == null || getSolutions().isEmpty()) {
289	            throw new AssertionError("No solutions found, cannot check if contains: " + expectedStr);
290	        }
291	        if (expectedStr == null || expectedStr.isEmpty()) {
292	            return;
293	        }
294	        for (ModuleInst solution : getSolutions()) {
295	            String solutionStr = solution.toShortString(true);
296	            if (solutionStr != null && solutionStr.contains(expectedStr)) {
297	                log.info("Found solution containing '{}': {}", expectedStr, solutionStr);
298	                return;
299	            }
300	        }
301	        // 构建错误消息，包含所有解决方案的字符串表示
302	        StringBuilder errorMsg = new StringBuilder();
303	        errorMsg.append("No solution found containing: ").append(expectedStr);
304	        errorMsg.append("\nAvailable solutions:");
305	        for (int i = 0; i < getSolutions().size(); i++) {
306	            String solutionStr = getSolutions().get(i).toShortString(true);
307	            errorMsg.append("\n  S_").append(i + 1).append(": ").append(solutionStr);
308	        }
309	        throw new AssertionError(errorMsg.toString());
310	    }

312	    /**
313	     * 校验满足条件conditionExpr解的个数是否等于expectSolutionNum
314	     * 
315	     * @param conditionExpr     条件表达式，格式如："Color:Red,TShirt1:2"
316	     * @param expectSolutionNum 期望的解决方案数量
317	     */
318	    protected void assertSolutionNum(String conditionExpr, int expectSolutionNum) {
319	        // 如果expectSolutionNum为0，则不进行验证
320	        if (expectSolutionNum == 0 && (getSolutions() == null || getSolutions().isEmpty())) {
321	            return;
322	        }
323	        if (getSolutions() == null || getSolutions().isEmpty()) {
324	            throw new AssertionError("No solutions available for verification");
325	        }
326	        // 解析条件表达式
327	        Map<String, String> kvMap = parseConditionExpr(conditionExpr);
328	
329	        // 构建条件对象列表
330	        List<ConditionElement> conditionElements = buildConditionElements(kvMap);
331	
332	        // 计算实际匹配的解决方案数量
333	        int actualMatchSolutionNum = countMatchingSolutions(conditionElements);
334	
335	        // 比较实际数量和期望数量
336	        if (actualMatchSolutionNum != expectSolutionNum) {
337	            throw new AssertionError(String.format(
338	                    "解决方案数量不匹配，期望: %d，实际: %d，条件: %s",
339	                    expectSolutionNum, actualMatchSolutionNum, conditionExpr));
340	        }
341	
342	        log.info("Solution count verification passed, condition: {}, count: {}", conditionExpr, actualMatchSolutionNum);
343	    }
344	
345	    /**
346	     * 解析条件表达式
347	     * 格式："Color:Red,TShirt1:2" -> {"Color":"Red", "TShirt1":"2"}
348	     * 
349	     * @param conditionExpr 条件表达式字符串
350	     * @return 解析后的键值对映射
351	     */
352	    private Map<String, String> parseConditionExpr(String conditionExpr) {
353	        Map<String, String> kvMap = new HashMap<>();
354	        String[] pairs = conditionExpr.split(",");
355	
356	        for (String pair : pairs) {
357	            String[] kv = pair.split(":");
358	            if (kv.length == 2) {
359	                kvMap.put(kv[0].trim(), kv[1].trim());
360	            } else {
361	                throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid condition expression format: " + pair);
362	            }
363	        }
364	
365	        return kvMap;
366	    }
367	
368	    /**
369	     * 构建条件元素列表
370	     * 
371	     * @param kvMap 键值对映射
372	     * @return 条件元素列表
373	     */
374	    private List<ConditionElement> buildConditionElements(Map<String, String> kvMap) {
375	        List<ConditionElement> elements = new ArrayList<>();
376	
377	        for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry : kvMap.entrySet()) {
378	            String key = entry.getKey();
379	            String value = entry.getValue();
380	
381	            ConditionElement element = createConditionElement(key, value);
382	            elements.add(element);
383	        }
384	
385	        return elements;
386	    }
387	
388	    /**
389	     * 创建条件元素
390	     * 
391	     * @param key   键
392	     * @param value 值
393	     * @return 条件元素
394	     * @throws AlgLoaderException 当找不到参数或部件时
395	     */
396	    private ConditionElement createConditionElement(String key, String value) {
397	        // 在module.paras中查找
398	        java.util.Optional<Para> paraOpt = getModule().getPara(key);
399	        if (paraOpt.isPresent()) {
400	            return createParaConditionElement(key, value, paraOpt.get());
401	        }
402	
403	        // 在module.parts中查找
404	        IPart partOpt = getModule().getPart(key);
405	        if (partOpt != null) {
406	            return createPartConditionElement(key, value);
407	        }
408	
409	        // 都找不到，报错
410	        throw new AlgLoaderException(String.format(
411	                "Parameter or part not found in Module: %s", key));
412	    }
413	
414	    /**
415	     * 创建参数条件元素
416	     * 
417	     * @param key   键
418	     * @param value 值
419	     * @param para  参数对象
420	     * @return 条件元素
421	     */
422	    private ConditionElement createParaConditionElement(String key, String value, Para para) {
423	        String codeIdValue = ParaTypeHandler.getCodeIdValue(para, value);
424	        return new ConditionElement("para", key, codeIdValue);
425	    }
426	
427	    /**
428	     * 创建部件条件元素
429	     * 
430	     * @param key   键
431	     * @param value 值
432	     * @return 条件元素
433	     */
434	    private ConditionElement createPartConditionElement(String key, String value) {
435	        return new ConditionElement("part", key, value);
436	    }
437	
438	    /**
439	     * 计算匹配条件的解决方案数量
440	     * 
441	     * @param conditionElements 条件元素列表
442	     * @return 匹配的解决方案数量
443	     */
444	    private int countMatchingSolutions(List<ConditionElement> conditionElements) {
445	        int matchCount = 0;
446	
447	        for (ModuleInst solution : getSolutions()) {
448	            boolean isMatch = true;
449	
450	            for (ConditionElement element : conditionElements) {
451	                if ("para".equals(element.type)) {
452	                    // 对paraInst，比较value和paraInst.value
453	                    ParaInst paraInst = findParaInstByCode(solution, element.code);
454	                    if (paraInst == null || !element.value.equals(paraInst.getValue())) {
455	                        isMatch = false;
456	                        break;
457	                    }
458	                } else if ("part".equals(element.type)) {
459	                    // 对partInst，比较value和partInst.quantity
460	                    PartInst partInst = findPartInstByCode(solution, element.code);
461	                    if (partInst == null || !element.value.equals(String.valueOf(partInst.getQuantity()))) {
462	                        isMatch = false;
463	                        break;
464	                    }
465	                } else {
466	                    throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid condition element type: " + element.type);
467	                }
468	            }
469	
470	            if (isMatch) {
471	                matchCount++;
472	            }
473	        }
474	
475	        return matchCount;
476	    }
477	
478	    /**
479	     * 根据代码查找ParaInst
480	     * 
481	     * @param solution 模块实例
482	     * @param code     参数代码
483	     * @return 匹配的ParaInst，如果未找到则返回null
484	     */
485	    private ParaInst findParaInstByCode(ModuleInst solution, String code) {
486	        if (solution.getParas() == null) {
487	            return null;
488	        }
489	        return solution.getParas().stream()
490	                .filter(p -> code.equals(p.getCode()))
491	                .findFirst()
492	                .orElse(null);
493	    }
494	
495	    /**
496	     * 根据代码查找PartInst
497	     * 
498	     * @param solution 模块实例
499	     * @param code     部件代码
500	     * @return 匹配的PartInst，如果未找到则返回null
501	     */
502	    private PartInst findPartInstByCode(ModuleInst solution, String code) {
503	        if (solution.getParts() == null) {
504	            return null;
505	        }
506	        return solution.getParts().stream()
507	                .filter(p -> code.equals(p.getCode()))
508	                .findFirst()
509	                .orElse(null);
510	    }
511	
512	    /**
513	     * 根据参数代码值对构建ParaInst列表（公共方法）
514	     * 
515	     * @param paraCodeValuePairs 参数代码和值的交替数组
516	     * @return ParaInst列表
517	     */
518	    protected List<ParaInst> toPreParas(String... paraCodeValuePairs) {
519	        if (paraCodeValuePairs.length % 2 != 0) {
520	            throw new IllegalArgumentException(
521	                    "Parameters must be in even numbers, format: paraCode1, value1, paraCode2, value2, ...");
522	        }
523	
524	        List<ParaInst> paraInsts = new ArrayList<>();
525	
526	        for (int i = 0; i < paraCodeValuePairs.length; i += 2) {
527	            String paraCode = paraCodeValuePairs[i];
528	            String value = paraCodeValuePairs[i + 1];
529	
530	            ParaInst paraInst = new ParaInst();
531	            paraInst.setCode(paraCode);
532	
533	            // 根据module.paras中的para.options，找到value对应的option
534	            Optional<Para> paraOpt = getModule().getPara(paraCode);
535	            if (!paraOpt.isPresent()) {
536	                throw new AlgLoaderException(String.format("Parameter %s does not exist", paraCode));
537	            }
538	            Para para = paraOpt.get();
539	            paraInst.setValue(ParaTypeHandler.getCodeIdValue(para, value));
540	            paraInsts.add(paraInst);
541	        }
542	
543	        return paraInsts;
544	    }
545	
546	    /**
547	     * 根据Part代码值对构建PartInst列表（公共方法）
548	     * 
549	     * @param partCodeValuePairs Part代码和值的交替数组
550	     * @return ParaInst列表
551	     */
552	    protected List<PartInst> toPreParts(String... partCodeValuePairs) {
553	        if (partCodeValuePairs.length % 2 != 0) {
554	            throw new IllegalArgumentException(
555	                    "Parts must be in even numbers, format: partCode1, value1, partCode2, value2, ...");
556	        }
557	
558	        List<PartInst> partInsts = new ArrayList<>();
559	
560	        for (int i = 0; i < partCodeValuePairs.length; i += 2) {
561	            String partCode = partCodeValuePairs[i];
562	            String value = partCodeValuePairs[i + 1];
563	
564	            PartInst partInst = new PartInst();
565	            partInst.setCode(partCode);
566	
567	            // 根据module.parts中
568	            IPart partOpt = getModule().getPart(partCode);
569	            if (partOpt == null) {
570	                throw new AlgLoaderException(String.format("Part %s does not exist", partCode));
571	            }
572	            partInst.setQuantity(Integer.parseInt(value));
573	            partInsts.add(partInst);
574	        }
575	
576	        return partInsts;
577	    }
578	
579	    /**
580	     * 条件元素内部类
581	     */
582	    private static class ConditionElement {
583	
584	        private final String type; // "para" 或 "part"
585	
586	        private final String code; // 代码
587	
588	        private final String value; // 值
589	
590	        ConditionElement(String type, String code, String value) {
591	            this.type = type;
592	            this.code = code;
593	            this.value = value;
594	        }
595	    }
596	
597	    /**
598	     * 打印短格式解信息
599	     * 
600	     */
601	    protected void printSolutions() {
602	        printSolutions(getModule(), getSolutions(), false);
603	    }
604	
605	    protected void printSimpleSolutions() {
606	        printSolutions(getModule(), getSolutions(), true);
607	    }
608	
609	    /**
610	     * 打印短格式解信息
611	     * 
612	     * @param module    模块
613	     * @param solutions 解列表
614	     */
615	    protected void printSolutions(Module module, List<ModuleInst> solutions, boolean isSimple) {
616	        SolutionUtils.printSolutions(module, solutions, isSimple, result);
617	    }
618	
619	    /**
620	     * 将字符串约束请求转换为PartConstraintReq列表
621	     *
622	     * @param partCategory 部件类别
623	     * @param strReqs      字符串约束请求数组，格式如："sd:Sum_Quantity ==2 where Speed=5400"
624	     * @return PartConstraintReq列表
625	     */
626	    protected List<PartConstraintReq> toPartConstraintReqs(String partCategory, String... strReqs) {
627	        List<PartConstraintReq> reqs = new ArrayList<>();
628	
629	        for (String strReq : strReqs) {
630	            PartConstraintReq req = new PartConstraintReq();
631	
632	            // Parse strategy syntax: [strategy=ASCENDING:price]
633	            String remainingStr = parseStrategyConfig(strReq, req);
634	
635	            // 解析格式：reqPartCategory:attrCode comparator value where condition
636	            // 示例："sd:Sum_Quantity ==2 where Speed=5400"
637	            String[] categoryParts = remainingStr.split(":", 2);
638	            String reqPartCategory;
639	            String attrExprStr;
640	            if (categoryParts.length == 2) {
641	                reqPartCategory = categoryParts[0].trim();
642	                attrExprStr = categoryParts[1].trim();
643	            } else {
644	                // 如果没有:，则使用默认的partCategory
645	                reqPartCategory = partCategory;
646	                attrExprStr = remainingStr;
647	            }
648	            req.setPartCategoryCode(reqPartCategory);
649	
650	            // 解析属性表达式：支持三种场景
651	            // 场景1：仅有过滤条件，如 "where Speed=5400"
652	            // 场景2：仅有汇总条件，如 "Sum_Capacity >=5"
653	            // 场景3：同时有汇总条件和过滤条件，如 "Sum_Capacity >=5 where Speed=5400"
654	            parseAttrExpr(attrExprStr, req);
655	
656	            reqs.add(req);
657	        }
658	
659	        return reqs;
660	    }
661	
662	    /**
663	     * Parse strategy configuration from the constraint request string.
664	     * Syntax: [strategy=ASCENDING:price] or [strategy=DESCENDING:attrCode]
665	     *
666	     * @param strReq the full constraint request string
667	     * @param req    the PartConstraintReq to populate
668	     * @return the remaining string after removing strategy configuration
669	     */
670	    private String parseStrategyConfig(String strReq, PartConstraintReq req) {
671	        Pattern strategyPattern = Pattern.compile("\\[strategy=(ASCENDING|DESCENDING|UNSPECIFIED):(\\w+)\\]");
672	        Matcher matcher = strategyPattern.matcher(strReq);
673	        if (matcher.find()) {
674	            StrategyConfig config = new StrategyConfig();
675	            config.setStrategyType(StrategyType.valueOf(matcher.group(1)));
676	            config.setSortAttributeCode(matcher.group(2));
677	            List<StrategyConfig> strategies = new ArrayList<>();
678	            strategies.add(config);
679	            req.setDecisionStrategies(strategies);
680	            // Remove the strategy part from the string
681	            return matcher.replaceFirst("").trim();
682	        }
683	        return strReq;
684	    }
685	
686	    /**
687	     * 解析属性表达式为PartConstraintReq
688	     * 支持三种场景：
689	     * 场景1：仅有过滤条件，如 "where Speed=5400" -> attrWhereCondition="Speed=5400", attrComparator=null
690	     * 场景2：仅有汇总条件，如 "Sum_Capacity >=5" -> attrWhereCondition=null, attrType=Sum, attrCode=Capacity, attrComparator=">=", attrValue="5"
691	     * 场景3：同时有汇总条件和过滤条件，如 "Sum_Capacity >=5 where Speed=5400" -> 同时设置两个条件
692	     *
693	     * @param attrExpr 属性表达式（可能包含 where 子句）
694	     * @param req 部件约束请求对象，用于设置解析结果
695	     */
696	    protected void parseAttrExpr(String attrExpr, PartConstraintReq req) {
697	        String trimmedExpr = attrExpr.trim();
698	
699	        // 处理 where 子句（过滤条件）
700	        // 支持多种格式：",where XXX", "where XXX", ", where XXX"
701	        int whereIndex = -1;
702	        String whereCondition = null;
703	
704	        // 先尝试 " where " (前后都有空格)
705	        whereIndex = trimmedExpr.indexOf(" where ");
706	        if (whereIndex >= 0) {
707	            whereCondition = trimmedExpr.substring(whereIndex + 7).trim();
708	            trimmedExpr = trimmedExpr.substring(0, whereIndex).trim();
709	        } else {
710	            // 再尝试 "where " (前面没有空格)
711	            whereIndex = trimmedExpr.indexOf("where ");
712	            if (whereIndex >= 0) {
713	                whereCondition = trimmedExpr.substring(whereIndex + 6).trim();
714	                trimmedExpr = trimmedExpr.substring(0, whereIndex).trim();
715	            }
716	        }
717	
718	        if (whereCondition != null && !whereCondition.isEmpty()) {
719	            req.setAttrWhereCondition(whereCondition);
720	        }
721	
722	        // 解析汇总条件部分
723	        if (trimmedExpr.isEmpty()) {
724	            // 场景1：仅有过滤条件，没有汇总条件
725	            return;
726	        }
727	
728	        // 使用正则表达式解析：attrCode comparator value
729	        Pattern pattern = Pattern.compile("([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*(==|!=|<=|>=|<|>)\\s*(\\d+)");
730	        Matcher matcher = pattern.matcher(trimmedExpr);
731	
732	        if (matcher.matches()) {
733	            String mergedAttrCode = matcher.group(1).trim();
734	            String[] mergedParts = mergedAttrCode.split(AttrPara.CODE_SEPARATOR);
735	            if (mergedParts.length == 2) {
736	                req.setAttrType(AttrParaType.valueOf(mergedParts[0]));
737	                req.setAttrCode(mergedParts[1]);
738	            } else {
739	                throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid attribute expression format: " + trimmedExpr);
740	            }
741	            req.setAttrComparator(matcher.group(2).trim());
742	            req.setAttrValue(matcher.group(3).trim());
743	        } else {
744	            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid attribute expression format: " + trimmedExpr);
745	        }
746	    }
747	
748	    /**
749	     * 基于部件约束进行推理推荐
750	     * 
751	     * @param constraintReqs 约束请求字符串数组
752	     * @return 推荐的模块实例列表
753	     */
754	    protected List<ModuleInst> inferRecommendModule(String... constraintReqs) {
755	        return inferRecommend("", constraintReqs);
756	    }
757	
758	    /**
759	     * 基于部件约束进行推理推荐
760	     * 
761	     * @param partCategoryCode 部件类别
762	     * @param constraintReqs   约束请求字符串数组
763	     * @return 推荐的模块实例列表
764	     */
765	    protected List<ModuleInst> inferRecommend(String partCategoryCode, String... constraintReqs) {
766	        List<PartConstraintReq> partConstraintReqs = toPartConstraintReqs(partCategoryCode, constraintReqs);
767	
768	        InferParasReq req = new InferParasReq();
769	        req.setModuleId(getModule().getId());
770	        req.setEnumerateAllSolution(isEnumerateAllSolution());
771	        req.setPartCategoryCode(partCategoryCode);
772	        req.setPartConstraintReqs(partConstraintReqs);
773	
774	        long startTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
775	        Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.inferParas(req);
776	        long endTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
777	        long executionTime = endTime - startTime;
778	        log.info("Inference recommend execution time: {} ms", executionTime);
779	        setResult(result);
780	        setSolutions(result.getData());
781	        return getSolutions();
782	    }

784	    private void assertSoluSizeEqual(int size) {
785	        assertEquals(size, solutions.size(), "Solutions size should be " + size);
786	    }
787	
788	    /**
789	     * 比较Solution的值
790	     *
791	     * @param index
792	     * @param expect
793	     */
794	    public void assertSoluContain(int index, String expect) {
795	        assertSoluContain(index, expect, true);
796	    }
797	
798	    private void assertSoluContain(int index, String expect, boolean isSimple) {
799	        String msg = "Solution at index " + index + " should match expected string";
800	        assertTrue(solutions.size() >= index, msg);
801	        assertStringContains(solutions.get(index - 1).toShortString(isSimple),
802	                expect,
803	                msg);
804	    }
805	
806	    private void assertStringContains(String real, String expect, String msg) {
807	        // boolean result = real.contains(expect);
808	        boolean result = contains(real, expect);
809	        if (!result) {
810	            assertEquals(expect, real, "contains is false," + msg);
811	        }
812	    }
813	
814	    protected void assertSoluContain(String expect) {
815	        assertSoluContain(expect, true);
816	    }
817	
818	    private void assertSoluContain(String expect, boolean isSimple) {
819	        boolean isContain = false;
820	        for (ModuleInst solu : result.getData()) {
821	            if (contains(solu.toShortString(isSimple), expect)) {
822	                isContain = true;
823	                break;
824	            }
825	        }
826	        assertTrue(isContain,
827	                "Solution contain " + expect);
828	    }
829	
830	    private boolean contains(String realWholeStr, String expectStr) {
831	        List<String> expectParts = parseExpect(expectStr);
832	        for (String expectPart : expectParts) {
833	            if (!realWholeStr.contains(expectPart)) {
834	                return false;
835	            }
836	        }
837	        return true;
838	    }
839	
840	    private List<String> parseExpect(String expectStr) {
841	        // expectStr = "cpu2(Q:20,H:0,S:1),md1(Q:5,H:0,S:1),sd1(0*)"
842	        // 预期结果：["cpu2(Q:20,H:0,S:1)","md1(Q:5,H:0,S:1)","sd1(0*)"
843	        // 处理逻辑： 根据“),”来拆分
844	        List<String> result = new ArrayList<>();
845	        String[] items = expectStr.split("\\),");
846	        for (String item : items) {
847	            result.add(item.trim());
848	        }
849	        return result;
850	    }
851	
852	}
```

```text
20	    @ModuleAnno(id = 123L)
21	    static public class ConfictDebugConstraint extends ConstraintAlgImplTestBase {
22	        @PartAnno(maxQuantity = 50)
23	        private PartVar x;
24	
25	        @PartAnno(maxQuantity = 50)
26	        private PartVar y;
27	
28	        // rule1: x.qty + y.qty < 20
29	        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "x.qty + y.qty < 20")
30	        private void rule1() {
31	            // Create linear expression for x.qty + y.qty
32	            AlgCPLinearExpr sumXY = new AlgCPLinearExpr("sum_x_y");
33	            sumXY.addTerm(x.qty, 1);
34	            sumXY.addTerm(y.qty, 1);
35	            // Add constraint: x.qty + y.qty < 20
36	            model.addLessThan(sumXY, 20);
37	        }
38	
39	        // rule2: x.qty - y.qty > 10
40	        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "x.qty - y.qty > 10")
41	        private void rule2() {
42	            // Create linear expression for x.qty - y.qty
43	            AlgCPLinearExpr diffXY = AlgCPLinearExpr.weightedSum(new IntVar[] { x.qty, y.qty },
44	                    new long[] { 1, -1 });
45	            // Add constraint: x.qty - y.qty > 10
46	            model.addGreaterThan(diffXY, 10);
47	        }
48	
49	        // rule3: y.qty > 45
50	        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "y.qty > 45")
51	        private void rule3() {
52	            // Add constraint: y.qty > 45
53	            model.addGreaterThan(y.qty, 45);
54	        }
55	
56	        // rule4: x.qty + 2 * y.qty > 10
57	        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "x.qty + 2 * y.qty > 10")
58	        private void rule4() {
59	            // Create linear expression for x.qty + 2 * y.qty
60	            AlgCPLinearExpr sumX2Y = AlgCPLinearExpr.weightedSum(new com.google.ortools.sat.IntVar[] { x.qty, y.qty },
61	                    new long[] { 1, 2 });
62	            // Add constraint: x.qty + 2 * y.qty > 10
63	            model.addGreaterThan(sumX2Y, 10);
64	        }
65	    }
```

```java
package com.jmix.executor.cmodel;

import lombok.AllArgsConstructor;
import lombok.Data;
import lombok.NoArgsConstructor;

/**
 * 诊断约束 — 描述在冲突诊断中被系统内部放宽的约束。
 */
@Data
@NoArgsConstructor
@AllArgsConstructor
public class DiagnosticConstraint {

    /** 约束编码, 如 rule3、input_para_size_small */
    private String code;

    /** 约束类型: RULE / INPUT / SYSTEM */
    private String constraintType;

    /** 人类可读描述, 优先来自 Rule.normalNaturalCode */
    private String naturalCode;

    /** 来源对象, 如 Module / PartCategory / Para / Part */
    private String source;

    /** 诊断权重。用于解释优先级, 不暴露松弛变量名 */
    private int weight;

    /** 用户可读说明 */
    private String description;

    public static final String TYPE_RULE = "RULE";
    public static final String TYPE_INPUT = "INPUT";
    public static final String TYPE_SYSTEM = "SYSTEM";
}

```

```text
342	    private Result<List<ModuleInst>> inferParasOld(InferParasReq req) {
343	        if (req == null) {
344	            return Result.failed("req is null");
345	        }
346	        try {
347	            // 获取基础数据
348	            Module module = getModule(req.getModuleId(), req.getModuleCode());
349	            module.init();
350	
351	            // 获取模块算法类加载器并初始化执行器
352	            ModuleAlgClassLoader loader = getModuleClassLoader(module.getId());
353	            if (loader == null) {
354	                log.error("ModuleAlgClassLoader not found for module: {}", module.getId());
355	                return Result.failed("ModuleAlgClassLoader not found for module: " +
356	                        module.getId());
357	            }
358	            this.init(module, config, loader);
359	
360	            // 执行约束推理
361	            RunInferParasRsp result = runInferParas(module, req, false, new ArrayList<>());
362	            CpSolverStatus status = result.getStatus();
363	            ModuleInstSolutionCallBack cb = result.getSolutionCallBack();
364	
365	            // 如果模型无效，调用ValidateCpModel获取详细错误信息
366	            if (status == CpSolverStatus.MODEL_INVALID) {
367	                // 重新获取模型进行验证
368	                ModuleAlgImpl alg = initConstraintModel(module, req, false, new ArrayList<>());
369	                AlgCPModel model = alg.getModel();
370	                String validationError = model.getCpModel().validate();
371	                log.error("Model validation failed: {}", validationError);
372	                return Result.failed("Model validation failed: " + validationError);
373	            }
374	
375	            if (status != CpSolverStatus.OPTIMAL && status != CpSolverStatus.FEASIBLE
376	                    && status != CpSolverStatus.INFEASIBLE) {
377	                return Result.failed("solver status: " + status);
378	            }
379	            if (status == CpSolverStatus.INFEASIBLE && config.isDebugByRelaxVar()) {
380	                // 没有可行解，如果 debugByRelaxVar= true，则使用松弛变量检测冲突规则
381	                Pair<List<RelaxVar>, RunInferParasRsp> rcResult = null;
382	                List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs = new ArrayList<>();
383	
384	                // 第一次运行
385	                rcResult = runCalcConfictRules(module, req, true, confictedRelaxs);
386	                confictedRelaxs.addAll(rcResult.getFirst());
387	
388	                // 第二次运行，使用第一次的冲突结果
389	                rcResult = runCalcConfictRules(module, req, true, confictedRelaxs);
390	                confictedRelaxs.addAll(rcResult.getFirst());
391	
392	                Result<List<ModuleInst>> r = Result.noSolution(toConfictMessage(confictedRelaxs));
393	
394	                // 最后一次solution的解
395	                List<ModuleInst> solutions = rcResult.getSecond().getSolutionCallBack().getSolverResult()
396	                        .getSolutions();
397	                r.setData(solutions);
398	                return r;
399	            }
400	
401	            // 执行后处理
402	            List<ModuleInst> solutions = cb.getSolverResult().getSolutions();
403	            solutions = executePostProcess(module, solutions);
404	
405	            return Result.success(solutions);
406	        } catch (AlgLoaderException | AlgExecutorException ex) {
407	            log.error("Failed to infer paras", ex);
408	            return Result.failed("exception: " + ex.getMessage());
409	        }
410	    }

412	    @Override
413	    public Result<Void> registerExtensible(ExtensibleProcess eProcess) {
414	        if (eProcess == null) {
415	            return Result.failed("ExtensibleProcess is null");
416	        }
417	        if (extensibleProcesses.contains(eProcess)) {
418	            log.warn("ExtensibleProcess already registered: {}", eProcess.getProcessName());
419	            return Result.success(null);
420	        }
421	        Result<Void> initResult = eProcess.init();
422	        if (initResult.getCode() != Result.SUCCESS) {
423	            return Result.failed("Failed to initialize extensible process: " + initResult.getMessage());
424	        }
425	        extensibleProcesses.add(eProcess);
426	        // 按优先级排序
427	        extensibleProcesses.sort(Comparator.comparingInt(ExtensibleProcess::getPriority));
428	        log.info("Registered extensible process: {} with priority: {}",
429	                eProcess.getProcessName(), eProcess.getPriority());
430	        return Result.success(null);
431	    }
432	
433	    @Override
434	    public Result<Void> unregisterExtensible(ExtensibleProcess eProcess) {
435	        if (eProcess == null) {
436	            return Result.failed("ExtensibleProcess is null");
437	        }
438	        if (!extensibleProcesses.contains(eProcess)) {
439	            log.warn("ExtensibleProcess not registered: {}", eProcess.getProcessName());
440	            return Result.success(null);
441	        }
442	        eProcess.destroy();
443	        extensibleProcesses.remove(eProcess);
444	        log.info("Unregistered extensible process: {}", eProcess.getProcessName());
445	        return Result.success(null);
446	    }
```

```text
480	     * @param result 运行推理参数响应
481	     * @return 冲突松弛变量列表
482	     */
483	    private List<RelaxVar> calcConfictRules(RunInferParasRsp result) {
484	        AlgCPModel relaxModel = result.getAlgCPModel();
485	        // 获取冲突规则信息
486	        List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs = new ArrayList<>();
487	        Map<String, RelaxVar> relaxVarMap = relaxModel.getRelaxVarMap();
488	        for (Map.Entry<String, RelaxVar> entry : relaxVarMap.entrySet()) {
489	            RelaxVar relaxVar = entry.getValue();
490	            if (result.getSolver().booleanValue(relaxVar.getValue())) {
491	                confictedRelaxs.add(relaxVar);
492	            }
493	        }
494	        return confictedRelaxs;
495	    }
496	
497	    /**
498	     * 将冲突松弛变量列表转换为冲突消息字符串
499	     *
500	     * @param confictedRelaxs 冲突松弛变量列表
501	     * @return 冲突消息字符串
502	     */
503	    private String toConfictMessage(List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs) {
504	        StringBuilder conflictMessage = new StringBuilder("conflict rules: ");
505	        for (RelaxVar confictedRelax : confictedRelaxs) {
506	            conflictMessage.append(confictedRelax.getRuleCode()).append(",");
507	        }
508	        return conflictMessage.toString();
509	    }
```

```java
@PartAnno(maxQuantity = 1)
```

Actually wait - for the current implementation, `maxQuantity` is encoded as the variable domain `newIntVar(0, maxQuantity)`, so it's not a constraint that goes through `setRelax4SysRule`. Therefore, even with relax, if the user inputs qty=2 but maxQuantity=1, the model will still be infeasible because there's no relaxable constraint to relax.

But for the output to show "relaxed model is still infeasible", we need the original model to be INFEASIBLE first, and then the relaxed model to also be INFEASIBLE. For this, we need at least one relaxable constraint AND a domain violation. Or we could have the case where relax solves the original infeasibility by relaxing input constraints.

Actually, looking at the flow more carefully:
1. Original solve is INFEASIBLE
2. Build relaxed model (with relax vars on constraints)
3. If relaxed model is still INFEASIBLE: return NO_SOLUTION with message "relaxed model is still infeasible"
4. If relaxed model is FEASIBLE: return NO_SOLUTION with partial solutions

For CONFLICT-008, the scenario is:
- Part maxQuantity=1
- User input qty=2
- The original model is INFEASIBLE (because qty=2 > maxQuantity=1)
- When relax is applied, the user input constraint (addPartEquality) is relaxed, so qty can be different from 2
- So the relaxed model would be FEASIBLE!

Actually, re-reading the RFC:
> CONFLICT-008: 无法松弛的硬冲突
> 验证变量域或不可松弛硬约束导致无解时, 系统给出明确失败信息。
> Part maxQuantity=1, 用户输入 qty=2, 且输入约束不允许放松

"且输入约束不允许放松" - this means we need a way to prevent the input constraint from being relaxed. In the current code, `addPartEquality` always calls `setRelax4SysRule`, so input constraints are always relaxable.

If we don't allow the input constraint to be relaxed (by not calling setRelax4SysRule), the model would be:
- Original: INFEASIBLE (qty=2 > maxQuantity=1)
- Relaxed: still INFEASIBLE (qty=2 constraint is not relaxed, maxQuantity=1 is still the domain bound)

So for CONFLICT-008, we'd need a constraint that is NOT relaxable. This could be tested by having only domain-bound constraints where no relaxable constraints exist.
