```java
package com.jmix.tool.conflictdiagnosis;

import com.jmix.coretest.ConstraintAlgImplTestBase;
import com.jmix.coretest.ModuleScenarioTestBase;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.AlgCPLinearExpr;
import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno.CodeRuleAnno;
import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno.ModuleAnno;
import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno.PartAnno;

import com.google.ortools.sat.BoolVar;
import com.google.ortools.sat.IntVar;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;

/**
 * RFC-0003 冲突诊断测试用例。
 * 覆盖 CONFLICT-001 基础线性冲突、CONFLICT-003 If-Then 冲突、
 * CONFLICT-009 请求级开关、CONFLICT-010 输出完整性。
 */
@Slf4j
public class ConflictDiagnosisTest extends ModuleScenarioTestBase {

    // --------------- CONFLICT-001 模型: 基础线性规则冲突 -----------------
    @ModuleAnno(id = 1001L)
    static public class Conflict001Constraint extends ConstraintAlgImplTestBase {
        @PartAnno(maxQuantity = 50)
        private PartVar x;

        @PartAnno(maxQuantity = 50)
        private PartVar y;

        // rule1: x.qty + y.qty < 20
        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "x.qty + y.qty < 20")
        private void rule1() {
            AlgCPLinearExpr sumXY = new AlgCPLinearExpr("sum_x_y");
            sumXY.addTerm(x.qty, 1);
            sumXY.addTerm(y.qty, 1);
            model.addLessThan(sumXY, 20);
        }

        // rule2: x.qty - y.qty > 10
        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "x.qty - y.qty > 10")
        private void rule2() {
            AlgCPLinearExpr diffXY = AlgCPLinearExpr.weightedSum(
                    new IntVar[]{x.qty, y.qty}, new long[]{1, -1});
            model.addGreaterThan(diffXY, 10);
        }

        // rule3: y.qty > 45
        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "y.qty > 45")
        private void rule3() {
            model.addGreaterThan(y.qty, 45);
        }

        // rule4: x.qty + 2 * y.qty > 10
        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "x.qty + 2 * y.qty > 10")
        private void rule4() {
            AlgCPLinearExpr sumX2Y = AlgCPLinearExpr.weightedSum(
                    new IntVar[]{x.qty, y.qty}, new long[]{1, 2});
            model.addGreaterThan(sumX2Y, 10);
        }
    }

    // --------------- CONFLICT-003 模型: If-Then 条件规则冲突 -----------------
    @ModuleAnno(id = 1003L)
    static public class Conflict003Constraint extends ConstraintAlgImplTestBase {
        @PartAnno(maxQuantity = 50)
        private PartVar x;

        @PartAnno(maxQuantity = 50)
        private PartVar y;

        // rule1: if x.qty > 10 then y.qty > 7
        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "if x.qty > 10 then y.qty > 7")
        private void rule1() {
            BoolVar xGt10 = model.newBoolVar("x_gt_10");
            model.addGreaterThan(x.qty, 10).onlyEnforceIf(xGt10);
            model.addLessOrEqual(x.qty, 10).onlyEnforceIf(xGt10.not());
            model.addGreaterThan(y.qty, 7).onlyEnforceIf(xGt10);
        }

        // rule2: x.qty > 20
        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "x.qty > 20")
        private void rule2() {
            model.addGreaterThan(x.qty, 20);
        }

        // rule3: y.qty < 5
        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "y.qty < 5")
        private void rule3() {
            model.addLessThan(y.qty, 5);
        }
    }

    public ConflictDiagnosisTest() {
        super(Conflict001Constraint.class);
    }

    // ====================== CONFLICT-001: 基础线性规则冲突 ======================

    @Test
    public void testConflict001_1_relaxSolveDefault_noRelaxation() {
        // 默认不开启松弛诊断，原始模型无解直接返回无解
        inferParasByPara();
        printSolutions();
        resultAssert()
                .assertSuccess()
                .assertSolutionSizeEqual(0);
    }

    @Test
    public void testConflict001_2_relaxSolveTrue_hasPartialSolution() {
        // 开启松弛诊断，返回 NO_SOLUTION, strictFeasible=false, 包含部分解
        inferParasByParaRelax();
        printSolutions();
        resultAssert()
                .assertNoSolution()
                .assertMessageContains("rule3")
                .assertStrictFeasible(false)
                .assertPartialSolutionSizeGreaterThanOrEqual(1);
    }

    @Test
    public void testConflict001_3_relaxSolveTrue_diagnosticContainsRule3() {
        // 诊断约束包含 rule3
        inferParasByParaRelax();
        printSolutions();
        resultAssert()
                .assertHasDiagnosticConstraints()
                .assertDiagnosticConstraintsContains("rule3");
    }

    // ====================== CONFLICT-003: If-Then 条件规则冲突 ======================

    @Test
    public void testConflict003_1_originalInfeasible() {
        // 原始模型无解 (x > 20 触发 rule1 -> y > 7, 但 rule3 要求 y < 5)
        ModuleScenarioTestBase test = new ConflictDiagnosisTest()
                .withConstraintClass(Conflict003Constraint.class);
        test.init();
        test.inferParasByPara();
        test.printSolutions();
        test.resultAssert()
                .assertSuccess()
                .assertSolutionSizeEqual(0);
    }

    @Test
    public void testConflict003_2_relaxSolveTrue_returnsPartialSolution() {
        // 开启诊断后返回 NO_SOLUTION, strictFeasible=false, solutions 非空
        ModuleScenarioTestBase test = new ConflictDiagnosisTest()
                .withConstraintClass(Conflict003Constraint.class);
        test.init();
        test.inferParasByParaRelax();
        test.printSolutions();
        test.resultAssert()
                .assertNoSolution()
                .assertStrictFeasible(false)
                .assertPartialSolutionSizeGreaterThanOrEqual(1)
                .assertHasDiagnosticConstraints();
    }

    @Test
    public void testConflict003_3_diagnosticIdentifiesConflictingRule() {
        // 冲突规则应包含 rule1 或与其直接冲突的 rule2/rule3
        ModuleScenarioTestBase test = new ConflictDiagnosisTest()
                .withConstraintClass(Conflict003Constraint.class);
        test.init();
        test.inferParasByParaRelax();
        test.printSolutions();

        String message = test.getResult().getMessage();
        // message 应包含至少一个冲突规则
        boolean hasConflict = message.contains("rule1")
                || message.contains("rule2")
                || message.contains("rule3");
        if (!hasConflict) {
            throw new AssertionError("Expected message to contain at least one of rule1/rule2/rule3, got: " + message);
        }
        test.resultAssert()
                .assertNoSolution()
                .assertHasDiagnosticConstraints();
    }

    // ====================== CONFLICT-009: 请求级松弛开关 ======================

    @Test
    public void testConflict009_1_relaxSolveNotSet_noDiagnosisReturned() {
        // 不设置 relaxSolve，默认不诊断
        inferParasByPara();
        printSolutions();
        resultAssert()
                .assertSuccess()
                .assertSolutionSizeEqual(0)
                .assertNoDiagnosticConstraints();
    }

    @Test
    public void testConflict009_3_relaxSolveTrue_diagnosisReturned() {
        // relaxSolve=true, 返回诊断结果
        inferParasByParaRelax();
        printSolutions();
        resultAssert()
                .assertNoSolution()
                .assertStrictFeasible(false)
                .assertHasDiagnosticConstraints()
                .assertPartialSolutionSizeGreaterThanOrEqual(1);
    }

    // ====================== CONFLICT-010: 输出解释完整性 ======================

    @Test
    public void testConflict010_1_messageExplainsConflictAndRelaxation() {
        // message 应包含原始无解原因和被放松约束
        inferParasByParaRelax();
        printSolutions();
        resultAssert()
                .assertNoSolution()
                .assertMessageContains("infeasible", "partial solution")
                .assertStrictFeasible(false);
    }

    @Test
    public void testConflict010_2_diagnosticConstraintHasCompleteInfo() {
        // diagnosticConstraints 使用业务 code, 不暴露松弛变量名
        inferParasByParaRelax();
        printSolutions();
        resultAssert()
                .assertHasDiagnosticConstraints()
                .assertDiagnosticConstraintsContains("rule3");

        // 验证 diagnosticConstraint 的 code 不以 "relax_" 开头
        var sr = getResult().getSolverResult();
        for (var dc : sr.getDiagnosticConstraints()) {
            if (dc.getCode().startsWith("relax_")) {
                throw new AssertionError(
                        "DiagnosticConstraint code should not expose internal relax var name: " + dc.getCode());
            }
            if (dc.getConstraintType() == null || dc.getConstraintType().isEmpty()) {
                throw new AssertionError("DiagnosticConstraint type should not be empty");
            }
        }
    }

    @Test
    public void testConflict010_3_partialSolutionSatisfiesUnrelaxedRules() {
        // 部分解除满足未被放宽的规则外，还应满足变量域
        inferParasByParaRelax();
        printSolutions();
        resultAssert()
                .assertPartialSolutionSizeGreaterThanOrEqual(1);

        var sr = getResult().getSolverResult();
        for (var solution : sr.getSolutions()) {
            // 部分解中 y 的 qty 需满足 maxQuantity 域约束
            for (var part : solution.getParts()) {
                if (part.getQuantity() > 50) {
                    throw new AssertionError(
                            "Partial solution violates domain bound: " + part.getCode()
                                    + " qty=" + part.getQuantity() + " > 50");
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // --------------- helper to switch constraint class mid-test ---------------

    private Class<? extends ConstraintAlgImplTestBase> constraintClassOverride;

    public ConflictDiagnosisTest withConstraintClass(
            Class<? extends ConstraintAlgImplTestBase> clazz) {
        this.constraintClassOverride = clazz;
        return this;
    }

    @Override
    public void setUp() {
        if (constraintClassOverride != null) {
            // 需要用到正确的 constraintClass 进行 init
            // setup 通过 beforeInitConfig 钩子实现动态切换
        }
        super.setUp();
    }
}

package com.jmix.tool.conflictdiagnosis;

import com.jmix.coretest.ConstraintAlgImplTestBase;
import com.jmix.coretest.ModuleScenarioTestBase;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.AlgCPLinearExpr;
import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno.CodeRuleAnno;
import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno.ModuleAnno;
import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno.PartAnno;

import com.google.ortools.sat.IntVar;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;

/**
 * RFC-0003 CONFLICT-001: 基础线性规则冲突。
 * CONFLICT-009: 请求级松弛开关。
 * CONFLICT-010: 输出解释完整性。
 */
@Slf4j
public class ConflictDiagnosisTest extends ModuleScenarioTestBase {

    @ModuleAnno(id = 1001L)
    static public class Conflict001Constraint extends ConstraintAlgImplTestBase {
        @PartAnno(maxQuantity = 50)
        private PartVar x;

        @PartAnno(maxQuantity = 50)
        private PartVar y;

        // rule1: x.qty + y.qty < 20
        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "x.qty + y.qty < 20")
        private void rule1() {
            AlgCPLinearExpr sumXY = new AlgCPLinearExpr("sum_x_y");
            sumXY.addTerm(x.qty, 1);
            sumXY.addTerm(y.qty, 1);
            model.addLessThan(sumXY, 20);
        }

        // rule2: x.qty - y.qty > 10
        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "x.qty - y.qty > 10")
        private void rule2() {
            AlgCPLinearExpr diffXY = AlgCPLinearExpr.weightedSum(
                    new IntVar[]{x.qty, y.qty}, new long[]{1, -1});
            model.addGreaterThan(diffXY, 10);
        }

        // rule3: y.qty > 45
        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "y.qty > 45")
        private void rule3() {
            model.addGreaterThan(y.qty, 45);
        }

        // rule4: x.qty + 2 * y.qty > 10
        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "x.qty + 2 * y.qty > 10")
        private void rule4() {
            AlgCPLinearExpr sumX2Y = AlgCPLinearExpr.weightedSum(
                    new IntVar[]{x.qty, y.qty}, new long[]{1, 2});
            model.addGreaterThan(sumX2Y, 10);
        }
    }

    public ConflictDiagnosisTest() {
        super(Conflict001Constraint.class);
    }

    // ====================== CONFLICT-001: 基础线性规则冲突 ======================

    @Test
    public void testConflict001_1_relaxSolveDefault_noRelaxation() {
        inferParasByPara();
        printSolutions();
        resultAssert()
                .assertSuccess()
                .assertSolutionSizeEqual(0);
    }

    @Test
    public void testConflict001_2_relaxSolveTrue_hasPartialSolution() {
        inferParasByParaRelax();
        printSolutions();
        resultAssert()
                .assertNoSolution()
                .assertMessageContains("rule3")
                .assertStrictFeasible(false)
                .assertPartialSolutionSizeGreaterThanOrEqual(1);
    }

    @Test
    public void testConflict001_3_relaxSolveTrue_diagnosticContainsRule3() {
        inferParasByParaRelax();
        printSolutions();
        resultAssert()
                .assertHasDiagnosticConstraints()
                .assertDiagnosticConstraintsContains("rule3");
    }

    // ====================== CONFLICT-009: 请求级松弛开关 ======================

    @Test
    public void testConflict009_1_relaxSolveNotSet_noDiagnosisReturned() {
        inferParasByPara();
        printSolutions();
        resultAssert()
                .assertSuccess()
                .assertSolutionSizeEqual(0)
                .assertNoDiagnosticConstraints();
    }

    @Test
    public void testConflict009_3_relaxSolveTrue_diagnosisReturned() {
        inferParasByParaRelax();
        printSolutions();
        resultAssert()
                .assertNoSolution()
                .assertStrictFeasible(false)
                .assertHasDiagnosticConstraints()
                .assertPartialSolutionSizeGreaterThanOrEqual(1);
    }

    // ====================== CONFLICT-010: 输出解释完整性 ======================

    @Test
    public void testConflict010_1_messageExplainsConflictAndRelaxation() {
        inferParasByParaRelax();
        printSolutions();
        resultAssert()
                .assertNoSolution()
                .assertMessageContains("infeasible", "partial solution")
                .assertStrictFeasible(false);
    }

    @Test
    public void testConflict010_2_diagnosticConstraintHasCompleteInfo() {
        inferParasByParaRelax();
        printSolutions();
        resultAssert()
                .assertHasDiagnosticConstraints()
                .assertDiagnosticConstraintsContains("rule3");

        var sr = getResult().getSolverResult();
        for (var dc : sr.getDiagnosticConstraints()) {
            if (dc.getCode().startsWith("relax_")) {
                throw new AssertionError(
                        "DiagnosticConstraint code should not expose internal relax var name: " + dc.getCode());
            }
            if (dc.getConstraintType() == null || dc.getConstraintType().isEmpty()) {
                throw new AssertionError("DiagnosticConstraint type should not be empty");
            }
        }
    }

    @Test
    public void testConflict010_3_partialSolutionSatisfiesDomainBounds() {
        inferParasByParaRelax();
        printSolutions();
        resultAssert()
                .assertPartialSolutionSizeGreaterThanOrEqual(1);

        var sr = getResult().getSolverResult();
        for (var solution : sr.getSolutions()) {
            for (var part : solution.getParts()) {
                if (part.getQuantity() > 50) {
                    throw new AssertionError(
                            "Partial solution violates domain bound: " + part.getCode()
                                    + " qty=" + part.getQuantity() + " > 50");
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

package com.jmix.tool.conflictdiagnosis;

import com.jmix.coretest.ConstraintAlgImplTestBase;
import com.jmix.coretest.ModuleScenarioTestBase;
import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno.CodeRuleAnno;
import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno.ModuleAnno;
import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno.PartAnno;

import com.google.ortools.sat.BoolVar;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;

/**
 * RFC-0003 CONFLICT-003: 条件规则 If-Then 冲突。
 * 验证带 onlyEnforceIf() 的条件约束在松弛变量叠加后仍可诊断。
 */
@Slf4j
public class ConflictDiagnosisIfThenTest extends ModuleScenarioTestBase {

    @ModuleAnno(id = 1003L)
    static public class Conflict003Constraint extends ConstraintAlgImplTestBase {
        @PartAnno(maxQuantity = 50)
        private PartVar x;

        @PartAnno(maxQuantity = 50)
        private PartVar y;

        // rule1: if x.qty > 10 then y.qty > 7
        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "if x.qty > 10 then y.qty > 7")
        private void rule1() {
            BoolVar xGt10 = model.newBoolVar("x_gt_10");
            model.addGreaterThan(x.qty, 10).onlyEnforceIf(xGt10);
            model.addLessOrEqual(x.qty, 10).onlyEnforceIf(xGt10.not());
            model.addGreaterThan(y.qty, 7).onlyEnforceIf(xGt10);
        }

        // rule2: x.qty > 20 -> triggers rule1, so y > 7
        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "x.qty > 20")
        private void rule2() {
            model.addGreaterThan(x.qty, 20);
        }

        // rule3: y.qty < 5 -> conflicts with rule1's consequence
        @CodeRuleAnno(normalNaturalCode = "y.qty < 5")
        private void rule3() {
            model.addLessThan(y.qty, 5);
        }
    }

    public ConflictDiagnosisIfThenTest() {
        super(Conflict003Constraint.class);
    }

    @Test
    public void testConflict003_1_originalInfeasible() {
        // x > 20 triggers rule1 -> y > 7, but rule3 requires y < 5 => original infeasible
        inferParasByPara();
        printSolutions();
        resultAssert()
                .assertSuccess()
                .assertSolutionSizeEqual(0);
    }

    @Test
    public void testConflict003_2_relaxSolveTrue_returnsPartialSolution() {
        inferParasByParaRelax();
        printSolutions();
        resultAssert()
                .assertNoSolution()
                .assertStrictFeasible(false)
                .assertPartialSolutionSizeGreaterThanOrEqual(1)
                .assertHasDiagnosticConstraints();
    }

    @Test
    public void testConflict003_3_diagnosticIdentifiesConflictingRule() {
        inferParasByParaRelax();
        printSolutions();

        String message = getResult().getMessage();
        boolean hasConflict = message.contains("rule1")
                || message.contains("rule2")
                || message.contains("rule3");
        if (!hasConflict) {
            throw new AssertionError(
                    "Expected message to contain at least one of rule1/rule2/rule3, got: " + message);
        }
        resultAssert()
                .assertNoSolution()
                .assertHasDiagnosticConstraints();
    }
}

```

_**Agent (deepseek-v4-pro 2026-05-02 08:13:40Z)**_

RFC-0003 冲突诊断松弛求解功能的开发已完成。以下是变更摘要：

---

## 变更摘要

### 新增文件（3 个）

| 文件 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| [DiagnosticConstraint.java](src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/cmodel/DiagnosticConstraint.java) | 诊断约束模型，描述被放宽的约束（code/type/naturalCode/weight） |
| [ConflictDiagnosisTest.java](src/test/java/com/jmix/tool/conflictdiagnosis/ConflictDiagnosisTest.java) | CONFLICT-001/009/010 测试（8 个用例） |
| [ConflictDiagnosisIfThenTest.java](src/test/java/com/jmix/tool/conflictdiagnosis/ConflictDiagnosisIfThenTest.java) | CONFLICT-003 If-Then 冲突诊断测试（3 个用例） |

### 修改文件（8 个）

| 文件 | 关键变更 |
|------|----------|
| [InferParasReq.java](src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/model/InferParasReq.java) | 新增 `relaxSolve` 请求级开关（默认 false） |
| [SolverResult.java](src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/cmodel/SolverResult.java) | 新增 `strictFeasible`、`originalSolverStatus`、`diagnosticConstraints` |
| [Result.java](src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/model/Result.java) | 新增 `solverResult` 字段承载结构化诊断数据 |
| [ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.java](src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/impl/ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.java) | 请求级开关优先；构建 `DiagnosticConstraint` 列表；组装含诊断的 `SolverResult` |
| [ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl.java](src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/impl/ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl.java) | （间接）通过 `ModuleInput.relaxSolve` 参数化准备 |
| [InferPartCategoryReq.java](src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/model/InferPartCategoryReq.java) | 新增 `relaxSolve` 字段传播 |
| [ModuleInput.java](src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/impl/ModuleInput.java) | 新增 `relaxSolve` 字段传播 |
| [ResultAssert.java](src/test/java/com/jmix/coretest/ResultAssert.java) | 新增 6 个诊断断言：`assertStrictFeasible`、`assertHasDiagnosticConstraints`、`assertDiagnosticConstraintsContains` 等 |
| [ModuleScenarioTestBase.java](src/test/java/com/jmix/coretest/ModuleScenarioTestBase.java) | 新增 `inferParasByParaRelax()` 和 `assertPartialSoluContain()` |

### 核心行为

- `relaxSolve=false`（默认）：原始无解 → 直接返回 NO_SOLUTION，不诊断
- `relaxSolve=true`：原始无解 → 自动松弛诊断 → 返回 `NO_SOLUTION` + `SolverResult`（含 `strictFeasible=false` + 部分解 + `diagnosticConstraints`）
- `msg` 格式：`"Original model infeasible: rule1/rule3 conflict; system relaxed them to find a partial solution"`
- 向后兼容：`debugByRelaxVar=true` 继续有效，与 `relaxSolve` 按逻辑或生效
